satisfied with Your acts,
fond of mentioning and praying to You,
bearing love for the choicest of Your intimate servants,
beloved in Your lands and heavens,
steadfast against the affliction of Your tribulations,
thankful for Your graceful bounties,
always bearing in mind Your incessant gifts,
longing for the gladness of meeting You,
supplied with piety for the day of Your rewarding,
pursuing the morals of Your intimate servants,
quitting the conducts of Your enemies,
and distracted from this world by praising and thanking You.

text.en: The Imam (‘a) then put his cheek on the tomb and said:
text.ar: ثم وضع خده على القبر وقال :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ قُلُوبَ الْمُخْبِتِينَ إِلَيْكَ وَالِهَةٌ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna quluba almukhbitina ilayka walihatun

translation.en: O Allah, the hearts of those humbling themselves to You are fascinated,
the paths of those desiring for You are open,
the sings of those directing to You are evident,
the hearts of those having recognition of You are resorting to You,
the voices of those beseeching You are mounting up to You,
the doors of responding to them are wide open,
the prayer of him who speaks to You confidentially is responded,

segments.transliteration: wa tawbata man anaba ilayka maqbulatun

translation.en: the repentance of him who turns to You modestly is admitted,

segments.arabic: وَعَبْرَةَ مَنْ بَكَىٰ مِنْ خَوْفِكَ مَرْحُومَةٌ
segments.transliteration: wa `abrata man baka min khawfika marhumatun

translation.en: the tear of him who weeps on account of fear from You is compassionated,
the aid of him who seeks Your aid is available,
the help of him who seeks Your help is obtainable,
Your promises to Your servants are fulfilled,
the slips of him who implore You to excuse him are forgivable,
the deeds of those who act for You are preserved,

segments.arabic: وَارْزَاقَكَ إِلَىٰ ٱلْخَلاَئِقِ مِنْ لَدُنْكَ نَازِلَةٌ
segments.transliteration: wa arzaqaka ila alkhala'iqi min ladunka nazilatun

translation.en: Your sustenance to the creatures are descending from You,
Your gifts for further conferrals are reaching them,
the sins of those imploring Your forgiveness are forgiven,
the requests of Your creatures are granted by You,
the prizes of those begging You are offered,
Your gifts for further conferrals are uninterrupted,
the dining tables for those seeking Your feeding are prepared,
and the springs of quenching their thirst are brimful.
O Allah, (so) respond to my prayer,
accept my thanksgiving for You,
and join me to my masters,
[I beseech You] in the name of Muhammad, `Ali,
Fatimah, al-Hasan, and al-Husayn.
You are verily the only source of my boons,
the ultimate goal of my wishes,

segments.transliteration: wa ghayatu raja'i fi munqalabi wa mathwaya

translation.en: and the target of my hope in my recourses and settlement.

segments.arabic: وقد ذيلّ في كتاب (كامل الزيارة) هذه الزيارة بهذا القول :

translation.en: In the book of Kamil al-Ziyarat, the following statements are added to this form of Ziyarah:

segments.transliteration: anta ilahi wa sayyidi wa mawlaya

translation.en: You are verily my God, Master, and Lord.
(Please) forgive our friend,
prevent our enemies against us,
distract them from harming us,
give prevalence to the Word of Truth
and make it the supreme,
and frustrate the word of falsehood
and make it the lowliest.
Verily, You have power over all things.

text.en: Imam al-Baqir (‘a) then added, “Indeed, any one of our adherents (Shi’ah) who pronounces these words at the tomb of Amir al-Mu’minin (‘a) or the tomb of one of the Imams (‘a) shall certainly have his prayer lifted up on a ladder of light, carrying the seal of the Holy Prophet’s ring, and it shall be kept so until it will be delivered to the Riser from Muhammad’s Household (namely, Imam al-Mahdi) who will receive the sayer of that prayer with good tidings, greetings, and honor.”
text.ar: ثم قال الباقر عليه‌السلام ما قال هذا الكلام ولا دعا به أحد من شيعتنا عند قبر أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام أو عند قبر أحد الأئمة عليهم‌السلام إلاّ رفع دعاؤه في درج من نور وطبع عليه بخاتم محمد صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله وكان محفوظا كذلك حتى يسلم إلى قائم آل محمد عليه‌السلام فيلقى صاحبه بالبشرى والتحية والكرامة إن شاء الله تعالى

text.en: It is worth mentioning that the Ziyarah of Aminullah is considered one of the general forms of Ziyarah of Imam ‘Ali (‘a), one of the private forms of Ziyarah on the ‘Id al-Ghadir Day, and one of the comprehensive forms of Ziyarah that can be said at all the shrines of the Holy Imams.
text.ar: أقول : هذه الزيارة معدودة من الزيارات المطلقة للأمير عليه‌السلام كما أنها عدّت من زيارته المخصوصة بيوم الغدير ، وهي معدودة أيضاً من الزيارات الجامعة التي يزار بها في جميع الروضات المقدسة للأئمة الطاهرين عليهم‌السلام

text.en: Ziyarat after Fajr of Imam Mahdi (ajtfs) This Ziarat is recited after Fajr prayer for Imam Mahdi(ajtfs)
text.ar: مايزار به مولانا صاحب الزمان (صَلوت الله وسلامه عليه) كل يوم بعد صلاة الفجر وهي :

translation.en: O Allah, (please) convey to my master the Patron of the Age,
Allah’s blessings be upon him,
on behalf of all the believing men and women
in the east and west sides of the earth,
in its lands and oceans,
in its plains and mountains,
and both the alive and the dead,
and on behalf of my parents, my descendants, and me,
(convey to him) such blessings and greetings
that are as heavy as the measure of the Throne of Allah,
as much as the ink of His words,
as endless as His pleasure,
and as many as all that which has been calculated by His Books
and comprehended by His knowledge.
O Allah, I update to him
on this day
and on all days
a pledge, a covenant, and an allegiance to which I commit up to my neck.
O Allah, just as You have endued me with this honor,
conferred upon me this virtue,
and granted me exclusively this bounty,
so also (please) send blessings upon my master and chief,
the patron of the age,
and make me of his supporters,
adherents, and defenders,
and make me of those who will be martyred in his presence,
with full willingness and without compulsion,

segments.arabic: فِي ٱلصَّفِّ ٱلَّذِي نَعَتَّ أَهْلَهُ فِي كِتَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: fi alssaffi alladhi na`atta ahlahu fi kitabika

translation.en: in the line whose people have been described in Your Book
where You say, “… one line as if they were a firm and compact wall,”
and with obedience to You
and obedience to Your Messenger and his Household,
peace be upon them.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ هٰذِهِ بَيْعَةٌ لَهُ فِي عُنُقِي

translation.en: O Allah, this is my allegiance to him that is involved in my neck
up to the Resurrection Day.

text.en: In his book of Bihar al-Anwar, `Allamah al-Majlisi has said the following: In some ancient books, I found the following instruction mentioned after this form of ziyarah: “You may then slap your right hand on the left as if you are swearing allegiance.”
text.ar: قال العلامة المجلسي في البحار : وجدت في بعض الكتب القديمة بعد ذلك : ويصفق بيده اليمنى على اليسرى كتصفيق البيعة.

text.en: Supplication After Ziyarah of Imam Mahdi (peace be upon him). It is narrated from Yunus ibn `Abd al-Rahman that Imam `Ali ibn Musa al-Ridha (peace be upon him), used to order his companions and adherents to say the following supplicatory prayer for sake of Imam al-Mahdi (peace be upon him). Besides, it is strongly recommended to say it after the ziyarah of Imam al-Mahdi (peace be upon him).
text.ar: روى يونس بن عبد الرحمن عن الرضا (صلوات الله عليه) أنّه كان يأمر بالدعاء لصاحب الأمر عليه‌السلام بهذا الدعاء :

text.en: Dua Allumma Idfaa an waliyak recited after Ziarat of Imam Mahdi(ajtfs)for repelling calamities from Imam Supplication which was ordered by the eighth Imam Ali Ridha (peace be on him) to be recited during the days of occultation

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) defend Your vicegerent,
representative, decisive argument against Your creatures,
and mouthpiece who speaks on behalf of You
and speaks with Your wisdom,
Your eye that sees with Your permission,
Your witness on Your servants,
the magnanimous master, the striver (for the sake of Allah),
the seeker of Your shelter, and the full worshipper in Your measures.

segments.arabic: وَأَعِذْهُ مِنْ شَرِّ جَمِيعِ مَا خَلَقْتَ وَبَرَأْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa a`idhhu min sharri jami`i ma khalaqta wa bara'ta

translation.en: Keep him safe from the evils of all that which You created, originated,
established, and formed.

segments.arabic: وَٱحْفَظْهُ مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِ
segments.transliteration: wahfazhu min bayni yadayhi wa min khalfihi

translation.en: And protect him from the sides of his front, his back,
his right, his left,

segments.transliteration: wa min fawqihi wa min tahtihi

translation.en: above him, and beneath him,

segments.arabic: بِحِفْظِكَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَضِيعُ مَنْ حَفِظْتَهُ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: bihifzika alladhi la yadi`u man hafiztahu bihi

translation.en: with Your safety that preserves from any loss.
And safeguard through him Your Messenger and his fathers;
the Imams appointed by You and the pillars of Your religion.

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْهُ فِي وَدِيعَتِكَ ٱلَّتِي لاَ تَضِيعُ
segments.transliteration: waj`alhu fi wadi`atika allati la tadi`u

translation.en: And place him in Your deposit that is never lost,

segments.transliteration: wa fi jiwarika alladhi la yukhfaru

translation.en: in Your vicinity that is never violated,

segments.arabic: وَفِي مَنْعِكَ وَعِزِّكَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُقْهَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa fi man`ika wa `izzika alladhi la yuqharu

translation.en: and in Your protection and almightiness that are never defeated.
And secure him by Your well-firmed security

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُخْذَلُ مَنْ آمَنْتَهُ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: alladhi la yukhdhalu man amantahu bihi

translation.en: that does not forsake whoever takes asylum in it.
And make him under Your protection

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُرَامُ مَنْ كَانَ فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: alladhi la yuramu man kana fihi

translation.en: that saves whoever is put under it from any harm.
Grant him Your insuperable victory,
aid him with Your overcoming troops,
strengthen him with Your strength,
put Your angels at his disposal,
support whoever supports him,
be the enemy of whoever opposes him,
dress him Your fortified armor,
and make the angels surround him totally.
O Allah, through him patch up the differences of opinion,
bring into order confusion,
eradicate oppression,
manifest justice,
adorn the earth by a lengthy life for him,
support him with victory,
grant him triumph by means of horror,
reinforce his supporters,
thwart his disappointers,
crush those who lay traps for him,
destroy those who cheat him,

segments.arabic: وَٱقْتُلْ بِهِ جَبَابِرَةَ ٱلْكُفْرِ وَعُمُدَهُ وَدَعَائِمَهُ
segments.transliteration: waqtul bihi jababirata al-kufr wa `umudahu wa da`a'imahu

translation.en: kill the tyrants, pillars, and supports of infidelity at his hands,

segments.arabic: وَٱقْصِمْ بِهِ رُؤُوسَ ٱلضَّلاَلَةِ وَشَارِعَةَ ٱلْبِدَعِ
segments.transliteration: waqsim bihi ru'usa alddalalati wa shari`ata albida`i

translation.en: uproot the heads of deviation, the innovators of heresies,

segments.transliteration: wa mumitata alssunnati wa muqawwiyata albatili

translation.en: the eradicators of the Prophetic traditions, and the backers of wrong,
humiliate the haughty tyrants,

segments.transliteration: wa abir bihi alkafirina wa jami`a almulhidina

translation.en: terminate the infidels and all atheists
wherever they are—in the east or the west of the earth
or in lands or oceans,
or in plains or on mountains,
until You will not leave a single one of them
and You will not leave a single trace of them.
O Allah, clear up Your lands from them,
heal your servants’ hearts from them,
consolidate the faithful believers through him,
revive the norms of the Messengers
and the obliterated rules of the Prophets,

segments.arabic: وَجَدِّدْ بِهِ مَا ٱمْتَحَىٰ مِنْ دِينِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa jaddid bihi ma imtaha min dinika

translation.en: and renew the signs of Your religion that were erased
and Your judgments that were distorted;

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تُعِيدَ دِينَكَ بِهِ وَعَلَىٰ يَدَيْهِ جَدِيداً
segments.transliteration: hatta tu`ida dinaka bihi wa `ala yadayhi jadidan

translation.en: until you rekindle Your religion through him and at his hands
as well-defined, pure, and sound as it is;

segments.arabic: لاَ عِوَجَ فِيهِ وَلاَ بِدْعَةَ مَعَهُ
segments.transliteration: la `iwaja fihi wa la bid`ata ma`ahu

translation.en: free from loopholes and heresies,

segments.transliteration: wa hatta tunira bi`adlihi zulama aljawri

translation.en: and until You illumine the murk of unfairness by means of his justice,
extinguish the fires of atheism though him,
and elucidate the positions of truth
and the justice that will have been unknown.
He is verily Your servant whom You have saved for Yourself,
chosen for keeping the unseen matters of You,
protected against sins,
cleaned from any defect,
purified from filth,
and kept sound against dirt.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَإِنَّا نَشْهَدُ لَهُ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fa'inna nashhadu lahu yawma alqiyamati

translation.en: O Allah, we will verily testify to him on the Day of Resurrection
and on the day when the overwhelming event comes
that he did not commit any single sin,
nor did he practice any unlawful thing,
nor did he do any act of disobedience (to You),
nor did he miss any act of obedience (to You),
nor did he violate any inviolable thing,
nor did he distort any precept,
nor did he change any law.
And, moreover, he is verily the guiding, the rightly guided,
the pure, the pious,
the immaculate, the approved, and the bright.
O Allah, give him what he wishes regarding his own self
his family, his sons,
his offspring, his nation,
and all of his subjects
in such a way that makes him delighted
and pleased in himself,

segments.transliteration: wa tajma`u lahu mulka almamlakati kulliha

translation.en: and makes You put under his sphere of influence all kingdoms;
the near and the remote,
and the powerful and the weak

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تُجْرِيَ حُكْمَهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ حُكْمٍ

translation.en: so that You will cause his rule to prevail over every rule
and his right (issue) to overcome the entire wrongness.
O Allah, lead us at his hands
to the course of guidance,
the greatest Path,
and the equitable way of life
to which those who had gone too far will come back (repentant)
and those who had fallen down will catch up.
And (please) encourage us to carry out acts of obedience to him,
make us stand firmly in following him,
endue us with the favor of adherence to him,
and include us with his group who achieve his commands,
act steadfastly towards him,
and seek Your pleasure by means of acting sincerely to him,

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تَحْشُرَنَا يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ فِي أَنْصَارِهِ
segments.transliteration: hatta tahshurana yawma alqiyamati fi ansarihi

translation.en: so that You will gather us on the Resurrection Day with his supporters,
backers, and those who consolidate his authority.
O Allah, make us do all these things

segments.transliteration: khalisan min kulli shakkin wa shubhatin

translation.en: free from any doubt, confusion,
ostentation, and seeking of reputation
so that we will rely upon none save You

segments.transliteration: wa la natluba bihi illa wajhaka

translation.en: and seek none save Your sake
and that You will put us up in his vicinity
and place us with him in Paradise.

segments.transliteration: wa a`idhna min alssa'mati walkasali walfatrati

translation.en: And (please) protect us against weariness, laziness and lethargy
and include us with those whom You take up for backing Your religion
and for increasing the victory of Your vicegerent.
Do not put others in our places,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ ٱسْتِبْدَالَكَ بِنَا غَيْرَنَا عَلَيْكَ يَسِيرٌ

translation.en: because it is easy for You to put others in our places,
but it is extremely difficult for us if You do it.
O Allah, send blessings upon his representatives
and the leaders after him,
make them attain their wishes,
increase their lifetimes,
support their victory,

segments.arabic: وَتَمِّمْ لَهُمْ مَا أَسْنَدْتَ إِلَيْهِمْ مِنْ أَمْرِكَ لَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa tammim lahum ma asnadta ilayhim min amrika lahum

translation.en: make perfect for them Your orders that You bid them to carry out,
strengthen their pillars,
and make us their helpers
and supporters of Your religion.
They are the essence of Your Words,
the hoarders of Your knowledge,
the pillars of the profession of Your Oneness,
the posts of Your religion,
the authorities of Your commands,
the choices over Your servants,
the well-chosen ones from among Your creatures,
the vicegerents of You, the offspring of Your vicegerents,
and the selected descendants of Your Prophet.
Peace be upon him and them.
Allah’s mercy and blessings, too, be upon them.

text.en: Friday Ziyarah of Imam Mahdi (peace be upon him)
text.ar: يَومُ الجُمعة وَهُوَ يَومُ صاحِب الزَّمان (صَلَواتُ الله عَلَيهِ) وباسمهِ وَهُوَ اليَوم الذي يظهر فيه عجَّلَ الله فرجَهُ ، فَقُل في زيارته عليه‌السلام :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ فِي أَرْضِهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O argument of Allah in His lands!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَيْنَ ٱللَّهِ فِي خَلْقِهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O sight of Allah on His creatures!
Peace be upon you, O light of Allah
by which those who have been guided [to the true guidance] are guided
and by which the believers are relieved!
Peace be upon you, O polite and fearful!
Peace be upon you, O sincere patron!
Peace be upon you, O ark of salvation!
Peace be upon you, O essence of life!
Peace be upon you.
May Allah send blessings to you
and upon your Household,
the pure and immaculate.
Peace be upon you.
May Allah hasten that which He has promised you;
namely, victory and prevalence of your authority.
Peace be upon you, O my master.
I am a servant of you
and I recognize the first and the last of your affair.

segments.arabic: اتَقَرَّبُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ بِكَ وَبِآلِ بَيْتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ataqarrabu ilaallahi ta`alabika wa bi-ali baytika

translation.en: I seek nearness to Allah, the Exalted, through your Household and you

segments.arabic: وَانْتَظِرُ ظُهُورَكَ وَظُهُورَ ٱلْحَقِّ عَلَىٰ يَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa antaziru zuhuraka wa zuhura alhaqqi `alayadayka

translation.en: and I am expecting your advent and the prevalence of the truth at your hands.

segments.arabic: وَاسْالُ ٱللَّهَ انْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa as'alu allaha an yusalliya `alamuhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: And I beseech Allah to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa an yaj`alani mina almuntazirina laka

translation.en: and to include me with those who are expecting you,
those who follow you and support you against your enemies,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْمُسْتَشْهَدِينَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ فِي جُمْلَةِ اوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: walmustash-hadina bayna yadayka fi jumlati awliya'ika

translation.en: and those who will be martyred in front of you in the group of your loyalists.
O my master, O Patron of the Age!
May Allah’s blessings be upon you
and upon your Household.
Today is Friday,

segments.transliteration: wa huwa yawmuka almutawaqqa`u fihi zuhuruka

translation.en: which is your day on which your advent is expected
to bring about relief to the believers at your hands,
and killing of the disbelievers with your sword.

segments.arabic: وَانَا يَا مَوْلاَيَ فِيهِ ضَيْفُكَ وَجَارُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa anayamawlaya fihi dayfuka wa jaruka

translation.en: On this day, O my master, I am your guest and in your vicinity

segments.arabic: وَانْتَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ كَرِيمٌ مِنْ اوْلاَدِ ٱلْكِرَامِ
segments.transliteration: wa anta yamawlaya karimun min awladi alkirami

translation.en: and you, my master, are generous and the descendant of the generous people,
and you are commanded to receive your guests and neighbors hospitably;
so, receive me as your guest and neighbor.
May Allah’s blessings be upon you
and upon your Household, the immaculate.

text.en: Rewards of visitation
Merits
Ziyarat

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great of all.
All praise be to Allah very much.

segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi bukratan wa asilan

translation.en: Glory be to Allah in mornings and evenings.
All praise be to Allah Who has guided us to this.

segments.arabic: وَمَا كُنَّا لِنَهْتَدِيَ لَوْلاَ أَنْ هَدَانَا ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ma kunna linahtadiya lawla an hadana allahu

translation.en: We would not have been guided if Allah had not guided us.
The messengers of our Lord have indeed come with the truth.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala rasuli allahi salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi

translation.en: Peace be upon the Messenger of Allah, peace of Allah be upon him and his Household.
Peace be upon the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala fatimata alzzahra'i sayyidati nisa'i alʿalamina

translation.en: Peace be upon Fatimah the luminous and the doyenne of all women of the world.
Peace be upon al-Hasan and al-Husayn.
Peace be upon `Ali the son of al-Husayn.
Peace be upon Muhammad the son of `Ali.
Peace be upon Ja`far the son of Muhammad.
Peace be upon Musa the son of Ja`far.
Peace be upon `Ali the son of Musa.
Peace be upon Muhammad the son of `Ali.
Peace be upon `Ali the son of Muhammad.
Peace be upon al-Hasan the son of `Ali.
Peace be upon the virtuous Successor and Awaited.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah's Messenger.
I—the servant of you and the son of your servant and your bondwoman,
who is loyal to those who are loyal to you
and enemy of those who are your enemies—
am seeking the shelter of your shrine
and seeking nearness to Allah through directing to you.
All praise be to Allah Who guided me to be loyal to you,
Who conferred upon me with my visiting you,
and Who made easy for me to direct to you.

text.en: You may then enter the shrine, stop next to the side of the Imam's head, and say the following words:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha adama safwati allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Adam the chosen by Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha nuhin nabiyyi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Noah the prophet of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha ibrahima khalili allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Abraham the friend of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ كَلِيمِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha musa kalimi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Moses the spoken by Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيسَىٰ رُوحِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha ʿisa ruhi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Jesus the spirit of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدٍ حَبِيبِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha muhammadin habibi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Muhammad the most beloved by Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha amiri almu'minina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha fatimata alzzahra'i

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Fatimah the luminous.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيكَ يَا بْنَ محَمَّدٍ ٱلْمُصْطَفَىٰ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Muhammad the well-chosen prophet.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ عَلِيٍّ ٱلْمُرْتَضَىٰ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of `Ali the well-pleased.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah the luminous.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَدِيـجَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Khadijah the grand lady.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O vengeance of Allah and son of His vengeance
and the unavenged sanctity.
I bear witness that you performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rates,
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,

segments.transliteration: wa ataʿta allaha hatta ataka alyaqinu

translation.en: and obeyed Allah until death came upon you.
May Allah curse the people who slew you.
May Allah curse the people who wronged you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذٰلِكَ فَرَضِيَتْ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa laʿana allahu ummatan samiʿat bidhalika faradiyat bihi

translation.en: May Allah curse the people who were informed about that but they approved it.

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: ya mawlaya ya aba ʿabdi allahi

translation.en: O my master! O Abu-`Abdullah!
I call Allah, His angels,
His Prophets, and His Messengers
to witness that I believe in you and in your Return

segments.transliteration: muqinun bisharayiʿi dini wa khawatimi ʿamali

translation.en: and I have faith in the laws of my religion and in the sealing deeds of mine,
and in my final return to my Lord.
Allah's blessings be upon you all,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala arwahikum wa ʿala ajsadikum

translation.en: upon your souls, upon your bodies,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala shahidikum wa ʿala gha'ibikum

translation.en: upon the present and the absent (of your group),
and upon the manifest and the hidden (of your affairs).

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَاتَمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Seal of Prophets,
son of the chief of the Prophets' successors,
son of the leader of the pious,

segments.arabic: وَٱبْنَ قَائِدِ ٱلْغُرِّ ٱلْمُحَجَّلِينَ إِلَىٰ جَنَّاتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wabna qa'idi alghurri almuhajjalina ila jannati alnnaʿimi

translation.en: and son of the white-forehead, marked believers.
How can that you be anything other than this
while you are the door to the true guidance,
the guide to piety,
the firmest handle,
the argument against the inhabitants of this world,
and the fifth of the People of the Cloak.
You were nourished by the hand of mercy,
breast-fed by the bosom of faith,
and brought up in the lap of Islam.
So, my soul is definitely displeased by the way you left this world
and it has no doubt that you are alive.
Allah's blessings be upon you,
your ascendants, and your descendants.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَرِيعَ ٱلْعَبْرَةِ ٱلسَّاكِبَةِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya sariʿa alʿabrati alssakibati

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O object of the pouring tears
and match of the astounding misfortune.

segments.arabic: لَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً ٱسْتَحَلَّتْ مِنْكَ ٱلْمَحَارِمَ
segments.transliteration: laʿana allahu ummatan istahallat minka almaharima

translation.en: May Allah curse the people who violated your sanctities
and infringed the holiness of Islam.
So, you—may Allah's blessings be upon you—were killed overwhelmed,

segments.arabic: وَأَصْبَحَ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ بِكَ مَوْتُوراً
segments.transliteration: wa asbaha rasulu allahi salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi bika mawturan

translation.en: the Messenger of Allah, Allah's blessings be upon him and his Household, became cut off because of loss of you,

segments.transliteration: wa asbaha kitabu allahi bifaqdika mahjuran

translation.en: and the Book of Allah became deserted due to losing you.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka wa ʿala jaddika wa abika

translation.en: Peace be upon you, your grandfather, your father,
your mother, your brother,
the Imams from your descendants,
those who were martyred with you,
and the angels who are surrounding your tomb,
witnessing for your visitors,
and praying for the acceptance of the prayers of your adherents.

segments.transliteration: walssalamu ʿalayka wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah's mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi yabna rasuli allahi

translation.en: May my father and mother be ransoms for you, O son of Allah's Messenger.

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi ya aba ʿabdi allahi

translation.en: May my father and mother be ransoms for you, O Abu-`Abdullah.
So unbearable is the misfortune
and so horrendous is the calamity of you

segments.arabic: عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ أَهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: ʿalayna wa ʿala jamiʿi ahli alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: for us and for all the inhabitants of the heavens and the earth.

segments.transliteration: falaʿana allahu ummatan asrajat wa aljamat

translation.en: May Allah curse the people who put saddles and reins on their animals
and readied themselves for fighting against you.

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: ya mawlaya ya aba ʿabdi allahi

translation.en: O my master! O Abu-`Abdullah!
I have directed to your sanctuary
and I have come to your shrine

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُ ٱللَّهَ بِٱلشَّأْنِ ٱلَّذِي لَكَ عِنْدَهُ
segments.transliteration: as'alu allaha bilshsha'ni alladhi laka ʿindahu

translation.en: asking Almighty Allah in the name of the standing that you enjoy with Him
and in the name of the position that you occupy with him

segments.arabic: أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an yusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يَجْعَلَنِي مَعَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa an yajʿalani maʿakum fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: and to include me with your group in this world and in the Hereafter,
out of His favor, magnanimity, and generosity.

text.en: You may then kiss the tomb and offer a two-unit prayer in which you may recite any Surah you wish. Upon accomplishment, you may say the following dua:

segments.transliteration: allahumma inni sallaytu wa rakaʿtu wa sajadtu

translation.en: O Allah, I have offered a prayer, genuflected, and prostrated myself
for Your sake purely without setting any partner with You,
since all prayers, genuflections, and prostrations
suit none except You.

segments.arabic: لِأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: li'annaka anta allahu la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Because You are Allah; there in no god save You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa ablighhum ʿanni afdala alttahiyyati walssalami

translation.en: convey to them my best greetings and compliments,
and convey to me their replies to my greetings and compliments.
O Allah, these two units of prayer

segments.arabic: هَدِيَّةٌ مِنِّي إِلَىٰ مَوْلاَيَ وَسَيِّدِي وَإِمَامِي
segments.transliteration: hadiyyatun minni ila mawlay wa sayyidi w aimami

translation.en: are present from me to my master, chief, and leader,
al-Husayn the son of `Ali, peace be upon both of them.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَتَقَبَّلْ ذٰلِكَ مِنِّي وَٱجْزِنِي عَلَىٰ ذٰلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa taqabbal dhalika minni wa'jurni ʿala dhalika

translation.en: and accept that from me and reward me for it

segments.arabic: أَفْضَلَ أَمَلِي وَرَجَائِي فِيكَ وَفِي وَلِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: afdala amali wa raja'i fika wa fi waliyyika

translation.en: in the best rewarding that I anticipate and hope from You and from Your saint.
O most merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: Ziyarah of Ali ibn Husayn (peace be upon him)

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah's Messenger.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah's Prophet.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ ٱلشَّهِيدِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of al-Husayn the martyr.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلشَّهِيدُ ٱبْنُ ٱلشَّهِيدِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ayyuha alshshahidu ibnu alshshahidi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O martyr and son of the martyr.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمَظْلُومُ وَٱبْنُ ٱلْمَظْلُومِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ayyuha almazlumu wabnu almazlumi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O persecuted and son of the persecuted.
May Allah curse the people who slew you.
May Allah curse the people who wronged you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذٰلِكَ فَرَضَيِتْ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa laʿana allahu ummatan samiʿat bidhalika faradayit bihi

translation.en: May Allah curse the people who were informed of that and they approved it.
Peace be upon you, O my master.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ وَلِيِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waliyya allahi wabna waliyyihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah's friend and son of His friend.
Unbearable is the misfortune
and so horrendous is the calamity of you
for us and for all faithful believers.
May Allah curse the people who slew you.

segments.arabic: وَأَبْرَأُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَيْكَ مِنْهُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa abra'u ila allahi wa ilayka minhum fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: I release myself in the presence of Allah and you from these people in this world and in the Hereafter.

text.en: Ziyarah of the Martyrs

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَوْلِيَاءَ ٱللَّهِ وَأَحِبَّاءَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya awliya'a allahi wa ahibba'ahu

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah's friends and beloved by him.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَصْفِيَاءَ ٱللَّهِ وَأَوِدَّاءَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya asfiya'a allahi wa awidda'ahu

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O choices of Allah and His favorites.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ دِينِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya ansara dini allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O supporters of Allah's Religion,
supporters of His Prophet,
supporters of the Commander of the Faithful,

segments.transliteration: wa ansara fatimata sayyidati nisa'i alʿalamina

translation.en: and supporters of Fatimah the doyenne of the women of the world.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya ansara abi muhammadin

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O supporters of Abu-Muhammad
al-Hasan the sincere saint.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ أَبِي عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya ansara abi ʿabdi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O supporters of Abu-`Abdullah
al-Husayn the wronged martyr.
Blessings of Allah be upon them all.
May my father and mother be your ransoms.

segments.arabic: طِبْتُمْ وَطَابَتِ ٱلأَرْضُ ٱلَّتِي فِيهَا دُفِنْتُمْ
segments.transliteration: tibtum wa tabat al-ardu allati fiha dufintum

translation.en: Pure are you, and pure is the soil in which you were buried.
And, by Allah, great is your triumph.

segments.arabic: يَا لَيْتَنِي كُنْتُ مَعَكُمْ فَأَفُوزَ مَعَكُمْ
segments.transliteration: ya laytani kuntu maʿakum fa'afuza maʿakum

translation.en: I wish I were with you so that I would have won with you
in the gardens of Paradise with the martyrs and the righteous.
Excellent is the companionship of these.

segments.transliteration: walssalamu ʿalaykum wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah's mercy and blessings be upon you all.

text.en: Ziyarah of 'Abbas ibn Ali (peace be upon him)

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu'l-Fadl
al-`Abbas son of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the Prophets' successors.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَوَّلِ ٱلْقَوْمِ إِسْلاَماً
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka yabna awwali alqawmi islaman

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the foremost in accepting Islam,
the leading in having faith in it,
the most perfect in carrying out the laws of Allah's religion,
and the most careful for Islam.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ لَقَدْ نَصَحْتَ لِلَّهِ وَلِرَسُولِهِ وَلأَخِيكَ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu laqad nasahta lillahi wa lirasulihi wa li'akhika

translation.en: I bear witness that you have acted sincerely for the sake of Allah, His Messenger, and your brother.
So, how excellent sacrificing brother you are!
May Allah curse the people who slew you.
May Allah curse the people who wronged you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً ٱسْتَحَلَّتْ مِنْكَ ٱلْمَحَارِمَ
segments.transliteration: wa laʿana allahu ummatan istahallat minka almaharima

translation.en: May Allah curse the people who violated your sanctities
and infringed the holiness of Islam when they killed you.
Most excellent steadfast, striver brother,
defender, supporter,
one who stood up for his brother,
one who responded to the obedience to his Lord,
and one who desired for what others deemed unworthy;
namely, the abundant reward and the excellent praise you are.
May Allah attach you to the rank of your ancestors
in the Abode of Bliss.

text.en: You may then throw yourself on the tomb and say the following words:

translation.en: O Allah, I am presenting myself before You
and I am intending to visit your intimate servants,
for I desire for gaining Your reward
and I hope for Your forgiveness
and abundant benevolence.

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: fa'as'aluka an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: So, I beseech You to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa an tajʿala rizqi bihim darran

translation.en: and, (I beseech You) in their names, to make my sustenance unstoppable,
my life peaceful,
my pilgrimage admissible,
my life serene,
and my sins forgiven.
And (I beseech You to) make me return from them with success and prosperity,
having my prayers granted,
with the best things with which any one
of his visitors and comers may return;
in the name of Your mercy, O most merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en: The Minor Comprehensive Form of Ziyarah In his book of Man La Yahdharul Faqih, Shaykh al-Saduq has reported that Imam al-Ridha (peace be upon him) was once asked about the way of visiting Imam Musa Kadhim (peace be upon him). He answered, “You may pray in the mosques surrounding his tomb. It is however acceptable to say the following (form of ziyarah) at all shrines.”
text.ar: روى الصدوق في كتاب (من لا يحضره الفقيه) أنّه سئل الرضا عليه‌السلام عن إتيان أبي الحسن موسى عليه‌السلام قال :

text.en: This apparently means that it is acceptable to say this form of ziyarah at visiting the holy shrines of the Imams (peace be upon them) or even all other holy shrines, like those of the Prophets and the Prophets’ successors:
text.ar: صلّوا في المساجد حوله ويجزي في المواضع كلها (أي يجزي في زيارة كل من الأئمة أو في مطلق المزارات الشريفة المقدسة كمراقد الأنبياء وسائر الأوصياء عليهم‌السلام كما هو الظاهر) أن تقول :

translation.en: Peace be upon Allah's friends and well-chosen ones!
Peace be upon Allah's trustees and beloved ones!
Peace be upon Allah's supporters and representatives!
Peace be upon the centers of the recognition of Allah!
Peace be upon the places of mentioning Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُظْهِرِي أَمْرِ ٱللَّهِ وَنَهْيِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala muzhiri amri allahi wa nahyihi

translation.en: Peace be upon the demonstrators of Allah's orders and prohibitions!
Peace be upon the callers to Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْمُسْتَقِرِّينَ فِي مَرْضَاتِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon those settling down at Allah's pleasure!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْمُخْلِصِينَ فِي طَاعَةِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon those obeying Allah sincerely!
Peace be upon those guiding to Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلَّذِينَ مَنْ وَالاَهُمْ فَقَدْ وَالَىٰ ٱللَّهَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala alladhina man walahum faqad wala allaha

translation.en: Peace be upon those the loyalty to whom is loyalty to Allah,
the hostility towards whom is hostility towards Allah,
the recognition of whom is recognition of Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa man jahilahum faqad jahila allaha

translation.en: ignorance of whom is ignorance of Allah,

segments.arabic: وَمَنِ ٱعْتَصَمَ بِهِمْ فَقَدِ ٱعْتَصَمَ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa mani i`tasama bihim faqadi i`tasama billahi

translation.en: sticking to whom is sticking to Allah,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ تَخَلَّىٰ مِنْهُمْ فَقَدْ تَخَلَّىٰ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ
segments.transliteration: wa man takhalla minhum faqad takhalla min allahi `azza wa jalla

translation.en: and abandonment of whom is abandonment of Allah the Almighty and All-majestic.

segments.arabic: وَأُشْهِدُ ٱللَّهَ أَنِّي سِلْمٌ لِمَنْ سَالَمْتُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa ushhidu allaha anni silmun liman salamtum

translation.en: And I call Allah to witness that I am at peace with those with whom you are at peace
and at war with those with whom you are at war.
I believe in your secret and open affairs
and I am relegating all that to you.
May Allah cure the enemy of Muhammad's Household,
including the jinn and mankind,
and I disavow them in the presence of Allah.

segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: May Allah bless Muhammad and his Household.

text.en: You may then invoke Almighty Allah’s blessings upon the Holy Prophet and his Household, by mentioning their names respectively. You may also invoke Almighty Allah’s curse on their enemies and then pray Him for any thing you wish for yourself as well as the believing men and women.
text.ar: وتكثر من الصَّلاة على محمد وآله وتسمي واحداً واحداً بأسمائهم وتبرأ من أعدائهم. وتخيّر ما شئت من الدعاء لنفسك والمؤمنين والمؤمنات

text.en: In the last paragraph of the tradition, the Imam (peace be upon him) has ordered us to invoke blessings upon the Holy Prophet Muhammad (صلى الله عليه وآله وسلم) and his Household and to mention their names one after another. It is therefore very fitting to say the form of invoking blessings upon the Holy Prophet and his Household, which is ascribed to Abu’l-Hasan al-Zarrab -
<ref=3:24>Salawat Zarrab Isfahani</ref>
text.ar: <ref=3:24>صلاة أبي الحسن الضرّاب الاصبهاني</ref>

text.en: ZIYARAT AT SHRINE-MAFATIH
text.ar: زيارة النبي صَلَواتُ الله وسَلامُهُ عَلَيهِ

text.en: The method of visiting the shrine of the Holy Prophet (saws) is as follows: When you arrive in the holy city of al-Madinah, perform ghusl When you intend to enter The Holy Prophet’s Mosque, you should stop at the door of the mosque and say the FIRST form of asking permission for entering there You may enter from the Gate of Archangel Gabriel (Bab Jibraeel) preceding the right foot to the left. You may then repeat the following phrase one hundred times
text.ar: إذا وردت إن شاء الله تعالى مدينة النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله فاغتسل للزيارة فإذا أردت دخول مسجده صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله فقف على الباب واستأذن بالإستئذان الأول مما ذكرناه وادخل من باب جبرائيل عليه‌السلام وقدم رجلك اليمنى عند الدخول ثم قل : الله أَكْبَرُ مائة مرة ، ثم صل ركعتين تحية المسجد ثم إمض إلى الحجرة الشريفة. فإذا بلغتها فاستلمها بيدك وقبّلها وقل :

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great
Peace be upon you, O Messenger of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Prophet of Allah.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنَ عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Muhammad the son of `Abdullah.
Peace be upon you, O Seal of the Prophets.
I bear witness that you conveyed the Mission,
performed the prayers,
gave alms,
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,

segments.arabic: وَعَبَدْتَ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصاً حَتَّىٰ اتَاكَ ٱليَقِينُ
segments.transliteration: wa `abadta allaha mukhlisan hatta ataka alyaqinu

translation.en: and served Almighty Allah sincerely until death came upon you.
Blessings and mercy of Allah be upon you
and upon your Household, the Immaculate.

text.en:
You may then stand near the fore pillar on the right hand side of the
tomb with the minbar to your right, facing the kiblah, and this is
where the Holy Prophet’s head rests. You may then say the following:
text.ar: ثُمَّ قف عند الأسطوانة المقدّمة مِنْ جانب القبر الأيمن مستقبل ومنكبك الأيسر إِلى جانب القبر ومنكبك الأيمن مما يلي المنبر فإنه موضع رأس النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله وَقل :

segments.arabic: اشْهَدُ انْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu wahdahu la sharika lahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah, One and Only and having no associate,

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna muhammadan `abduhu wa rasuluhu

translation.en: and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger.
I bear witness that you are the messenger of Allah
and you are Muhammad the son of `Abdullah.

segments.arabic: وَاشْهَدُ انَّكَ قَدْ بَلَّغْتَ رِسَالاَتِ رَبِّكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka qad ballaghta risalati rabbika

translation.en: I bear witness that you have conveyed the messages of your Lord,
offered your people good advice,
striven hard in the way of Allah,
worshipped Allah -until death came upon you-
with wisdom and fair exhortation,
fulfilled the duty that was incumbent upon you,
acted compassionately to the believers,
and been firm of heart against the unbelievers.

segments.arabic: فَبَلَّغَ ٱللَّهُ بِكَ افْضَلَ شَرَفِ مَحَلِّ ٱلْمُكَرَّمِينَ
segments.transliteration: faballgha allahu bika afdala sharafi mahalli almukarramina

translation.en: Therefore, Almighty Allah has exalted you to the most honorable position of the ennobled ones.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي ٱسْتَنْقَذَنَا بِكَ مِنْ ٱلشِّرْكِ وَٱلضَّلالَةِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi istanqadhana bika min alshshirki walddalalati

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has saved us, through you, from polytheism and error.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَٱجْعَلْ صَلَوَاتِكَ وَصَلَوَاتِ مَلائِكَتِكَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma faj`al salawatika wa salawati mala'ikatika almuqarrabina

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) pour Your blessings and the blessings of Your Archangels,
Your commissioned Prophets,
Your righteous servants,
the inhabitants of the heavens and the earth,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ سَبَّحَ لَكَ يَا رَبَّ ٱلعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa man sabbaha laka ya rabba al`alamina

translation.en: and all those who glorified You, O Lord of the Worlds,
from the past and the coming generations,
on Muhammad—Your servant, Your Messenger,
Your Prophet, Your Trustee,
Your Confidant, Your Most Beloved,
Your Choice, Your Select,

segments.transliteration: wa safwatika wa khiyaratika min khalqika

translation.en: Your elite, and the best of Your creation.
O Allah, (please do) confer upon him with the Elevated Rank,
grant him the right of intercession for entering Paradise,

segments.arabic: وَٱبْعَثْهُ مَقَاماً مَحْمُوداً يَغْبِطُهُ بِهِ ٱلاوَّلُونَ وَٱلآخِرُونَ
segments.transliteration: wab`athhu maqaman mahmudan yaghbituhu bihi al-awwaluna wal-akhiruna

translation.en: and raise him to a Position of Glory that all the past and the coming generations will wish to have.
O Allah, You have said,

segments.arabic: «وَلَوْ انَّهُمْ إِذْ ظَلَمُوا انْفُسَهُمْ جَاؤُوكَ فَٱسْتَغْفَرُوٱ ٱللَّهَ
segments.transliteration: walaw annahum idh zalamu anfusahum ja'uka fastaghfaru allaha

translation.en: “And had they, when they were unjust to themselves, come to you and asked forgiveness of Allah
and the Messenger had (also) asked forgiveness for them,
they would have found Allah Oft-returning (to mercy), Merciful.”

segments.arabic: وَإِنِّي اتَيْتُكَ مُسْتَغْفِراً تَائِباً مِنْ ذُنُوبِي
segments.transliteration: wa inni ataytuka mustaghfiran ta'iban min dhunubi

translation.en: Here I am, before you, asking Allah’s forgiveness, repenting from my sins,

segments.arabic: وَإِنِّي اتَوَجَّهُ بِكَ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّي وَرَبِّكَ لِيَغْفِرَ لِي ذُنُوبِي
segments.transliteration: wa inni atawajjahu bika ila allahi rabbi wa rabbika liyaghfira li dhunubi

translation.en: and seeking your intercession for me before Almighty Allah—your and my Lord—that He may forgive my sins.

text.en:
If you have a certain request to pray Almighty Allah for granting it,
you may stand before the holy tomb and make it between your
shoulders, face the direction of kiblah, raise your hands, and pray for
the settlement of your need, for it is predictable that your need will be
settled, Allah willing.
Ibn Qawlawayh, through a considerable chain of authority, has
reported Muhammad ibn Mas’ud as saying that he, once, saw Imam
Ja’far al-Sadiq (‘a) coming near the tomb of the Holy Prophet(s),
putting his hand on it, and saying these words:
text.ar: فإن كانت لك حاجة فاجعل القبر الطاهر خلف كتفيك واستقبل القبلة وارفع يدك وسل حاجتك فإنه أحرى أن تقضى إن شاء الله تعالى. وروى ابن قولويه بسند معتبر عن محمد بن مسعود قال : رأيت الصادق عليه‌السلام انتهى إلى قبر النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله فوضع يده عليه وقال :

translation.en: I pray Allah -Who has chosen you, selected you,
guided you, and guided (others) through you-
to bless You.

segments.transliteration: inna allaha wa mala'ikatahu yusalluna `ala alnnabiyyi

translation.en: “Surely, Allah and His angels bless the Prophet;

segments.arabic: يَا ايُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ آمَنُوٱ صَلُّوٱ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوٱ تَسْلِيماً.»
segments.transliteration: ya ayyuha alladhina amanu sallu `alayhi wa sallumu tasliman

translation.en: O you who believe! Call for (Divine) blessings on him and salute him with a (becoming) salutation.”

text.en:
In Misbah al-Mutahajjid, Shaykh al-Tusi says: When you finish
praying near the tomb (of the Holy Prophet), you may come to the
minbar,( ) pass your hand over it, hold the two lower pommels, and
then rub your face and eyes, for this brings about eye healing. You
may then offer prayers there, praise and thank Almighty Allah, and
ask for the settlement of your needs. In this respect, the Holy Prophet
(s) is reported to have said, “The area between my tomb and my
minbar is one of the gardens of Paradise. My minbar is situated at one
of the gates of Paradise.” You may then come near the standing-place
of the Holy Prophet (maqam al-nabi) and offer as many prayers as
possible therein. You may also offer as many prayers as possible in
the Holy Prophet’s Mosque, for the reward of one prayer herein is
equal to the reward of one thousand prayers (offered at other places).
Whenever you enter or leave the Mosque, you may invoke Almighty
Allah’s blessings upon the Holy Prophet. You may also offer prayers
at the House of Lady Fatimah (‘a). You may also visit the standing-
place of Archangel Gabriel (maqam jibra’il), which lies under the
waterspout. At this very place, Archangel Gabriel used to stay after he
would ask permission of the Holy Prophet (s). At this place, you may
say the following:
text.ar: وقال الشيخ في (المصباح) فإذا فرغت من الدعاء عند القبر فأتِ المنبر وامسحه بيدك وخذ برمانتيه وهما السفلاوان وامسح وجهك وعينيك به فإن فيه شفاء للعين ، وقم عنده واحمد الله واثن عليه وسل حاجتك فإنَّ رسول الله صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله قال : ما بين قبري ومنبري روضة من رياض الجنة ، ومنبري على ترعة من ترع  الجنة. ثم تأتي مقام النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله فتصلي فيه ما بداً لك وأكثر الصلاة في مسجد النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله فإن الصلاة فيه بألف صلاة ، وإذا دخلت المسجد أو خرجت منه فصل على النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله ، وصل في بيت فاطمة عليها‌السلام وأتِ مقام جبرائيل عليه‌السلام وهو تحت الميزاب فإنّه كان مقامه إذا استأذن على الرسول صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله وقل :

translation.en: I beseech You, O All-magnanimous,
O All-generous,
O Nigh,
O Remote,
to renew Your boons to me.

text.en: Salwaat on Holy Prophet(saws)
Saturday ziyarat of Holy Prophet(saws)
ZIYARAT FROM DISTANCE (ALSO FOR 17TH RABBI UL AWWAL)
text.ar: زيارة النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله من البعد

text.en:
In his book of Zad al-Ma’ad, ‘Allamah al-Majlisi, within the
recommended acts on the seventeenth of Rabi’ al-Awwal; the Holy
Prophet’s birthday, says that Shaykh al-Mufid, Shaykh al-Shahid, and
Sayyid Ibn Tawus instructed the following:
When you intend to visit the Holy Prophet (s) while you are in any
place other than the holy city of al-Madinah, you may bathe yourself,
stand before something like a grave, write the name of the Holy
Prophet (s) on it, concentrate heartily on it, and say the following:
text.ar: قال العلامة المجلسي (رض) في (زاد المعاد) في أعمال عيد الميلاد ، وهو اليوم السابع عشر من ربيع الأول : قال الشيج المفيد والشهيد والسيّد ابن طاووس رحمهم‌الله : إذا أردت زيارة النبي صلى‌الله‌عليه‌وآله في ما عداً المدينة الطيبة من البلاد فاغتسل ومثل بين يديك شبه القبر واكتب عليه اسمه الشريف ثم قف وتوجه بقلبك إليه وقل :

segments.arabic: اشْهَدُ انْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu wahdahu la sharika lahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah, alone without having any associate,

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna muhammadan `abduhu wa rasuluhu

translation.en: and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger,
that he is the chief of the ancient and the coming generations,
and that he is the chief of all Prophets and Messengers.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ اهْلِ بَيْتِهِ ٱلائِمَةِ ٱلطَّيِّبِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `alayhi wa `alaahli baytihi al-a'immati alttayyibina

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings upon him and upon his Household—the Immaculate Imams.
Peace be upon you, O Messenger of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Friend of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Prophet of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Choice of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Mercy of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Well-Chosen by Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Most Beloved by Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Selected by Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Seal of the Prophets.
Peace be upon you, O Master of the Messengers.
Peace be upon you, O Maintainer of justice.
Peace be upon you, O introducer of goodliness.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَعْدِنَ ٱلوَحْيِ وَٱلتَّنْزِيلِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O core of Divine Inspiration and Revelation.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُبَلِّغاً عَنِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O conveyor on behalf of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O light-giving torch.
Peace be upon you, O conveyor of good tidings (to the believers).
Peace be upon you, O warner (against Allah’s chastisement).
Peace be upon you, O he who warns (against violating Allah’s commands).

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نُورَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يُسْتَضَاءُ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka yanura allahi alladhi yustada'u bihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s Light that spreads luminosity.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ اهْلِ بَيْتِكَ ٱلطَّيِّبِينَ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you and upon your Household—the pure, immaculate,
guides, and rightly guided.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ جَدِّكَ عَبْدِ ٱلْمُطَّلِبِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you and upon your grandfather, `Abd al-Muttalib,
and upon your father, `Abdullah.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ امِّكَ آمِنَةَ بِنْتِ وَهَبٍ

translation.en: peace be upon your mother, ªminah the daughter of Wahab.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ عَمِّكَ حَمْزَةَ سَيِّدِ ٱلشُّهَدَاءِ

translation.en: Peace be upon your (paternal) uncle, Hamzah, the master of martyrs.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ عَمِّكَ ٱلعَبَّاسِ بْنِ عَبْدِ ٱلْمُطَّلِبِ

translation.en: Peace be upon your uncle, al-`Abbas the son of `Abd al-Muttalib.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ عَمِّكَ وَكَفِيلِكَ ابِي طَالِبٍ

translation.en: Peace be upon your uncle and your guardian, Abu-Talib.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱبْنِ عَمِّكَ جَعْفَرٍ ٱلطَّيَّارِ فِي جِنَانِ ٱلْخُلْدِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alaibni `ammika ja`farin alttayyari fi jinani alkhuldi

translation.en: Peace be upon your cousin, Ja`far the flying in the gardens of the Paradise of Eternity.
Peace be upon you, O Muhammad (the praised).
Peace be upon you, O Ahmad (the more praised).

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ اللَّهِ عَلَىٰ ٱلاوَّلِينَ وَٱلآخِرِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Argument of Allah against the past and coming generations,
foremost to the obedience to the Lord of the worlds,
prevailing over His Messengers,
last of His Prophets,
witness over all His creatures,
interceder to Him,
firmly established with Him,
obeyed in His Kingdom,
winner of the most praised qualities,
holder of the most praised honors,
honored by the Lord,
addressee (by Almighty Allah) from behind the (Divine) Veils,
most advanced in position,
and unovertakable.
I greet you with the greeting of him who acknowledges your right (that is incumbent upon us),
who confesses of his shortcoming in carrying out his duty towards you,

segments.arabic: غَيْرِ مُنْكِرٍ مَا ٱنْتَهَىٰ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ

translation.en: who does not discuss your limitless virtues,
who is sure that you will have more rewards from your Lord,
who believes in the Book that was revealed to you,
who deems lawful all that which you deemed lawful,
and who deems unlawful all that which you deemed unlawful.

segments.arabic: اشْهَدُ يَا رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ مَعَ كُلِّ شَاهِدٍ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu yarasula allahi ma`a kulli shahidin

translation.en: O Messenger of Allah, I bear witness—and I join everyone who bears witness
and also bear witness rather than everyone who may deny it—
that you conveyed the messages of your Lord (flawlessly),
offered your nation good advice,
strove in the way of your Lord,
expounded openly what you were commanded to convey,
stood harm for the sake of Him,

segments.arabic: وَدَعَوْتَ إِلَىٰ سَبِيلِهِ بِٱلْحِكْمَةِ وَٱلْمَوْعِظَةِ ٱلْحَسَنَةِ ٱلْجَمِيلَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa da`awta ilasabilihi bilhikmati walmaw`izati alhasanati aljamilati

translation.en: called to the way of Him with excellent wisdom and fair exhortation,
fulfilled the duty with which you were commissioned,
you, verily, were compassionate to the believers,
strong against the unbelievers,

segments.arabic: وَعَبَدْتَ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصاً حَتَّىٰ اتَاكَ ٱليَقِينُ

translation.en: and you worshipped Allah sincerely until death came upon you.

segments.arabic: فَبَلَغَ ٱللَّهُ بِكَ اشْرَفَ مَحَلِّ ٱلْمُكَرَّمِينَ
segments.transliteration: fabalagha allahu bika ashrafa mahalli almukarramina

translation.en: Therefore, Almighty Allah has exalted you to the most honorable position of the ennobled ones,
to the most elevated place of the intimate servants of Him,

segments.arabic: وَارْفَعَ دَرَجَاتِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ حَيْثُ لاَ يَلْحَقُكَ لاَحِقٌ
segments.transliteration: wa arfa`a darajati almursalina haythu layalhaquka lahiqun

translation.en: and to the most exalted ranks of the Messengers where none can come up with you,
none can excel you,
none can overtake you,

segments.transliteration: wa la yatma`u fi idrakika tami`un

translation.en: and none can even think of obtaining your rank.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي ٱسْتَنْقَذَنَا بِكَ مِنَ ٱلْهَلَكَةِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi istanqadhanabika min alhalakati

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who saved us from perdition through you,
Who guided us off misdirection through you,
and Who lit our darkness through you.

segments.arabic: فَجَزَاكَ ٱللَّهُ يَا رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ مِنْ مَبْعُوثٍ افْضَلَ مَا جَازَىٰ نَبِيّاً عَنْ امَّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: fajazaka allahu yarasula allahi min mab`uthin afdala majazanabiyyan `an ummatihi

translation.en: O Messenger of Allah, may Allah reward you, for you are His envoy, with the best rewarding that He has ever conferred upon a prophet on behalf of his people
or a messenger on behalf of those to whom He has sent him.

segments.arabic: بِابِي انْتَ وَامِّي يَا رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ زُرْتُكَ عَارِفاً بِحَقِّكَ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi yarasula allahi zurtuka `arifan bihaqqika

translation.en: May Allah accept my father and my mother as ransoms for you, O Messenger of Allah. I am visiting you for I acknowledge your right (that is incumbent upon us),
I confess of your superiority,

segments.arabic: مُسْتَبْصِراً بِضَلالَةِ مَنْ خَالَفَكَ وَخَالَفَ اهْلَ بَيْتِكَ
segments.transliteration: mustabsiran bidalalati man khalafaka wa khalafa ahla baytika

translation.en: I know for sure about the straying off (from the right path) of those who dissent from you and from your Household,
and I admit the true guidance that you follow (and lead to).

segments.arabic: بِابِي انْتَ وَامِّي وَنَفْسِي وَاهْلِي وَمَالِي وَوَلَدِي
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi wa nafsi wa ahli wa mali wa waladi

translation.en: May Allah accept my father, my mother, me, my family, my property, and my sons as ransoms for you!

segments.arabic: انَا اصَلِّي عَلَيْكَ كَمَا صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ

translation.en: Let me invoke Almighty Allah’s blessings upon you in the same way as Allah did send blessings upon you

segments.transliteration: wa salla`alayka mala'ikatuhu wa anbiya'uhu wa rusuluhu

translation.en: and so did His angels, Prophets, and Messengers;
such blessings that are consecutive, abundant,

segments.arabic: لاَ ٱنْقِطَاعَ لَهَا وَلاَ امَدَ وَلاَ اجَلَ

translation.en: continuous, incessant, infinite, and unlimited.

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ اهْلِ بَيْتِكَ ٱلطَّيِّبِينَ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ كَمَا انْتُمْ اهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: sallaallahu `alayka wa `alaahli baytika alttayyibina alttahirina kamaantum ahluhu

translation.en: May Allah send blessings upon you and upon your Household, the pure and immaculate, as much as you deserve.

text.en:
You may then extend your hands (for supplicating) and say the
following:
text.ar: ثم ابسط كفّيك وَقل

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) make You complete blessings,
Your perfect benedictions,
Your most virtuous boons,
and Your most honorable greetings, salutations,
dignities, and mercy,
as well as the blessings of Your archangels,
your commissioned Prophets,
Your elite Imams,
Your righteous servants,
the inhabitants of the heavens and the earth,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ سَبَّحَ لَكَ يَا رَبَّ ٱلعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa man sabbaha laka ya rabba al`alamina

translation.en: and (the blessings of) everyone who glorified You, O Lord of the worlds,
from the past and the coming generations—
make all these pour forth upon Muhammad; Your servant, Your messenger,
Your witness, Your Prophet,
Your warner, Your trustee,
Your firmly established (in truth), Your confidante,
Your elite, Your most beloved,
Your friend, Your choice,
Your notable, Your elect,
Your well-chosen, Your mercy,
the best of Your created beings,
the Prophet of mercy,
the storer of forgiveness,
the leader to goodliness and blessing,

segments.transliteration: wa munqidhi al`ibadi mina alhalakati bi'idhnika

translation.en: the savior of the servants (of Almighty Allah) from perdition by Your permission,
the caller of them to Your religion,
the custodian by Your order,
the first Prophet to make the covenant,
and the last Prophet to be sent (to humanity),
whom You have immersed in the ocean of virtue,
in the lofty rank,
in the elevated level,
and in the exalted position;
and whom You entrusted in the pure loins
and moved to the immaculate wombs
out of Your kindness to him
and Your compassion to him.
In order to safeguard, to shield,
to protect, and to defend him,
You assigned, out of Your omnipotence, a protective lookout over him
to keep him from the impurities of adultery
and from the defects of fornication;
thus, You raised the sights of the servants through him
and revived the derelict lands

segments.arabic: بِانْ كَشَفْتَ عَنْ نُورِ وِلادَتِهِ ظُلَمَ ٱلاسْتَارِ
segments.transliteration: bi'an kashafta `an nuri wiladatihi zulama al-astari

translation.en: when You removed the screening murk by the light of his birth

segments.transliteration: wa albasta haramaka bihi hulala al-anwari

translation.en: and dressed Your Holy Precinct the garments of brightness through him.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا خَصَصْتَهُ بِشرَفِ هٰذِهِ ٱلْمَرْتَبَةِ ٱلكَرِيمَةِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakamakhasastahu bishrafi hadhihi almartabati alkarimati

translation.en: O Allah, as You have given him exclusively the honor of this noble rank
and the privilege of this great merit,
(please do) bless him for he fulfilled his covenant to You,
conveyed all Your messages,
fought against the infidels in order to prove Your Oneness,

segments.arabic: وَقَطَعَ رَحِمَ ٱلكُفْرِ فِي إِعْزَازِ دِينِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa qata`a rahima alkufri fi i`zazi dinika

translation.en: exterminated the womb of atheism in order to strengthen Your religion,

segments.arabic: وَلَبِسَ ثَوْبَ ٱلبَلْوَىٰ فِي مُجَاهَدَةِ اعْدَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa labisa thawba albalwa fi mujahadati a`da'ika

translation.en: and dressed himself the garb of misfortune in order to struggle against Your enemies.

segments.transliteration: wa awjabta lahu bikulli adhan massahu

translation.en: Hence, You have given him as recompense for any harm that inflicted him,
any trickery that he faced
from the faction who tried to assassinate him;
a merit that excels all other merits
and due to which he possessed Your abundant gifts.
In return, he hid his sadness,
concealed his grief,
swallowed the pang,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَتَخَطَّ مَا مَثَّلَ لَهُ وَحْيُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yatakhatta mamaththala lahu wahyuka

translation.en: and never did he violate the instructions of Your Revelation.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ اهْلِ بَيْتِهِ صَلاةً تَرْضَاهَا لَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `alayhi wa `alaahli baytihi salatan tardahalahum

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon him and his Household—blessings that You please for them,

segments.transliteration: wa balligh-hum minnatahiyyatan kathiratan wa salaman

translation.en: and convey our abundant greetings and compliments to him,

segments.arabic: وَآتِنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ فِي مُوَالاَتِهِمْ فَضْلاً وَإِحْسَاناً
segments.transliteration: wa atinamin ladunka fi muwalatihim fadlan wa ihsanan

translation.en: and give us - from You on account of our loyalty to them - favors, kindness,
mercy, and forgiveness.
Verily, You are the Lord of great favor.

text.en:
You may then offer a four unit prayer, each two alone, and recite
any Surah you want. At accomplishment, you may say the Tasbih al-
Zahra’ litany and then say the following:
text.ar: ثم صلّ أربع ركعات صلاة الزيارة بسلامين واقرأ فيها ما شئت من السور ، فإذا فرغت فسبح تسبيح الزهراء عليها‌السلام وقل :

translation.en: O Allah, You have said to Your Prophet Muhammad—
may Allah bless him and his Household:
“And had they, when they were unjust to themselves,
come to you and asked forgiveness of Allah
and the Messenger had (also) asked forgiveness for them,
they would have found Allah Oft-returning (to mercy), Merciful.”

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ احْضُرْ زَمَانَ رَسُولِكَ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: wa lam ahdur zamana rasulika `alayhi wa alihi alssalamu

translation.en: I was not present at the age of Your Messenger—peace be upon him and his Household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَقَدْ زُرْتُهُ رَاغِباً تَائِباً مِنْ سَيِّءِ عَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa qad zurtuhu raghiban ta'iban min sayyi'i `amali

translation.en: O Allah, I have visited him desiring, repenting from my ill deeds,
imploring forgiveness of my sins,

segments.arabic: وَمُقِرّاً لَكَ بِهَا وَانْتَ اعْلَمُ بِهَا مِنِّي
segments.transliteration: wa muqirran laka biha wa anta a`lamu bihaminni

translation.en: confessing of my having committed these sins although You know them more than I do,

segments.transliteration: wa mutawajjihan ilayka binabiyyika nabiyyi alrrahmati

translation.en: and turning my face towards You in the name of Your Prophet, the Prophet of Mercy—
may Your blessings be upon him and his Household.

segments.arabic: فَٱجْعَلْنِي ٱللَّهُمَّ بِمُحَمَّدٍ وَاهْلِ بَيْتِهِ عِنْدَكَ وَجِيهاً
segments.transliteration: faj`alni allahumma bimuhammadin wa ahli baytihi `indaka wajihan

translation.en: O Allah, in the name of Muhammad and his Household, (please do) make me illustrious
in this world as well as the Next World and one of those brought near to You.
O Muhammad!
O Messenger of Allah!
May Allah accept my father and mother as ransoms for you!
O Prophet of Allah!
O chief of all created beings of Allah!

segments.arabic: إِنِّي اتَوَجَّهُ بِكَ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّكَ وَرَبِّي
segments.transliteration: inni atawajjahu bika ilaallahi rabbika wa rabbi

translation.en: In Your name do I turn my face towards Allah, my and your Lord,
so that He may forgive my sins,
accept my deeds,
and settle my requests.

segments.arabic: فَكُنْ لِي شَفِيعاً عِنْدَ رَبِّكَ وَرَبِّي
segments.transliteration: fakun li shafi`an `inda rabbika wa rabbi

translation.en: Therefore, be my interceder before your and my Lord,
for my Lord, the Master, is the best besought
and You are the best interceder.
O Muhammad!
May peace be upon you and upon your Household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَاوْجِبْ لِي مِنْكَ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةَ وَٱلرَّحْمَةَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa awjib li minka almaghfirata walrrahmata

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) confer upon me with forgiveness, mercy,
and sustenance that is outgoing, good, and beneficial from Your Presence

segments.arabic: كَمَا اوْجَبْتَ لِمَنْ اتَىٰ نَبِيِّكَ مُحَمَّداً

translation.en: in the same way as You conferred upon him who came to Your Prophet, Muhammad, when he was alive,
may your blessings be upon him and his Household,

segments.transliteration: wa huwa hayyun fa'aqarra lahu bidhunubihi

translation.en: and confessed of his sins.
Thus, Your Messenger prayed You to forgive him.
May your blessings be upon him and his Household.

segments.arabic: فَغَفَرْتَ لَهُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا ارْحَمَ ٱلرَّاحِمِينَ

translation.en: And You did forgive him out of Your mercy, O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.transliteration: allahumma wa qad ammaltuka wa rajawtuka

translation.en: O Allah, I now put my hope in You, please You,
stand before You,
desire for You other than anyone else,
and hope for Your abundant reward
while I confess of my sins and I do not deny them,
I repent to You from whatever I have committed,
and I seek refuge with You from this position
against the deeds that I have committed

segments.arabic: ٱلَّتِي تَقَدَّمْتَ إِلَيَّ فِيهَا وَنَهَيْتَنِي عَنْهَا

translation.en: although You, firstly, had introduced them to me as prohibited, warned me against committing them,
and threatened me with Your punishment if I would violate.
And I seek shelter with the nobility of Your Face
lest You impose upon me the situation of disgrace and humility
on the day when the veils will be exposed,
the secrets and scandals will be disclosed,
and the muscles will writhe with fear;
on the day of regret and remorse,
the day of exposing the liars,
the day of the approaching doom,
the day of assembling,
the day of separation,
the day of punishment,

segments.arabic: يَوْماً كَانَ مِقْدَارُهُ خَمْسِينَ الْفَ سَنَةٍ
segments.transliteration: yawman kana miqdaruhu khamsina alfa sanatin

translation.en: the day the measure of which is fifty thousand years,
the day of the blowing,
the day on which the quaking land shall quake
followed by oft-repeated commotions,
the day of raising the dead,
the day of exposition before the Fire,
the day when all mankind stand before the Lord of the Worlds,
the day when a man flees from his brother,
his mother, his father,
his wife, and his children,

segments.transliteration: yawma tashaqqaqu al-ardu wa aknafu alssama'i

translation.en: the day when the earth and the sides of the heavens will split asunder,

segments.arabic: يَوْمَ تَاتِي كُلُّ نَفْسٍ تُجَادِلُ عَنْ نَفْسِهَا
segments.transliteration: yawma ta'ti kullu nafsin tujadilu `an nafsiha

translation.en: the day when every soul will come pleading for itself,

segments.arabic: يَوْمَ يُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ فَيُنَبِّئُهُمْ بِمَا عَمِلُوٱ

translation.en: the day when they will be relegated to Allah Who will inform them of what they did,

segments.arabic: يَوْمَ لاَ يُغْنِي مَوْلَىٰ عَنْ مَوْلَىٰ شَيْئاً

translation.en: the day when a friend can in naught avail his friend
nor can they be helped
save him on whom Allah will have mercy.
Lo! He is the Mighty, the Merciful,

segments.arabic: يَوْمَ يُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰ عَالِمِ ٱلغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَادَةِ

translation.en: the day when they will be returned to the Knower of the invisible and the visible,

segments.arabic: يَوْمَ يُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰ اللَّهِ مَوْلاهُمُ ٱلْحَقِّ

translation.en: the day when they will be restored to Allah, their Lord, the Just,
the day when they come forth from the graves in haste,
as racing to a goal
and as locusts spreading abroad,
hastening toward the Summoner—
to Allah,
the day of the event inevitable
when the earth will be shaken with a shock,
the day when the sky will become as molten copper
and the hills become as flakes of wool
and no familiar friend will ask a question of his friend,
the day of the witness and that whereunto he bears testimony,
and they day when the angels will come rank on rank.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱرْحَمْ مَوْقِفِي فِي ذٰلِكَ ٱليَوْمِ بِمَوْقِفِي فِي هٰذَا ٱليَوْمِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma irham mawqifi fi dhalika alyawmi bimawqifi fi hadhaalyawmi

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) have mercy upon my situation on that day (when I will be stopped for interrogation) for my current situation,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُخْزِنِي فِي ذٰلِكَ ٱلْمَوْقِفِ بِمَا جَنَيْتُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي
segments.transliteration: wa latukhzini fi dhalika almawqifi bimajanaytu `alanafsi

translation.en: and do not confound me at that situation for the wrongdoings that I have committed against myself.

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ يَا رَبِّ فِي ذٰلِكَ ٱليَوْمِ مَعَ اوْلِيَائِكَ مُنْطَلَقِي
segments.transliteration: waj`al ya rabbi fi dhalika alyawmi ma`a awliya'ika muntalaqi

translation.en: O my Lord, (please do) group me, on that day, with Your intimate servants,

segments.arabic: وَفِي زُمْرَةِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَاهْلِ بَيْتِهِ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ مَحْشَرِي
segments.transliteration: wa fi zumrati muhammadin wa ahli baytihi `alayhimu alssalamu mahshari

translation.en: include me with the company of Muhammad and his Household—peace be upon them—
make the Pond of him (i.e. the Holy Prophet) to be my arrival point,
make me a place among the honorable, white-forehead group,
and give me my Record (of deeds) in my right hand
so that I will succeed due to my rewards,
You will make my face white,
You will make easy for me my reckoning,
You will make my pan of the Scale (of deeds) outweigh,
and I will join the triumphant ones
among Your righteous servants
to Your Pleasure and gardens of Paradise.
O God of the Worlds!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ انْ تَفْضَحَنِي فِي ذٰلِكَ ٱليَوْمِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika min an tafdahani fi dhalika alyawmi

translation.en: O Allah, I do seek Your protection lest You may expose me on that day
in the presence of Your creatures because of my sins,

segments.arabic: او انْ الْقَىٰ ٱلْخِزْيَ وَٱلنَّدَامَةَ بِخَطِيئَتِي

translation.en: or I may encounter disgrace and regret due to my wrongdoings,

segments.arabic: اوْ انْ تُظْهِرَ فِيهِ سَيِّئَاتِي عَلَىٰ حَسَنَاتِي

translation.en: or You may make my evildoings outweigh my good deeds,

segments.arabic: اوْ انْ تُنَوِّهَ بَيْنَ ٱلْخَلاَئِقِ بِٱسْمِي
segments.transliteration: aw an tunawwiha bayna alkhala'iqi bismi

translation.en: or You may declare my name as loser amongst Your creatures.
O All-generous, O All-generous,
(I beg You for) pardon, (I beg You for) pardon,
(I beg You for) covering (my evildoings), (I beg You for) covering (my evildoings).

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَاعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ انْ يَكُونَ فِي ذٰلِكَ ٱليَوْمِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa a`udhu bika min an yakuna fi dhalika alyawmi

translation.en: O Allah, I also seek Your protection against including me, on that day,
with the line of the evils
or add me to the row of the wretched ones.
When You shall distinguish between Your creatures
and drive each group –according to their deeds-
to their final abodes in groups,
(please do) line me up, in the name of Your mercy, with the group of Your righteous servants,
and drive me with the group of the Your pious, intimate servants
to the gardens of Your Paradise, O Lord of the Worlds!

text.en:
You may then bid farewell (wada’) to the Holy Prophet (s) and say
the following:
text.ar: ثم ودعه وقل :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Messenger of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O conveyor of good tidings (to the believers) and warner (against Allah’s chastisement).
Peace be upon you, O light-giving torch.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ ايُّهَا ٱلسَّفِيرُ بَيْنَ ٱللَّهِ وَبَيْنَ خَلْقِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ayyuhaalssafiru bayna allahi wa bayna khalqihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O intercessor between Allah and His creatures.

segments.arabic: اشْهَدُ يَا رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ انَّكَ كُنْتَ نُوراً فِي ٱلاصْلاَبِ ٱلشَّامِخَةِ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu yarasula allahi annaka kunta nuran fi al-aslabi alshshamikhati

translation.en: I bear witness, O Messenger of Allah, that You were light in the lofty loins
and purified wombs.
The ignorance could not stain you with its impurities
