segments.transliteration: wa lam tulbiska min mudlahimmati thiyabiha

translation.en: or dress you its gloomy garbs.

segments.arabic: وَاشْهَدُ يَا رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ انِّي مُؤْمِنٌ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu yarasula allahi anni mu'minun bika

translation.en: I also bear witness, O Messenger of Allah, that I have faith in you
and in the Imams from your Household,
and I believe in all that which you have brought,
satisfactorily and faithfully.

segments.arabic: وَاشْهَدُ انَّ ٱلائِمَّةَ مِنْ اهْلِ بَيْتِكَ اعْلامُ ٱلْهُدَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu ann al-a'immata min ahli baytika a`lamu alhuda

translation.en: And I bear witness that the Imams from your Household are the signs of (true) guidance,
the Firmest Handle,
and the arguments against the inhabitants in this world.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ لاَ تَجْعَلْهُ آخِرَ ٱلعَهْدِ مِنْ زِيَارَةِ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma lataj`alhu akhira al`ahdi min ziyarati nabiyyika

translation.en: O Allah, (please) do not make it the last of my pilgrimage to (the tomb of) Your Prophet—
peace be upon him and his Household.

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ تَوَفَّيْتَنِي فَإِنِّي اشْهَدُ فِي مَمَاتِي
segments.transliteration: wa in tawaffaytani fa'inni ashhadu fi mamati

translation.en: If you decide to grasp my soul, I will bear witness in my death,

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ مَا اشْهَدُ عَلَيْهِ فِي حَيَاتِي

translation.en: as same as I have born witness in my lifetime,

segments.arabic: انَّكَ انْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ انْتَ

translation.en: that Your are verily Allah; there is no god save You,
alone without having any associate,
that Muhammad is Your servant and Messenger,

segments.arabic: وَانَّ ٱلائِمَّةَ مِنْ اهْلِ بَيْتِهِ اوْلِيَاؤُكَ وَانْصَارُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa anna al-a'immata min ahli baytihi awliya'uka wa ansaruka

translation.en: and that the Imams from his Household are Your intimate servants, Your supporters,
Your Arguments against Your creatures,
Your representatives amongst Your servants,
Your sings in Your lands,
the custodians of Your knowledge,
the keepers of Your secret,
and the interpreters of Your Revelation.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wa balligh ruha nabiyyika muhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: and convey to the souls of Your Prophet, Muhammad, and his Household,

segments.arabic: فِي سَاعَتِي هٰذِهِ وَفِي كُلِّ سَاعَةٍ
segments.transliteration: fi sa`ati hadhihi wa fi kulli sa`atin

translation.en: at this very hour as well as all times,
greetings and compliments from me.

segments.arabic: وَٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayka yarasula allahi wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: O Messenger of Allah, peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: لاَ جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ آخِرَ تَسْلِيمِي عَلَيْكَ

translation.en: Allah may not decide this compliment of me to be the last.

text.en:
While standing in the area between the Holy Prophet’s tomb and
minbar (i.e. Garden of Paradise – Rawzah), you may visit the tomb of
Lady Fatimah al-Zahra’ (‘a).
There is disagreement about the place of the tomb of Lady Fatimah
(‘a); some say that she was buried in the Rawzah. Others say that she
was buried at her house. Others say that she was buried in the Baqi’
Cemetery.
However, the majority of our scholars agree that she must be
visited from the Rawzah, although to visit her at these three places is
more preferable. When you stand for the ziyarah of Lady Fatimah al-Zahra’’s tomb,
you may say the following:
text.ar: زر فاطمة عليها‌السلام من عند الروضة : واختلف في موضع قبرها فقال قوم هي مدفونة في الروضة أي ما بين القبر والمنبر ، وقال آخرون في بيتها ، وقالت فرقة ثالثة : إنها مدفونة بالبقيع. والذي عليه أكثر أصحابنا أنها تزار من عند الروضة ومن زارها في هذه الثلاثة مواضع كان أفضل. وإذا وقفت عليها للزيارة فقل :

translation.en: O carefully examined (lady):
Allah Who created you had tried you
before He created you (for this worldly life),
and thus He found you successfully enduring in that trial.
We claim being loyalists to you, believers in you,

segments.arabic: وَصَابِرُونَ لِكُلِّ مَا اتَانَا بِهِ ابُوكِ

translation.en: and tolerant as regards all that which has been conveyed to us by your father,
peace of Allah be upon him and his Household,
and all that which his Successor has brought to us.
We, thus, ask you, if we have really believed you,
that you may include us with those who believe in both of them (i.e. the Holy Prophet and Imam `Ali),

segments.arabic: لِنُبَشِّرَ انْفُسَنَا بِانَّا قَدْ طَهُرْنَا بِوِلايَتِكِ

translation.en: so that we may feel happy that we have been purified on account of our loyalty to you.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Messenger of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Prophet of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ حَبِيبِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the most beloved of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ خَلِيلِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Intimate Servant of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ صَفيِّ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Choice of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ امِينِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the Trustee of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ خَيْرِ خَلْقِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayki ya binta khayri khalqi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the best of Allah’s creatures.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ افْضَلِ انْبِيَاءِ ٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِ وَمَلاَئِكَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayki ya binta afdali anbiya'i allahi wa rusulihi wa mala'ikatihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the best of Allah’s Prophets, Messengers, and angels.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ خَيْرِ ٱلْبَرِّيَةِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O daughter of the best of all created beings.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا سِيِّدَةَ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O doyenne of all women of the world,
including the past and the coming generations.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا زَوْجَةَ وَلِيِّ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O lady of the Intimate Servant of Allah

segments.transliteration: wa khayri alkhalqi ba`da rasuli allahi

translation.en: and the best of all created beings after the Messenger of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا امَّ ٱلْحَسَنِ وَٱلْحُسَيْنِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O mother of al-Hasan and al-Husayn,
the two chiefs of the youth of Paradise.
Peace be upon you, O veracious and martyr.
Peace be upon you, O content and pleased.
Peace be upon you, O virtuous and pure.
Peace be upon you, O Paradisiacal human being.
Peace be upon you, O pious and immaculate.
Peace be upon you, O one talked by the angels, O knowledgeable.
Peace be upon you, O oppressed lady whose right was usurped.
Peace be upon you, O persecuted and maltreated.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا فَاطِمَةُ بِنْتَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayki ya fatimatu binta rasuli allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Fatimah the daughter of the Messenger of Allah.
So be upon you the mercy and blessings of Allah.
May Allah bless you,
your soul, and your body.

segments.arabic: اشْهَدُ انَّكِ مَضَيْتِ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٍ مِنْ رَبِّكِ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaki madayti `ala bayyinatin min rabbiki

translation.en: I bear witness that you have spent your life with full awareness of your duty towards your Lord

segments.arabic: وَانَّ مَنْ سَرَّكِ فَقَدْ سَرَّ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa anna man sarraki faqad sarra rasula allahi

translation.en: and (I bear witness) that he who pleases you will have pleased the Messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.transliteration: wa man jafaki faqad jafa rasula allahi

translation.en: and he who displeases you will have displeased the Messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ آذَاكِ فَقَدْ آذَىٰ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa man adhaki faqad adha rasula allahi

translation.en: and he who harms you will have harmed the Messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ وَصَلَكِ فَقَدْ وَصَلَ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa man wasalaki faqad wasala rasula allahi

translation.en: and he who respects you will have respected the Messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ قَطَعَكِ فَقَدْ قَطَعَ رَسُولَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa man qata`aki faqad qata`a rasula allahi

translation.en: and he who disrespects you will have disrespected the messenger of Allah,
peace be upon him and his Household.
This is because you are an inseparable part of him (i.e. the Holy Prophet),
and you are his soul with which he lives.

segments.transliteration: ushhidu allaha wa rusulahu wa mala'ikatahu

translation.en: I ask Allah, His Messengers, and His angels to be the witnesses
that I am verily pleased with him whomever you accept,
I am displeased with him whomever you detest,
I disavow him whomever you disavow,
I am loyal to him whomever you support,
I am the enemy of him whomever you betake as enemy,
I am hateful to him whomever you hate,
and I like him whomever you like.

segments.transliteration: wa kafa billahi shahidan wa hasiban

translation.en: Verily, Allah is Sufficient as Witness, Reckoner,
Punisher, and Rewarder.

text.en: Ziyarat on Martyrdom date
text.ar: اليوم الثالث من الشهر سنة إحدى عشرة توفيت فاطمة صلوات الله عليها

text.en: Ziyarah has been mentioned by the son of Sayyid Ibn Tawus in his book entitled  ‘Zawa'id al-Fawaid ‘adding that it is dedicated to the day of Lady Fatimah’s demise, He adds that the method of saying this Ziyarah is to begin with offering the Ziyarah Prayer  which is a  two unit prayer at each of which Surah al-Fatihah is recited once and Surah al-Tawhid repeated sixty times if possible, otherwise Surah al-Fatihah and Surah al-Tawhid are recited in the first unit and Surah al-Fatihah and Surah al-Kafirun in the second. After this prayer this Ziyarah is recited.
text.ar: فينبغي أن يقيم الشيعة عزاءها ويزوروها ويلعنوا ظالميها وغاصبي حقها وان السيد ابن طاووس في (الاقبال) قد ذكر وفاتها في هذا اليوم ثم ذكر لها هذه الزيارة :

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا سَيِّدَةَ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O doyenne of the women of the world!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا وَالِدَةَ ٱلْحُجَجِ عَلَىٰ ٱلنَّاسِ اجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayki ya walidata alhujaji `ala alnnasi ajma`ina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O mother of the Arguments on all people!

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ ايّتُهَا ٱلْمَظْلُومَةُ ٱلْمَمْنُوعَةُ حَقَّهَا

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O wronged one whose right was usurped.
O Allah, send blessings to Your lady servant,

segments.transliteration: wabnati nabiyyika wa zawjati wasiyyi nabiyyika

translation.en: the daughter of Your Prophet, the wife of the Successor of Your Prophet—

segments.arabic: صَلاَةً تُزْلِفُهَا فَوْقَ زُلْفَىٰ عِبَادِكَ ٱلْمُكَرَّمِينَ

translation.en: such remarkable blessings that approach her nearer to You than the steps of Your honored servants

segments.transliteration: min ahli alssamawati wa ahli al-aradina

translation.en: among the inhabitants of the heavens and the earth.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ

translation.en: Peace be on you, O son of the Messenger of the Lord of the Worlds!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ امِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be on you, O son of the Commander of the Believers!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ

translation.en: Peace be on you, O son of Fatimah, the luminous lady!
Peace be on you, O beloved of Allah!
Peace be on you, O choice of Allah!
Peace be on you, O trustee of Allah!
Peace be on you, O Argument of Allah!
Peace be on you, O Light of Allah!
Peace be on you, O Path of Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَيَانَ حُكْمِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be on you, O elucidation of the rule of Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نَاصِرَ دِينِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be on you, O supporter of the religion of Allah!
Peace be on you, O pure master!
Peace be on you, O self-righteous and truthful!
Peace be on you, O practiser (of God’s commands) and trustee!
Peace be on you, O well-experienced in the interpretation (of the Qur'an)!
Peace be on you, O guide and well-guided!
Peace be on you, O immaculate and pure!
Peace be on you, O pious and infallible!
Peace be on you, O veritable truth!
Peace be on you, O martyr and veracious!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ابَا مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلْحَسَنَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: Peace be on you, O Abu-Muhammad al-Hasan, the son of `Ali!
Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you!

text.en: Permission to Enter- Izn e Dukhool
text.ar: إذن دخول

segments.arabic: يَا مَوَالِيَّ يَا ابْنَاءَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: ya mawaliyya ya abna'a rasuli allahi

translation.en: O my masters, sons of the Messenger of Allah,
I—your servant and the son of your maid
who stand submissively before you,
who is worth nothing in comparison with your elevated esteem,
and who admits your right (that is incumbent upon us)—
have come to you, seeking your shelter,
heading for your sanctuary,
seeking nearness to Your statuses,
and beseeching Allah in your names.
May I enter, O my masters?
May I enter, O intimate servants of Allah?

segments.arabic: اادْخُلُ يَا مَلاَئِكَةَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُحْدِقينَ بِهٰذَا ٱلْحَرَمِ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mala'ikata allahi almuhdiqina bihadha alharami

translation.en: May I enter, O Allah’s angels who surround this sanctuary
and reside in this shrine?

text.en: After you attain reverence, submission, and tenderheartedness, you may enter the shrine with your right foot, and say the following:
text.ar: وادخل بعد الخشوع والخضوع ورقة القلب وقدِّم رجلك اليُمنى وقل :

translation.en: Allah is greatly the Greatest.
All praise be to Allah abundantly.

segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi bukratan wa asilan

translation.en: Glory be to Allah in morns and eves.
All praise be to Allah, the Single, the Absolute,
the Glorious, the One and Only,
the All-obliging, the All-benefactor,
the Donor, the All-compassionate,
Who conferred (upon us) with His bequests,
Who has made easy for me to visit my masters out of His beneficence,
Who has not included me with those who are prevented from visiting them;
rather, He has bestowed upon me and donated me (this favor).

text.en: You may then move toward their tombs, face them, turn the back to the kiblah direction, and say the following:
text.ar: ثم اقترب من قبورهم المقدَّسة واستقبلها واستدبر القبلة وقل :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Leaders of true guidance.
Peace be upon you, O people of piety.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ ايُّهَا ٱلْحُجَجُ عَلَىٰ اهْلِ ٱلدُّنْيَا

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Arguments against the inhabitants of this world.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ ايُّهَا ٱلْقُوَّامُ فِي ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ بِٱلْقِسْطِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alaykum ayyuha alquwwamu fi albariyyati bilqisti

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O maintainers of justice on people.
Peace be upon you, O choicest people.
Peace be upon you, O members of the Household of Allah’s Messenger.
Peace be upon you, O people of confidential talks (of the angels).

segments.transliteration: ashhadu annakum qad ballaghtum wa nasahtum

translation.en: I bear witness that you did convey, offer advice,
endure for the sake of Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa kudhdhibtum wa usi'a ilaykum faghafartum

translation.en: and forgive when you were belied and maltreated.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annakumu al-a'immatu alrrashiduna almuhtaduna

translation.en: I also bear witness that you are the orthodox, well-guided Leaders,
that the obedience to you is obligatory,
that your words are true,
that you had called (to Allah) but you were not answered,
that you had enjoined (the right) but you were not obeyed,

segments.transliteration: wa annakum da`a'imu alddini wa arkanu al-ardi

translation.en: and that you are the supports of the religion and the poses of the earth.
You were always under the sight of Allah
Who moved you from the loins of purified men
to the wombs of purified women.
The benighted ignorance could not stain you

segments.transliteration: wa lam tashrak fikum fitanu al-ahwa'i

translation.en: and the whimsical sedition could not attract you.
Pleased be you as your origin has been pleased.
The King of the religion has conferred upon us with the grace of our acknowledgment of you;
He therefore caused you to be in houses
which He (i.e. Allah) has permitted to be exalted
and that His Name may be mentioned therein,
and He has decided our invocations of blessings upon you
to be mercy on us and to be granting remission of our sins.
Allah has chosen you for us

segments.arabic: وَطَيَّبَ خَلْقَنَا بِمَا مَنَّ عَلَيْنَا مِنْ وِلاَيَتِكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa tayyaba khalqana bima manna `alayna min wilayatikum

translation.en: and has purified our creation through the grace of our loyalty to your (Divinely commissioned) Leadership with which He has conferred upon us.
We have thus become nominated with Him due to our acknowledgement of you
and our giving credence to you.

segments.transliteration: wa hadha maqamu man asrafa wa akhta'a

translation.en: So, this is the situation of him who has committed mistakes and sins,
shown submission (to you), and confessed of what he had committed.
Hence, being in this situation, I hope for redemption

segments.arabic: وَانْ يَسْتَنْقِذَهُ بِكُمْ مُسْتَنْقِذُ ٱلْهَلْكَىٰ مِنَ ٱلرَّدَىٰ

translation.en: and I hope that the Savior of the perishing ones from perdition may save me in your names.
So, (please) be my interceders,
for I have come to you
when the people of this world abandoned you,
took the Signs of Allah for a jest,
and turned away from them haughtily.

text.en: You may then raise your head toward the sky and say the following:
text.ar: ثم ارفع هنا رأسك إلى السماء وقل :

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ قَائِمٌ لاَ يَسْهُو
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa qa'imun la yashu

translation.en: O He Who is Self-Subsisting and never forgets,
Who is Ever-living and never becomes heedless,
and Who encompasses all things!
To You is all gratitude for that You have guided me (to this)
and You have introduced to me that on which I rest,
when Your servants diverted from it,
ignored the recognition of it,
belittled its right,
and inclined to elsewhere.
Hence, You have conferred upon me with this favor

segments.arabic: مَعَ اقْوَامٍ خَصَصْتَهُمْ بِمَا خَصَصْتَنِي بِهِ
segments.transliteration: ma`a aqwamin khasastahum bima khasastani bihi

translation.en: as well as upon other people whom You have granted exclusively the same.
So, all praise be to You, for I have been
mentioned and written with You due to the situation in which I am now.
Hence, (please) do not deprive me of what I long for,

segments.transliteration: wa la tukhayyibni fi ma da`awtu

translation.en: and do not disappoint me as regards my supplication;
(please do so) in the name of the sanctity of Muhammad and his immaculate Household.

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: May Allah send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

text.en: You may now pray Almighty Allah for anything you want.
text.ar: ثم ادع لنفسك بما تريد.

text.en: In Tahdhib al-Ahkam, Shaykh al-Tusi says: You may then offer the Ziyarah Prayer (salat al-ziyarah) in eight units; each two units are for one of the (four) Imams.
text.ar: وقال الطوسي (رض) في (التهذيب) ثم صل صلاة الزيارة ثماني ركعات أي صلِّ لكل إمام ركعتين.

text.en: Shaykh al-Tusi and Sayyid Ibn Tawus say that if you want to bid farewell to the four Imams, you may say the following:
text.ar: وقال الشيخ الطوسي والسيد ابن طاووس : إذا أردت أن تودعهم عليهم‌السلام فقل :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ ائِمَّةَ ٱلْهُدَىٰ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alaykum a'immata alhuda wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you, O leaders to the true guidance.
I entrust you with Allah([1]) and send salutations to you.
We believe in Allah and in the Messenger

segments.transliteration: wa bima ji'tum bihi wa dalaltum `alayhi

translation.en: and in that which you have conveyed and that to which you have guided.
O Allah, then write us down among those who bear witness.

text.en: You may then supplicate Almighty Allah as earnestly as possible and pray Him to grant you another opportunity to visit these holy tombs.
text.ar: ثم أكثر من الدعاء وسل الله العود وأن لا تكون هذه آخر عهدك من زيارتهم.

text.en: Ziarat of Imam Sajjad (as)
text.ar: زيارة الإمام السجّاد عليه السلام

translation.en: Peace be on you, O leader of Those who prostrate!
Peace be on you, O prestige of Worshipping ones!
Peace be on you, O participant Of unhappiness and sadness!
Peace be on you, O the Imam, Who got sores on spots which Touched during sijda!
Peace be on you, O one who Wept and mourned!
Peace be on you, one who was Captive of hardships!

segments.arabic: السلام عليك يا أعظم آل العباء
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa aadama aalil e’baae

translation.en: Peace be on you, O one from The great worshippers!

segments.arabic: السلام عليك يا ابن خامس أصحاب أهل الكساء
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yabna khaamese ahlil kesaae..

translation.en: Peace be on you , O the son of The fifth of the people of the Cloak (Husayn)

segments.arabic: السلام عليك يا ابن سيد الشهداء

translation.en: Peace be on you, O son of the Leader of the martyrs!
Peace be on you , O support of Pious ones!

segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka wa rahmatullaahe wa barakaatohu..

translation.en: Peace be on you, and Allah’s Blessings and bounties on you!

text.en: Another ziarat
text.ar: زيارة أخرى

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا قُرَّةَ عَيْنِ النَّاظِرِينَ العَارِفِينَ
السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَازِنَ وَصَايَا المُرْسَلِينَ,
السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ذُخْرَ المُتَعَبِّدِينَ السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مِصْبَاحَ العَالَمِينَ,
السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلايَ يَا أَبَا مُحَمِّدٍ,
أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ قَدْ عَبَدْتَ اللَّهَ حَقَّ عِبَادَتِهِ,
وَأَطَعْتَهُ حَقَّ طَاعَتِهِ حَتَّى أَتَاكَ اليَقِينُ,
فَعَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلايَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ أَفْضَلُ التَّحِيَّةِ,

text.en: Another ziarat
text.ar: زيارة أخرى

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَیْکَ یَا کَہْفَ التُّقیٰ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَیْکَ یَا قَائِدَ اَہْلِ التَّقْویٰ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَیْکَ یَا بَاقِرَ عَلْمِ النَّبِیِّیْنَ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَیْکَ یَا زَیْنَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالْاَرْضِیْنَ
اَللّٰہُمَّ کَمَا جَعَلْتَہٗ عَلَماً لِعِبَادِکَ وَ مُسْتَوْدَعاً لِحِلْمِکَ وَ مُتَرْجِماً لِوَحْیِکَ
فَصَلِّ عَلَیْہِ اَفْضَلَ مَا صَلَّیْتَ عَلیٰ اَحَدٍ مِّنْ ذُرِّیَّۃِ اَنْبِیَائِکَ وَ اَصْفِیَائِکَ وَ رُسُلِکَ وَ اُمَنَائِکَ یَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِیْنَ۔

translation.en: Peace be on you, O Imam of Sound advice!
Peace be on you, O moon in Darkness !
Peace be on you, O shelter Of piety!

segments.arabic: السلام عليك يا قائد أهل التقوى
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa qaaeda ahlit taqwaa

translation.en: Peace be on you, O leader of Pious ones!

segments.arabic: السلام عليك يا باقر علم النبيين
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa baaqera i’lmin nabiyyeena

translation.en: Peace be on you, O revealer Of the knowledge of Prophets!

segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa zainas samaawaate wal arazeena

translation.en: Peace be on you, O prestige Of the skies& the earths!
O Allah! In The same way as You made Him as the protector of Your beings

segments.transliteration: lee’baadeka wa mustawda-a’n lehilmeka wa motarjeman

translation.en: and the Trustee of Your tolerance And the translator of Your messages,

segments.arabic: لوحيك فصلي عليه أفضل ما صليت
segments.transliteration: le wahyeka fasalle alaihe afzala maa sallayyta..

translation.en: Send the Choicest blessings on him-blessings sent by You

segments.arabic: على أحد من ذرية أنبيائك وأصفيائك
segments.transliteration: a’la ahadim min zurriyate ambeyaaeka wa asfeyaaeka..

translation.en: On the descendants of Your Prophets and on Your select Beings &

segments.transliteration: wa rosoleka wa omanaaeka yaa rabbal a’alameen ..

translation.en: on Your Apostles and on Your trustees. O Lord of the Worlds!

text.en: Another ziarat
text.ar: زیارة أخری

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad the son of`Ali
the splitter of knowledge, the leader to true guidance,
the chief of the people of piety,
and the superbly selected from among Your servants.
O Allah, as You have made him sign for Your servants,
lantern in Your lands,
depot of Your wisdom,
and interpreter of Your revelations,
and You ordered (us) to obey him,
warned (us) against disobeying him;
so also (please), O Lord, send blessings upon him
with the most excellent blessings that You have ever sent upon any
of the offspring of Your Prophets, Elite Ones,
Messengers, and trustees.
O Lord of the worlds!
All glory be to Allah,
all praise be to Allah,
there is no god save Allah,
and Allah is the Greatest.
O Allah, I beseech You,
O Indulgent, Forbearing,
Forgiving, and Loving-kind,

segments.arabic: انْ تَتَجَاوَزَ عَنْ سَيِّئَاتِي وَمَا عِنْدِي

translation.en: to overlook my sins and what I have had,
out of the excellence of what You have,

segments.arabic: وَانْ تُعْطِيَنِي مِنْ عَطَائِكَ مَا يَسَعُنِي

translation.en: to give me, out of Your giving, that which suffices me,
to inspire me to act upon what You have given me;
that is to obey You and to obey Your Messenger,
and to give me part of Your pardon
so much so that I ought to have Your honoring.
O Allah, (please) grant me that which befits You

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَفْعَلْ بِي مَا انَا اهْلُهُ

translation.en: and do not do to me that which I deserve.
Verily, I exist through You

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ اصِبْ خَيْراً قَطُّ إِلاَّ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lam usib khayran qattu illaminka

translation.en: and I have never been given any good thing from any source except You.
O He Who is the best Seer of all those who can see!
O He Who is the best Hearer of all those who can hear!
O He Who is the Justest of all those who judge!
O He Who aids those who seek His aid!
O He Who responds to the prayer of the oppressed!
Send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

text.en: Another ziarat
text.ar: زیارة أخری

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا البَاقِرُ لِعِلْمِ اللَّهِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O one who opened the knowledge of Allah!

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا الفَاحِصُ عَنْ دِينِ اللَّهِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O one who denotes the religion of Allah!

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا المُبَيِّنُ لِحُكْمِ اللَّهِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O one who demonstrates the laws of Allah!

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا القَائِمُ بِقسْطِ اللَّهِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O one who maintains the justice of Allah!

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا النَّاصِحُ لِعبَادِ اللَّهِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O one who sincerely advises the servants of Allah!

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا الدَّاعِي إِلَى اللَّهِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O one who calls to Allah!

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا الدَّلِيلُ إِلَى اللَّهِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O one who guides to Allah!
Peace be upon you; O evident grace!
Peace be upon you; O glaring light!
Peace be upon you; O brilliant full moon!
Peace be upon you; O palpable truth!
Peace be upon you; O shining lantern!
Peace be upon you; O luminous star!
Peace be upon you; O dazzling celestial body!

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا المُنَزَّهُ عَنِ المُعْضِلاتِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O one protected !

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا المَعْصُومُ مِنَ الَزَّلاتِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O one protected against slips!

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا الزَّكِيُّ في الحَسَبِ .

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O one of immaculate lineage!

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا الرَّفِيعُ في النَّسَبِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O one of lofty roots!
Peace be upon you; O benevolent Imam
Peace be upon you O fortress?

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ اللَّهِ عَلَى الخَلْقِ أَجْمَعِينَ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O Allah's proof against all of His creatures!

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ يَا مَوْلايَ أَنَّكَ قَدْ صَدَعْتَ الحَقَّ صَدْعاً،

translation.en: bear witness, O my master, that you verily expounded the right openly,
and split the knowledge with thorough splitting,
and dispersed it scatteredly!

segments.arabic: لَمْ تَأَخُذْكَ فِي اللَّهِ لَوْمَةُ لائِمٍ،

translation.en: In the way of Allah, you were not taken by the blame of any blamer!
and You established the religion of Allah
and fulfilled what had been incumbent upon you,

segments.arabic: وَأَخْرَجْتَ أَوْلِيَاءَكَ مِنْ وِلايَةِ غَيْرِ اللَّهِ إِلى وِلايَةِ اللََّهِ ،

translation.en: and took your followers out of the loyalty to other than Allah to the loyalty to Allah,
and you enjoined obedience to Allah,
and you forbade disobedience to Allah,
Until He took you to His pleasure
and moved you to the abode of His honouring
and to the houses of His elite ones
and to the vicinity of His intimate servants
Peace and Allah's mercy and blessings be upon you.

text.en: First Ziarat
text.ar: زیارة الاول

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O veracious leader!
Peace be upon you; O speaking successor!
Peace be upon you; O excellent splitter (of knowledge)!
Peace be upon you; O greatest peak!
Peace be upon you; O straightest path!
Peace be upon you; O key to all goodness!
Peace be upon you O he who is lantern in darkness
Peace be upon you; O he who wards off unsolvable problems!
Peace be upon you; O essence of blessings!

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَیْكَ یَا صَاحِبَ الحُجَجِ وَالدَّلالاتِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O owner of (irrefutable) proofs and signs!

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَیْكَ یَا صَاحِبَ البَرَاهِینِ الوَاضِحَاتِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O owner of clear-cut points of evidence!

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَیْكَ یَا نَاصِرَ دِینِ اللَّهِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O supporter of Allah’s religion!

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَیْكَ یَا نَاشِرَ حُكْمِ اللَّهِ.

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O promoter of Allah’s laws!
Peace be upon you; O decider of all speeches!
Peace be upon you; O reliever of agonies!
Peace be upon you; O head of the veracious ones!
Peace be upon you; O spokesman of all speakers!
Peace be upon you; O inheritor of the Foremost Ones!
Peace be upon you; O chief of the veracious ones!
Peace be upon you; O master of Muslims!
Peace be upon you; O haven of the believers!
Peace be upon you; O guide of the misleaders!
Peace be upon you; O center of the obedient ones!

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ یَا مَوْلایَ أَنَّكَ عَلَمُ الهُدَى،

translation.en: I bear witness, O my master, that you are verily the sign of true guidance,
And the firmest handle, and the sunlight of forenoon,

segments.transliteration: Wa bahru alnnada wa kahfu alwara walmathalu al-a `la

translation.en: and the ocean of Generosity,and the haven of created beings, and the most supreme ideal.
May Allah bless your soul and body…

segments.arabic: عَمِّ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَیْهِ
segments.transliteration: ami rasuli allahi salay allahu alayhi

text.en: Another Short Ziarat
text.ar: زیارة أخری

translation.en: Peace Be On You, O Imam Of The World!
Peace Be On You O Secure AndLasting Link Of Allah!

segments.arabic: السلام عليك يا حبل الله المتين

translation.en: Peace Be On You, O Strong Rope Of Allah!
Peace Be On You, O The Bright Light Of Allah!
Peace Be On You, O The Truthful

segments.arabic: جعفر بن محمد خازن العلم الداعي

translation.en: Ja’Far Son Of Mohammad, Treasurer Of Allah’S Knowledge,
O True Inviter Of People Towards Allah!

segments.arabic: اللهم كما جعلته معدن كلامك ووحيك وخازن علمك
segments.transliteration: Allahumma Kamaa Jaa’Ltahoo Ma’Dena Kalaameka Wa Wahyeka Wa Khazena I’Lmeka

translation.en: O Allah! In The Same Way As You Have Made Him The Mine Of Your Words And Of Your Messages And The Treasurer Of Your Knowledge,

segments.transliteration: Wa Lesaana Tawheedeka Wa Waliyya Amreka

translation.en: And Give Him The Language Of Your Oneness, The Ownership Of Your Realm

segments.transliteration: Wa Mustahfeza Deeneka Fasalle Alaihe Afzala

translation.en: And The Protectorship Of Your Religion, Send The Choicest Of Blessings On Him-

segments.transliteration: Maa Sallayta A’La Ahadim Min Awseyaaeka

translation.en: The Same Blessings Bestowed By You On Your Regents And Successors.
Surely, You Are Worthy Of Praise And Your Are Revered!

text.en: Within the recommended rites on Fridays, Shaykh al-Tusi, in his book of Misbah al-Mutahajjid, has mentioned the following from Imam Hasan Askari (peace be upon him):
text.ar: الصَّلوات على جعفر بن محمد عليه‌السلام :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلصَّادِقِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala ja`fari bni muhammadin alssadiqi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Ja`far the son of Muhammad the veracious,
the treasure of knowledge,
the caller to You with the truth,
and the manifest light.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَكَمَا جَعَلْتَهُ مَعْدِنَ كَلاَمِكَ وَوَحْيِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa kama ja`altahu ma`dina kalamika wa wahyika

translation.en: O Allah, as You have made him the core of Your words and revelations,
the treasure of Your knowledge,
the spokesman of the profession of Your Oneness,
the authorized to undertake Your mission,
and the keeper of Your religion,
so also (please) send blessings upon him
with the most excellent blessings that You have ever sent upon any
of Your elite people and arguments.
Verily, You are full of praise, full or glory.

text.en:
As for the forms of ziyarah dedicated to Imam Musa al-Kazim (‘a),
Sayyid Ibn Tawus, in his book of al-Mazar, has mentioned the
following method and form:
When you intend to visit Imam al-Kazim (‘a), you ought to bathe
yourself before you come to the holy shrine with tranquility and
solemnity. When you come, you may stop at the gate of the shrine and
say the following words:
text.ar: أما ما يخصُّ الإمام موسى عليه‌السلام فهي : على ما رواه السيّد ابن طاووس في المزار كما يلي : إذا أردت زيارته عليه‌السلام فينبغي أن تغتسل ثم تأتي المشهد المقدَّس وعليك السكينة والوقار فإذا أتيته فقف على بابه وقل :

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great. Allah is the Most Great.

segments.arabic: لاََ إِِلٰهَ إِِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ وَٱللَّهُ اكْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa allahu wallahu akbaru

translation.en: There is no god save Allah. And Allah is the Most Great.
All praise be to Allah for guiding [me] to His religion

segments.arabic: وَٱلتَّوْفِيقِ لِمَا دَعَا إِِلَيْهِ مِنْ سَبِيلِهِ
segments.transliteration: walttawfiqi lima da`a ilayhi min sabilihi

translation.en: and for leading [me] successfully to His Course to which He has invited (us).
O Allah, You are verily the most Honorable Besought One
and the most Honorable Purposed One.
I thus have come to You, seeking nearness to You
in the name of the son of Your Prophet’s daughter,
Your blessings be upon him and upon his immaculate fathers
and pure sons.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
never frustrate my efforts,
never cut off my hope,
make me illustrious in Your view

segments.transliteration: fi alddunya wal-akhirati wa min almuqarrabina

translation.en: in this world as well as the world to come, and make me of those brought near to You.

text.en: You may then enter the shrine by preceding your right foot (to the left), saying the following words:
text.ar: ثم ادخل وقدِّم رجلك اليُمنى وقل :

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin), in Allah (I trust),
and on the way of Allah
and on the norm of the Messenger of Allah (I proceed),
may Allah bless him and his Household.
O Allah, (please do) forgive me, my parents,
and all the believing men and women.

text.en: When you reach the gate of the dome, you may stop there and ask permission of entrance by saying the following words:
text.ar: فإذا وصلت باب القُبَّه فقف عليه واستأذن تقول :

translation.en: O Allah’s Messenger, may I enter?
O Allah’ Prophet, may I enter?

segments.arabic: اادْخُلُ يَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنَ عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: O Muhammad the son of `Abdullah, may I enter?
O Commander of the Faithful, may I enter?
O Abu-Muhammad al-Hasan, may I enter?

segments.arabic: اادْخُلُ يَا ابَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْحُسَيْنُ

translation.en: O Abu-`Abdullah al-Husayn, may I enter?

segments.arabic: اادْخُلُ يَا ابَا مُحَمَّدٍ عَلِيُّ بْنَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya aba muhammadin `aliyyu bna alhusayni

translation.en: O Abu-Muhammad `Ali ibn al-Husayn, may I enter?

segments.arabic: اادْخُلُ يَا ابَا جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya aba ja`farin muhammadu abna `aliyyin

translation.en: O Abu-Ja`far Muhammad ibn `Ali, may I enter?

segments.arabic: اادْخُلُ يَا ابَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ جَعْفَرُ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya aba `abdillahi ja`faru bna muhammadin

translation.en: O Abu-`Abdullah Ja`far ibn Muhammad, may I enter?

segments.arabic: اادْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا ابَا ٱلْحَسَنِ مُوسَىٰ بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mawlaya ya aba alhasani musa bna ja`farin

translation.en: O my master Abu’l-Hasan Musa ibn Ja`far, may I enter?

segments.arabic: اادْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا ابَا جَعْفَرٍ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mawlaya ya aba ja`farin

translation.en: O my master Abu-Ja`far, may I enter?

segments.arabic: اادْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: O my master Muhammad ibn `Ali, may I enter?

text.en: While entering, you may repeat the following statement four times:
text.ar: وادخل وقل أربعاً :

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great.

segments.arabic: ثم قف مستقبلاً القبر واجعل القبلة بين كتفيك وقل :

translation.en: You may then stop in front of the holy tomb, making the kiblah direction to be between your shoulders, and say the following words:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ولِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ وَلِيِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waliyya allahi wabna waliyyihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s intimate servant and son of His intimate servant.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ حُجَّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya hujjata allahi wabna hujjatihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s argument and son of His argument.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَفِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ صَفِيِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya safiyya allahi wabna safiyyihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s choice and son of His choice.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا امِينَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ امينِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya amina allahi wabna aminihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s trustee and son of His trustee.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نُورَ ٱللَّهِ فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلارْضِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya nura allahi fi zulumati al-ardi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s light in the darkness of the earth.
Peace be upon you, O leader to the true guidance.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَلَمَ ٱلدِّينِ وَٱلتُّقَىٰ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O signpost of religiousness and piety.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَازِنَ عِلْمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O hoarder of the knowledge of the Prophets.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَازِنَ عِلْمِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O hoarder of the knowledge of the Messengers.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نَائِبَ ٱلاوْصِيَاءِ ٱلسَّابِقِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O deputy of the preceding Successors (of the Prophets).
Peace be upon you, O essence of the manifest Revelation.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَاحِبَ ٱلْعِلْمِ ٱلْيَقِينِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O holder of the certain knowledge.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَيْبَةَ عِلْمِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O case of the knowledge of the Messengers.
Peace be upon you, O righteous leader.
Peace be upon you, O ascetic leader.
Peace be upon you, O oft-worshipping leader.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ ايُّهَا ٱلإِمَامُ ٱلسَّيِّدُ ٱلرَّشِيدُ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O prudent leader and chief.
Peace be upon you, O slain and martyred.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ وَصِيِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka yabna rasuli allahi wabna wasiyyihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger and son of his successor.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ مُوسَىٰ بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya mawlaya musa bna ja`farin

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O my master Musa son of Ja`far.
Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: اشْهَدُ انَّكَ قَدْ بَلَّغْتَ عَنِ ٱللَّهِ مَا حَمَّلَكَ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka qad ballaghta `an allahi ma hammalaka

translation.en: I bear witness that you conveyed faithfully that which Allah ordered You to convey,
safeguarded that which He entrusted with you,
decided as lawful all that which Allah has deemed lawful,
decided as unlawful all that which Allah has deemed unlawful,
carried out the decrees of Allah,
recited the Book of Allah,

segments.arabic: وَصَبَرْتَ عَلَىٰ ٱلاذَىٰ فِي جَنْبِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa sabarta `ala al-adha fi janbi allahi

translation.en: endured harm for the sake of Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa jahadta fi allahi haqqa jihadihi

translation.en: and strove in the way of Allah as it ought to be striven
until death came upon you.
I also bear witness that you passed away

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ مَا مَضَىٰ عَلَيْهِ آبَاؤُكَ ٱلطَّاهِرُونَ

translation.en: carrying the same principles on which your immaculate fathers
and pure forefathers
the successors, guides,
leaders, and rightly guided ones passed away.
You never preferred blindness to true guidance

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ تَمِلْ مِنْ حَقٍّ إِلَىٰ بَاطِلٍ
segments.transliteration: wa lam tamil min haqqin ila batilin

translation.en: and never slanted from right to wrong.
I also bear witness that you acted sincerely to Allah,
to His Messenger, and to the Commander of the Faithful,
fulfilled the trust,
avoided betrayal,
performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rate,
enjoined the right,
forbade the evil,
and served Allah earnestly
and painstakingly, expecting His reward,
until death came upon you.
So, may Allah reward you on behalf of Islam and its people
with the best reward and the most honoring reward.

segments.arabic: اتَيْتُكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ زَائِراً

translation.en: I have come to you, O son of Allah’s Messenger, visiting you,
recognizing your right,
admitting your precedence,
knowing about your knowledgeability,
seeking shield with your inviolability,
seeking protection with your grave,
resorting to your tomb,
seeking your intercession with Allah,
declaring loyalty to your loyalists,
incurring the animosity of your enemies,
seeking insight of your standing
and true guidance you are leading to,
and having full acquaintance with the straying of those who dissent from you
and the blindness they are following.
Ransoms for you be my father, mother,
myself, my family members,
my property, and my sons.
O son of Allah’s Messenger,

segments.arabic: اتَيْتُكَ مُتَقَرِّباً بِزِيَارَتِكَ إِِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ataytuka mutaqarriban biziyaratika ila allahi ta`ala

translation.en: I have come to you seeking nearness to Allah the All-exalted by visiting you
and seeking your intercession for me with Him;
So, (please) intercede for me with your Lord
so that He may forgive my sins,
pardon my offences,
overlook my evildoings,
erase my wrongdoings,
allow me to enter Paradise,
endue me with favors that suit His generosity,
and forgive me, my forefathers,
my brothers, my sister,
and all believing men and women
in the east and west of the earth,
out of His favoring, magnanimity, and benevolence.

segments.arabic: ثم تنكب على القبر وتقبله وتعفر خدَّيك عليه وتدعو بما تريد ثمّ تتحول إلى الرأس وتقول :

translation.en: You may then throw yourself on the grave, smear your two cheeks on it, and pray to Almighty Allah for any thing you want.
You may then turn to the side of the Imam’s head and say the following words:
Musa the son of Ja`far.
Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.
I bear witness that you are verily the guiding leader
and the guardian who leads to the right guidance,
you are verily the core of the Revelation,
the man of true interpretation,
the bearer of the Torah and the Gospel,
the knowledgeable, the decent,
the veracious, and the one who puts his knowledge in practice.

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاَيَ انَا ابْرَا إِِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ مِنْ اعْدَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: ya mawlaya ana abra'u ila allahi min a`da'ika

translation.en: O my master, I repudiate your enemies in the presence of Allah
and I seek nearness to Allah through loyalty to you.
So, may Allah bless you,

segments.transliteration: wa `ala aba'ika wa ajdadika wa abna'ika

translation.en: your fathers, your forefathers, your descendants,
your partisans, and your devotees.
May Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon them.

text.en: You may then offer the two-unit prayer of ziyarah, reciting <ref=1:36>Surah Al-Yasin</ref> –after Surah al-Fatihah in the first unit- and <ref=1:55>Surah Al-Rahman</ref> –after Surah al-Fatihah in the second unit. You may also recite any> Surah instead. Then, you may pray Almighty Allah for whatever you need.
text.ar: ثم تصلِّي ركعتين للزيارة تقرأ فيهما سورة <ref=1:36>یس</ref> و <ref=1:55>الرحمن</ref>  أو ما تيسر من القران ثم ادع بما تريد

text.en: Shaykh al-Mufid, al-Shahid, and Muhammad ibn al-Mashhadi have said the following: If you intend to visit Imam al-Kazim (`a) in Baghdad, you may first bathe yourself with the intention of visiting him, direct to the holy shrine, stop at its gate, ask permission of entrance, and then enter there while saying the following words:
text.ar: زيارة أخرى لموسى بن جعفر عليه‌السلام: قال المفيد والشهيد ومحمد ابن المشهدي : إذا أردت زيارته ببغداد فاغتسل للزيارة واقصد المشهد وقف على الباب الشريف واستأذن ثم ادخل وأنت تقول :

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin), in Allah (I trust),
on the way of Allah (I proceed),
and on the norm of the Messenger of Allah,
may Allah bless him and his Household,
and peace be upon the intimate servants of Allah.

text.en: You may then walk until you stop in front of the grave of Musa ibn Ja`far (`a). When you stop there, you may say the following words:
text.ar: ثم امضِ حتى تستقبل قبر موسى بن جعفر عليه‌السلام فإذا وقفت عند قبره فقل :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نُورَ ٱللَّهِ فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلارْضِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya nura allahi fi zulumati al-ardi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O light of Allah in the darkness of the earth.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s intimate servant.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s argument.
Peace be upon you, O door to Allah.
I bear witness that you performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rate,
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,
recited the Book as it should be recited,

segments.transliteration: wa jahadta fi allahi haqqa jihadihi

translation.en: strove for the sake of Allah as exactly as strife should be,

segments.arabic: وَصَبَرْتَ عَلَىٰ ٱلاذَىٰ فِي جَنْبِهِ مُحْتَسِباً
segments.transliteration: wa sabarta `ala aladha fi janbihi muhtasiban

translation.en: endured harm for His sake expecting His reward,
and served Him sincerely until death came upon you.

segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka awla billahi wa birasulihi

translation.en: I bear witness that you are the closest to Allah and His Messenger

segments.transliteration: wa annaka ibnu rasuli allahi haqqan

translation.en: and you are verily the son of Allah’s Messenger.
I repudiate your enemies in the presence of Allah
and seek nearness to Allah through my loyalty to you.
I have come to you, O my master, recognizing your right,
declaring loyalty to your loyalists,
and incurring the animosity of your enemies;
so, (please) intercede for me with your Lord.

text.en: You may then throw yourself on the grave, kiss it, place both your cheeks on it, turn to the side of the Imam’s head, stop there, and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم انكبَّ على القبر وقبله وضع خدّيك عليه وتحول إلى عند الرأس وقف وقل :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.
I bear witness that you are veracious.
You fulfilled [your duty] sincerely,
spoke honestly,
and passed away as martyr.
You never preferred blindness to the true guidance

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ تَمِلْ مِنْ حَقٍّ إِلَىٰ بَاطِلٍ
segments.transliteration: wa lam tamil min haqqin ila batilin

translation.en: and never slanted from right to wrong.
May Allah send blessings upon you,
upon your fathers, and upon your sons the immaculate.

text.en: You may then kiss the grave and offer a two-unit prayer. You may then offer any prayer you like. After that, you may prostrate yourself and say the following supplicaroty words:
text.ar: ثم قبل القبر وصلّ ركعتين وصلّ بعدهما ما أحببت واسجد وقل

translation.en: O Allah, I have had recourse to You,
made my way to You,
hoped for Your favoring,

segments.arabic: وَقَبْرَ إِِمَامِيَ ٱلَّذِي اوْجَبْتَ عَلَيَّ طَاعَتَهُ زُرْتُ
segments.transliteration: wa qabra imamiya alladhi awjabta `alayya ta`atahu zurtu

translation.en: visited the tomb of my Imam the obedience to whom You have made obligatory on me,
and I have chosen him as my means to You;
so, [I beseech You] in the name of their rights which You have made incumbent upon Yourself,

segments.transliteration: ighfir li wa liwalidayya wa lilmu'minina

translation.en: forgive me, my parents, and the believers,
O All-generous.

text.en: You may then put your right cheek on the ground and say the following :
text.ar: ثم اقلب خدّك الأيمن وقل :

translation.en: O Allah, You have already known my requests;

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَٱقْضِهَا
segments.transliteration: fasalli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin waqdiha

translation.en: so, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad and settle them for me.

text.en: You may then put your left cheek on the ground and say the following  words:
text.ar: ثم اقلب خدَّك الأيسر وقل :

translation.en: O Allah, You have certainly taken account of my sins;
so, [I beseech You] in the name of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْهَا وَتَصَدَّقْ عَلَيَّ بِمَا انْتَ اهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: waghfirha wa tasaddaq `alayya bima anta ahluhu

translation.en: forgive them, and grant me as charity that which suits You.

text.en: You may then return to the position of prostration and repeat the following word one hundred times:
text.ar: ثم عُدْ إلى السجود وقل مائة مرة :

translation.en: Thanks.

text.en: You may then raise your head from prostration and pray for whatever you wish and whomever you wish.
text.ar: ثم ارفع رأسك من السجود وادع بما شئت وأحببت

text.en: In his book of Misbah al-Za'ir, the sublime Sayyid Ibn Tawus, while referring to some forms of ziyarah of Imam al-Kazim (`a), has mentioned a form of invoking blessings on him, which contains references to some of the Imam’s virtues, merits, method of worship, and misfortunes. Hence, a visitor of this Imam (`a) is advised not to miss the reward of this form of invocation of blessings, which is as follows:
text.ar: أقول : قد أورد الجليل للسيد علي بن طاووس قدس في كتاب (مصباح الزائر) عند ذكر بعض زيارات الإمام موسى بن جعفر عليه‌السلام صلاة يصلّى بها عليه تحوي ذكر نبذ من فضائله ومناقبه وعباداته ومصائبه ينبغي للزائر أن لا يفوته فضل الصلاة بها عليه وهي :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَاهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ahli baytihi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household
and send blessings upon Musa the son of Ja`far,
the successor of the righteous ones,
the leader of the excellent ones,
the case of illuminations,
and the inheritor of tranquility, solemnity,
wisdoms, and traditions,

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي كَانَ يُحْيِي ٱللَّيْلَ بِٱلسَّهَرِ إِِلَىٰ ٱلسَّحَرِ
segments.transliteration: alladhi kana yuhyi allayla bilssahari ila alssahari

translation.en: who used to spend nights sleeplessly up to the early dawn
with continuous implorations for forgiveness.
He was inseparable associate of lengthy prostrations,
heavy tears,
very much confidential talks,
and incessant implorations.
He was the center of understanding, justice,
goodness, virtue,
generosity, and liberality.
He was also accustomed to ordeals and endurance
and he was persecuted wrongfully,
entombed unjustly,
and tortured in the bottom of jails
and darkness of cells.
He is the one whose leg was bruised by the rings of chains
and whose funeral was called with calls of humility of belittling.

segments.arabic: وَٱلْوَارِدِ عَلَىٰ جَدِّهِ ٱلْمُصْطَفَىٰ وَابِيهِ ٱلْمُرْتَضَىٰ
segments.transliteration: walwaridi `ala jaddihi almustafa wa abihi almurtada

translation.en: He is the one who joined his grandfather the Chosen Prophet, his father the Well-pleased leader,
and his mother the doyenne of women
with usurped inheritance,
robbed loyalty,
overpowered state,
unavenged blood,
and poisoned drink.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَكَمَا صَبَرَ عَلَىٰ غَلِيظِ ٱلِْمحَنِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa kama sabara `ala ghalizi almihani

translation.en: O Allah, just as he suffered hard-hitting ordeals tolerantly,
swallowed chokes of agonies,
surrendered to Your pleasure,
obeyed You sincerely,
adopted reverence for You,
adapted himself with submission to You,
stood against heresies and their bearers,

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَلْحَقْهُ فِي شَيْءٍ مِنْ اوَامِرِكَ وَنَوَاهِيكَ لَوْمَةُ لاَئِمٍ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yalhaqhu fi shay'in min awamirika wa nawahika lawmatu la'imin

translation.en: and did not care for the blame of any blamer in the course of following Your orders and refraining from Your prohibitions;
so, (please) bless him with ever-increasing,
towering, and purifying blessings

segments.arabic: تُوجِبُ لَهُ بِهَا شَفَاعَةَ امَمٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: tujibu lahu biha shafa`ata umamin min khalqika

translation.en: due to which You endue him with the intercession of nations from Your creatures
and centuries of Your beings.
And convey to him greetings and salutation from us,

segments.arabic: وَآتِنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ فِي مُوَالاَتِهِ فَضْلاًَ وَإِِحْسَاناً
segments.transliteration: wa atina min ladunka fi muwalatihi fadlan wa ihsanan

translation.en: give us from You on account of our loyalty to him favors, bounty,
forgiveness, and pleasure.
Verily, You are the Lord of prevalent favor
and great exoneration,
in the name of Your mercy; O most merciful of all those who show mercy.
O Allah, (please) send blessings upon the honest and trusted
Musa the son of Ja`far,
the dutiful, the faithful,
the pure, the bright,
the clear light,
the striver, the seeker of Your rewards,
and the bearer of harm for Your sake.
O Allah, as he conveyed on the authority of his fathers
all Your orders and prohibitions that were deposited with him,
directed (people) to the clear course,
and had to encounter the people of authority and persecution

segments.arabic: فِيمَا كَانَ يَلْقَىٰ مِنْ جُهَّالِ قَوْمِهِ

translation.en: while he was facing troubles from the ignorant people,
so, O Lord, bless him
with the most favorite and most perfect
blessings that You have ever conferred
upon any one who obeyed You and wished well for Your servants.
You are verily All-forgiving, All-merciful.

text.en:
Several forms of ziyarah of Imam al-Rida (‘a) have been
mentioned. However, the most famous form has been mentioned in
the most reliable books and reported from the sublime Shaykh
Muhammad ibn al-Hasan ibn al-Walid, one of the mentors of Shaykh
al-Saduq. From the book of al-Mazar by Ibn Qawlawayh, we can
conclude that this form of ziyarah has been reported from the Holy
Imams. This form of ziyarah, according to Shaykh al-Saduq’s book of
man-la-yahzuruhul-faqih, is as follows:
When you intend to visit Imam al-Rida (‘a) in Tus, you may bathe
yourself before you leave your house (at your hometown) and say the
following words:
text.ar: فاعلم أنه قد ذكر له زيارات عديدة والمشهورة منها ما وردت في الكتب المعتبرة ونسبت إلى الشيخ الجليل محمد بن الحسن بن الوليد وهو من مشايخ الصدوق (رض) ويظهر من مزار ابن قولويه أنها مروية عن الأئمة عليهم‌السلام وكيفيتها على ما يوافق كتاب من لا يحضره الفقيه أنّك إذا أردت زيارة قبر الرضا عليه‌السلام بطوس فاغتسل قبلما تخرج من الدار وقل وأنت تغتسل :

translation.en: O Allah, (please) cleanse me, cleanse my heart,
expand my breast,

segments.arabic: وَأَجْرِ عَلَىٰ لِسَانِي مِدْحَتَكَ وَٱلثَّنَاءَ عَلَيْكَ

translation.en: and let Your praise and eulogy flow out from my tongue;

segments.arabic: فإِنَّهُ لاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'innahu la hawla wa la quwwata illa bika

translation.en: since indeed there is neither might nor power except with You.

segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`alhu li tahuran wa shifa'an

translation.en: O Allah, (please) establish it as a means of cleansing and healing for me.
In the name of Allah; the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

text.en: Say the following supplicatory words as you leave your house:
text.ar: وقل وأنت تخرج :

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin), in Allah (I trust),

segments.arabic: وَإِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَىٰ ٱبْنِ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ila allahi wa ila ibni rasuli allahi

translation.en: to Allah and towards the son of Allah’s Messenger (I trun my face).
Allah is Sufficient unto me and on Allah do I  rely.

segments.transliteration: allahumma ilayka tawajjahtu wa ilayka qasadtu

translation.en: O Allah, I have set out to You, directed toward You,
and desired for what You have in possession.

text.en: When you go out, stand at your door and say:
text.ar: فإذا خرجت فقف على باب دارك وقل :

translation.en: O Allah, to You am I turning my face

segments.arabic: وَعَلَيْكَ خَلَّفْتُ أَهْلِي وَمَالِي وَمَا خَوَّلْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa `alayka khallaftu ahli wa mali wa ma khawwaltani

translation.en: and with You do I keep my family members, my property, and everything with which You have allowed me to behave.
I have trusted in You; so, do not disappoint me.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يُخَيِّبُ مَنْ أَرَادَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yukhayyibu man aradahu

translation.en: O He Who saves those who trust in Him from disappointment
and He Who does not give up those whom He safeguards.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and guard me under Your custody,
since nothing that You guard may be ruined.

text.en: And if you meet safely, God willing, then take a bath (Ghusl) if you want to visit and say when you do:
text.ar: فإذا وافيت سالماً إن شاء الله فاغتسل إذا أردت أن تزور وقل حين تغتسل :

segments.transliteration: allahumma tahhirni wa tahhir li qalbi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) cleanse me, cleanse my heart for me,
expand my breast,

segments.arabic: وَأَجْرِ عَلَىٰ لِسَانِي مِدْحَتَكَ وَمَحَبَّتَكَ وَٱلثَّنَاءَ عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ajri `ala lisani midhatika wa mahabbataka walththana'a `alayka

translation.en: and let Your praise, eulogy, and love flow out from my tongue;
since indeed there is no power except with You.
I know for sure that the basis of my faith
is to submit to Your decree, to keep to the traditions of Your Prophet,
and to bear witness to all Your creatures.

segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`alhu li shifa'an wa nuran

translation.en: O Allah, (please) make it curative and light for me.
You verily have power over all things.

text.en: You may put on the purest and cleanest of your clothes, walk barefooted with tranquility and submission, and mention Almighty Allah in your heart, repeating the following :
text.ar: والبس أطهر ثيابك وامش حافياً وعليك السكينة والوقار واذكر الله بقلبك وقل :

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great.
There is no god save Allah.
All glory be to Allah.
All praise be to Allah.

text.en: While entering the sacred shrine, you may say the following words:
text.ar: وقصر خطاك وقل حين تدخل الروضة المقدسة :

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin), in Allah (I trust),
and the course of Allah’s Messenger (I follow),
peace be upon him and his Household.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah,
One and Only God and having no partner.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna muhammadan `abduhu wa rasuluhu

translation.en: And I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger
and `Ali is Allah’s most intimate servant.

text.en: You may then walk towards the tomb to stop there, face it, and say the following words:
text.ar: وسر حتى تقف على قبره وتستقبل وجهه بوجهك وقل :

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah,
One and Only God and having no partner.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna muhammadan `abduhu wa rasuluhu

translation.en: And I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger,
the chief of the past and the coming generations,
and the chief of the Prophets and Messengers.
O Allah, (please) bless Muhammad,
Your servant, messenger, prophet,
and the chief of all Your creatures,

segments.arabic: صَلاَةً لاَ يَقْوَىٰ عَلَىٰ إِحْصَائِهَا غَيْرُكَ

translation.en: with such blessings that none can calculate save You.
O Allah, (please) bless the Commander of the Faithful
`Ali the son of Abi-Talib,
Your servant and the brother of Your Messenger,
whom You have selected on the basis of Your knowledge

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَهُ هَادِياً لِمَنْ شِئْتَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ja`altahu hadiyan liman shi'ta min khalqika

translation.en: and thus made lead (to the truth) whomever You willed amongst Your creatures
and made the guide to those whom You sent with Your messages,
the establisher of the true religion owing to Your justice,
the decisive judge among Your creatures,
and the prevalent over all that.

segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayhi wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon him.
O Allah, (please) send blessings on Fatimah
the daughter of Your Prophet,
the wife of Your friend,
the mother of the two grandsons al-Hasan and al-Husayn
the two chiefs of the youth of Paradise;
(she is) the genuinely pure, the immaculate, the purified,
the pious, the perfect, the pleased, the pristine,
and the doyenne of all the women of Paradise,

segments.arabic: صَلاَةً لاَ يَقْوَىٰ عَلَىٰ إِحْصَائِهَا غَيْرُكَ

translation.en: (bless her) with such blessings that none can count except You.
O Allah, (please) send blessings upon al-Hasan and al-Husayn,
the two grandsons of Your Prophet,
the two chiefs of the youth of Paradise,
the two who establish authority among Your creatures,
who guide to those whom You sent with Your messages,
who manage the religious affairs on the basis of Your justice,
and who judge on the basis of Your decrees among Your creatures.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon `Ali the son of al-Husayn,
Your servant who undertakes Your mission among Your creatures,
who guides to those whom You sent with Your messages,
who manages the religious affairs on the basis of Your justice,
who judges according to Your decrees among Your creatures,
and who is the prime of all worshippers.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings on Muhammad the son of `Ali,
Your servant and Your representative in Your lands,
who split asunder the knowledge of the Prophets.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلصَّادِقِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala ja`fari bni muhammadin alssadiqi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Ja`far the son of Muhammad,
Your servant, the authority of Your religion,
Your argument against all of Your creatures,
the veracious, and the dutiful.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Musa the son of Ja`far,
Your righteous servant,
Your spokesman among Your creatures,
who speaks with Your judgment,
and who is the argument against Your created beings.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَليِّ بْنِ مُوسَىٰ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon `Ali the son of Musa,
the cordial, the well-pleased,
the servant of You, the authority of Your religion,
who undertakes the mission with Your justice,

segments.arabic: وَٱلدَّاعِي إِلَىٰ دِينِكَ وَدِينِ آبَائِهِ ٱلصَّادِقِينَ
segments.transliteration: waldda`i ila dinika wa dini aba'ihi alssadiqina

translation.en: who calls to the religion of You and of his veracious fathers;

segments.arabic: صَلاَةً لاََ يَقْوَىٰ عَلَىٰ إِحْصَائِهَا غَيْرُكَ

translation.en: (bless him) with such blessings that none can count except You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad the son of `Ali,
Your servant, Your authority,
who undertakes the mission by Your command
and calls to Your path.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَليِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessing upon `Ali the son of Muhammad,
Your servant and the authority of Your religion.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon al-Hasan the son of `Ali
who carries out Your commands,
who undertakes the mission among Your creatures,
Your argument who acts on behalf of Your Prophet,
Your witness on Your creatures,
the exclusively endued with Your honor,

segments.transliteration: aldda`i ila ta`atika wa ta`ati rasulika

translation.en: and the caller to the obedience to You and to Your Messenger.
Your blessings be upon them all.
O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Your argument and authority
who undertakes the mission among Your creatures
with such blessing that is perfect, ever-increasing, and everlasting
due to which You may hasten his Relief,
grant him victory,

segments.transliteration: wa taj`aluna ma`ahu fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: and include us with him in this world and the Hereafter.
O Allah, I am seeking nearness to You through bearing love for them,
and I am loyal to their loyalists and enemy of their enemies.
So (please) provide me in their names the goodness of this world and the Hereafter

segments.arabic: وَٱصْرِفْ عَنِّي بِهِمْ شَرَّ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ

translation.en: and fend off from me the evils of this world and the Hereafter
as well as the horrors of the Resurrection Day.

text.en:
You may then sit to the side of the Imam’s head and say the
following words:
text.ar: ثم تجلس عند رأسه وتقول :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s friend.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s argument.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نُورَ ٱللَّهِ فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya nura allahi fi zulumati al-ardi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s light in the darkness of the earth.
Peace be upon you, O pillar of the religion.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha adama safwati allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Adam the choice of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha nuhin nabiyyi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Noah the prophet of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha ibrahima khalili allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Abraham the intimate friend of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِسْمَاعيلَ ذَبيحِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha isma`ila dhabihi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Ishmael the slain for the sake of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ كَلِيمِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha musa kalimi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Moses the spoken by Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيسَىٰ رُوحِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Jesus the spirit of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدٍ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha muhammadin rasuli allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Muhammad the messenger of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of the Commander of the Faithful
`Ali the authority of Allah
and the successor of the Messenger of the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Fatimah the luminous lady.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ ٱلْحَسَنِ وَٱلْحُسَيْنِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of al-Hasan and al-Husayn
the two chiefs of the youth of Paradise.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عَليِّ بْنِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ زَيْنِ ٱلْعَابِدِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha `aliyyi bni alhusayni zayni al`abidina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of `Ali the son of al-Husayn the adornment of the worshippers.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Muhammad the son of `Ali
the splitter of the knowledge of the past and the last generations.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha ja`fari bni muhammadin

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Ja`far the son of Muhammad
the veracious and dutiful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha musa bni ja`farin

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Musa the son of Ja`far.
Peace be upon you, O ever-truthful and martyr.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْوَصِيُّ ٱلْبَارُّ ٱلتَّقِيُّ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O dutiful and pious successor.
I bear witness that you performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rate (and alms),
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,

segments.arabic: وَعَبَدْتَ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصاً حَتَّىٰ أَتَاكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
segments.transliteration: wa `abadta allaha mukhlisan hatta ataka alyaqinu

translation.en: and serve Allah sincerely until death came upon you.
Peace be upon you, O Abu’l-Hasan.
Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

text.en: You may then throw yourself on the tomb and say the following supplicatory prayer:
text.ar: ثم تنكب على القبر وتقول :

translation.en: O Allah, for Your sake alone have I set out from my homeland
and covered many countries in the hope of winning Your mercy;

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تُخَيِّبْنِي وَلاَ تَرُدَّنِي بِغَيْرِ قَضَاءِ حَاجَتِي
segments.transliteration: fala tukhayyibni wa la taruddani bighayri qada'i hajati

translation.en: so, (please) do not disappoint me and do not make me return without having my needs settled (by You),

segments.arabic: وَٱرْحَمْ تَقَلُّبِي عَلَىٰ قَبْرِ ٱبْنِ أَخِي رَسُولِكَ
segments.transliteration: warham taqallubi `ala qabri ibni akhi rasulika

translation.en: and have mercy upon my turning over on the tomb of the son of Your Prophet’ brother,
Your blessings be upon him and his Household.

segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi ya mawlaya

translation.en: May my father and mother be ransoms for you, O my master.
I have come to you visiting and getting to you,
seeking protection against all that which I have committed against myself
and overburdened my back with.
So, (please) be my intercessor with Allah
on the day of my poverty and neediness,
for you enjoy with Allah a praiseworthy position
and you are worthy of regard with Him.

text.en: You may then raise your right hand towards the sky, stretch out your left hand on the tomb, and say the following supplicatory prayer:
text.ar: ثم ترفع يدك اليمنى وتبسط اليسرى على القبر وتقول :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِحُبِّهِمْ وَبِوِلاَيَتِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ataqarrabu ilayka bihubbihim wa biwilayatihim

translation.en: O Allah, I do seek nearness to You through bearing love for them and being loyal to them;

segments.arabic: أَتَوَلَّىٰ آخِرَهُمْ بِمَا تَوَلَّيْتُ بِهِ أَوَّلَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: atawalla akhirahum bima tawallaytu bihi awwalahum

translation.en: I am loyal to the last of them in the same way as I am loyal to the first

segments.transliteration: wa abra'u min kulli walijatin dunahum

translation.en: and I repudiate any adherence to any one other than them.
O Allah, pour curses on those who have altered Your bounty,
suspected Your Prophet,
denied Your signs,
scoffed at Your Imam,

segments.arabic: وَحَمَلُوٱ ٱلنَّاسَ عَلَىٰ أَكْتَافِ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa hamalu alnnasa `ala aktafi ali muhammadin

translation.en: and placed the burden of the people upon the shoulders of Muhammad’s Household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِٱلْلَّعْنَةِ عَلَيْهِمْ

translation.en: O Allah, I do seek nearness to You through invoking curse on these peoples (i.e. the enemies of the Holy Prophet’s Household)

segments.arabic: وَٱلْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْهُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ يَا رَحْمٰنُ
segments.transliteration: walbara'ati minhum fi alddunya wal-akhirati ya rahmanu

translation.en: and disavowing them in this world and the Hereafter, O All-beneficent Lord.

text.en: You may turn to the side of the Imam’s feet and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم تحوّل عند رجليه وتقول :

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا ٱلْحَسَنِ

translation.en: Allah’s blessings be upon you, O Abu’l-Hasan.
Allah’s blessings be upon your soul and body.
You did act patiently and you are veracious and believed.

segments.arabic: قَتَلَ ٱللَّهُ مَنْ قَتَلَكَ بِٱلأَيْدِي وَٱلأَلْسُنِ
segments.transliteration: qatala allahu man qatalaka bil-aydi wal-alsuni

translation.en: May Allah kill those who killed you with hands and tongues.

text.en:
Then supplicate fervently pronouncing la'nah (anathema) on the killers of Ameerul Momineen, Imam Hasan, Imam Hussain (peace be upon them) and those who shed the blood of the family of the Prophet (peace and blessings upon him and his family).
It is worth mentioning that invocation of Almighty Allah’s curse on the enemies of the Holy Imams can be said in any language or form. However, the most appropriate form may be the following, which is quoted from some validly reported supplications: You may then return to the side of the Imam’s head and offer a two-unit prayer in which you may recite <ref=1:36>Surah Al-Yasin</ref> after Surah al-Fatihah in one unit and <ref=1:55>Surah Al-Rahman</ref> after Surah al-Fatihah in the other.
text.ar: ثم ابتهل في اللعنة على قاتل أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام وعلى قتلة الحسن والحسين وعلى جميع قتلة أهل بيت رسول الله ثم تحوّل عند رأسه من خلفه وصلّ ركعتين تقرأ في إحداهما <ref=1:36>یس</ref> وفي الآخِرى <ref=1:55>الرحمن</ref>  وتجتهد في الدعاء والتضرّع وأكثر من الدعاء لنفسك ولوالديك ولجميع إخوانك من المؤمنين وأقم عند رأسه ما شئت ولتكن صلاتك عند القبر إن شاء الله أقول : هذه الزيارة هي أحسن زياراته عليه‌السلام وكلمة (وسخروا بإمامك) الواردة في آخر هذه الزيارة قد ضبطت في كتاب الفقيه والعيون وكتب العلامة المجلسي وغيره بميمين كما صنعنا نحن هنا فيكون المعنى سخروا بإمامك الذي أنت قد عينته لهم ، ولكن الكلمة تجدها مضبوطة في كتاب مصباح الزائر هكذا : وسخروا بأيامك [٤] وعلى هذا أيضاً يصح المعنى بل هو الأولى من بعض الوجوه فالأيام هم الأئمة عليهم‌السلام كما يعرف من خبر صقر بن أبي دلف الماضي في الفصل الخامس من الباب الأول ص ٤ وأعلم أيضاً ان اللعن على قاتلي الأئمة عليهم‌السلام حسن بأي لغة كان ، ولعل الأنسب أن يكون اللعن بهذه العبارة المتخذة من بعض الأدعية :

translation.en: O Allah, pour curses on the slayers of the Commander of the Faithful,
the slayers of al-Hasan and al-Husayn, peace be upon them,
and the slayers of the members of Your Prophet’s Household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱلْعَنْ أَعْدَاءَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَقَتَلَتَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma il`an a`da'a ali muhammadin wa qatalatahum

translation.en: O Allah, curse the enemies and slayers of Muhammad’s family members,
add up chastisement to the chastisement that You decide for them,
add up humility to the humility that You decide for them,
add up disgrace to the disgrace that You decide for them,
and add up ignominy to the ignominy that You decide for them.
O Allah, thrust them into Hellfire with disdainful thrusting,
cast them down in the painful torment of You with violent casting,

segments.transliteration: wahshurhm wa atba`ahum ila jahannama zumaran

translation.en: and drive them and their followers to Hell in groups.

text.en: In the book of Tuhfat al-Za’ir, Shaykh al-Mufid states that it is recommended to say the following supplicatory prayer after accomplishing the prayer of visiting Imam al-Rida’s tomb:
