text.ar: وفي كتاب (تحفة الزائر) أنه قال المفيد : يستحب أن يدعى بهذا الدعاء بعد صلاة زيارة الرضا عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You, O Allah
Who is permanent in His kingdom,
self-subsisting in His almightiness,
obeyed in His authority,
unique in His pride,
one and only in the perpetuity of His intransience,
fair with His creatures,
knowing of His issue,
and noble in delaying His punishment.
O my God, my requests are aimed at You
and my hopes are addressed to You exclusively.

segments.transliteration: wa kulla ma waffaqtani min khayrin

translation.en: As to all items of goodness that You have granted me the success to attain,
it is You Who is my guide to them and my path towards them.
O Omnipotent Who cannot be thwarted by requests!

segments.arabic: يَا مَلِيّاً يَلْجَأُ إِلَيْهِ كُلُّ رَاغِبٍ
segments.transliteration: ya maliyyan yalja'u ilayhi kullu raghibin

translation.en: O All-encompassing to Whom desirous ones resort!
I have been always endued with bounties from You
and accustomed to receive conferrals and generosity from You.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِٱلْقُدْرَةِ ٱلنَّافِذَةِ فِي جَمِيعِ ٱلأَشْيَاءِ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bilqudrati alnnafidhati fi jami`i al-ashya'i

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of the omnipotence to which all things are applicable,

segments.arabic: وَقَضَائِكَ ٱلْمُبْرَمِ ٱلَّذِي تَحْجُبُهُ بِأَيْسَرِ ٱلدُّعَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa qada'ika almubrami alladhi tahjubuhu bi-aysari alddu`a'i

translation.en: in the name of Your unstoppable decree that You may stop by the simplest entreaty,

segments.arabic: وَبِٱلنَّظْرَةِ ٱلَّتِي نَظَرْتَ بِهَا إِلَىٰ ٱلْجِبَالِ فَتَشَامَخَتْ
segments.transliteration: wa bilnnazrati allati nazarta biha ila aljibali fatashamakhat

translation.en: and in the name of the look with which You looked at the mountains and they thus towered,
at the layers of the earth and they thus flattened,
at the heavens and they thus rose,
and at the seas and they thus gushed;

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ جَلَّ عَنْ أَدَوَاتِ لَحَظَاتِ ٱلْبَشَرِ
segments.transliteration: ya man jalla `an adawati lahazati albashari

translation.en: O He Who is too Majestic to have the human beings’ organs of sight
and Who is too Subtle to be comprehended by the finest line of thinking.

segments.arabic: لاََ تُحْمَدُ يَا سَيِّدِي إِلاَّ بِتَوْفيقٍ مِنْكَ يَقْتَضِي حَمْداً
segments.transliteration: la tuhmadu ya sayyidi illa bitawfiqin minka yaqtadi hamdan

translation.en: Whenever You, O my master, are praised, this is due to a bestowal of success that You grant and that requires (us) to praise You for it.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُشْكَرُ عَلَىٰ أَصْغَرِ مِنَّةٍ إِلاَّ ٱسْتَوْجَبْتَ بِهَا شُكْراً
segments.transliteration: wa la tushkaru `ala asghari minnatin illa istawjabta biha shukran

translation.en: Whenever You are thanked for the least of Your favors, this requires (us) to thank You for this thanking of ours for You.
Then, at what time can Your bounties be calculated, O my God,
or can Your errands be recompensed, O my Lord,
or can Your favors be paid off, O my Master?
It is one of Your bounties that praisers praise You
and it is one of Your thankworthy acts that thanksgivers thank You.
You are also the trusted for pardoning sins,
the One Who stretches the wing of Your covering on the wrongdoers,
and the One Who relieves from harm with Your Hand.

segments.arabic: فَكَمْ مِنْ سَيِّئَةٍ أَخْفَاهَا حِلْمُكَ حَتَّىٰ دَخِلَتْ
segments.transliteration: fakam min sayyi'atin akhfaha hilmuka hatta dakhilat

translation.en: Too many have been the sins that Your forbearance concealed until they became hidden

segments.arabic: وَحَسَنَةٍ ضَاعَفَهَا فَضْلُكَ حَتَّىٰ عَظُمَتْ عَلَيْهَا مُجَازَاتُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa hasanatin da`afaha fadluka hatta `azumat `alayha mujazatuka

translation.en: and too many are the good deeds that Your favoring multiplied until Your reward for them became massive.

segments.arabic: جَلَلْتَ أَنْ يُخَافَ مِنْكَ إِلاَّ ٱلْعَدْلُ
segments.transliteration: jalalta an yukhafa minka illa al`adlu

translation.en: You are too Majestic for us to anticipate anything from You save justice

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يُرْجَىٰ مِنْكَ إِلاَّ ٱلإِحْسَانُ وَٱلْفَضْلُ
segments.transliteration: wa an yurja minka illa al-ihsanu walfadlu

translation.en: and to desire for anything from You save good turn and favoring.
So, (please) endue me with the favors that are incumbent upon You on the basis of Your graciousness

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَخْذُلْنِي بِمَا يَحْكُمُ بِهِ عَدْلُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la takhdhulni bima yahkumu bihi `adluka

translation.en: and do not disappoint me of that which is required by Your justice.

segments.arabic: سَيِّدِي لَوْ عَلِمَتِ ٱلأَرْضُ بِذُنُوبِي لَسَاخَتْ بِي
segments.transliteration: sayyidi law `alimat al-ardu bidhunubi lasakhat bi

translation.en: My Master, if the earth knew about my sins, it would swallow me;
if mountains knew about them, they would collapse on me;
if heavens knew about them, they would snatch me;
and if oceans knew about them, they would down me!
My Master! My Master! My Master!
My Lord! My Lord! My Lord!
Frequent has been my standing up in Your hospitability;

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تَحْرِمْنِي مَا وَعَدْتَ ٱلْمُتَعَرِّضِينَ لِمَسْأَلَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: fala tahrimni ma wa`adta almuta`arridina limas'alatika

translation.en: so, (please) do not deprive me of that which You have promised those who present themselves for praying You.
O Well-known by the cognitive ones!
O Served by the worshippers!
O Thanked by the thanksgivers!
O Present in the sessions of the mindful ones!
O Praised by the praisers of Him!
O Nearby to those who seek for Him!
O Described by those who profess His Oneness!
O Dearest of those who love Him!
O Aide of those who require Him!
O Purpose of those who turn to Him frequently!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْغَيْبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: ya man la ya`lamu alghayba illa huwa

translation.en: O He save Whom none knows the hidden!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يَصْرِفُ ٱلسُّوءَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yasrifu alssu'a illa huwa

translation.en: O He save Whom none fends off evil!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يُدَبِّرُ ٱلأَمْرَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yudabbiru al-amra illa huwa

translation.en: O He save Whom none manages the affairs!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذَّنْبَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yaghfiru aldhdhanba illa huwa

translation.en: O He save Whom none forgives sins!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يَخْلُقُ ٱلْخَلْقَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yakhluqu alkhalqa illa huwa

translation.en: O He save Whom none creates the created beings!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاََ يُنَزِّلُ ٱلْغَيْثَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yunazzilu alghaytha illa huwa

translation.en: O He save Whom none brings down rain!
Pour down blessings upon Muhammad and Muhammad’s Household
and forgive me, O best of all forgivers.
O my Lord, I do implore for Your forgiveness timidly.
I implore for Your forgiveness hopefully.
I implore for Your forgiveness turning to You frequently.
I implore for Your forgiveness desiring for You.
I implore for Your forgiveness, fearing You.
I implore for Your forgiveness obediently.
I implore for Your forgiveness having faith in You.
I implore for Your forgiveness professing of You.
I implore for Your forgiveness sincerely.
I implore for Your forgiveness piously.
I implore for Your forgiveness, having full trust in You.
I implore for Your forgiveness, showing submission to You.
I implore for Your forgiveness, dedicating all my acts to You
and fleeing from You towards You.
So, (please) pour down blessings upon Muhammad and Muhammad’s Household
and accept my and my parents’ repentance

segments.arabic: بِمَا تُبْتَ وَتَتُوبُ عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: bima tubta wa tatubu `ala jami`i khalqika

translation.en: through the means by which You did and will accept the repentance of all Your creatures.
O most merciful of all those who show mercy!
O He Who is called the All-forgiving, the All-merciful.
O He Who is called the All-forgiving, the All-merciful.
O He Who is called the All-forgiving, the All-merciful.
Pour down blessings upon Muhammad and Muhammad’s Household,
accept my repentance,
purify my deed,
appreciate my efforts,
have mercy upon my imploration,
do not interdict my voice,
and do not frustrate my prayers.
O Aide of those who seek aid!

segments.transliteration: wa abligh a'immati salami wa du`a'i

translation.en: And (please) convey my salutations and my prayers to my Leaders,

segments.transliteration: wa shaffi`hum fi jami`i ma sa'altuka

translation.en: accept their intercession for me with You in all of that which I have asked You for,

segments.arabic: وَأَوْصِلْ هَدِيَّتِي إِلَيْهِمِ كَمَا يَنْبَغي لَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa awsil hadiyyati ilayhim kama yanbaghi lahum

translation.en: deliver my present to them in a way befitting their status,

segments.arabic: وَزِدْهُمْ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ مَا يَنْبَغِي لَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa zid-hum min dhalika ma yanbaghi laka

translation.en: and multiply that for them in a way befitting You
with such folds that cannot be counted by anyone other than You.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

translation.en: There is neither might nor power except with Allah the All-High and All-great.
May Allah bless the purest of the Messengers
Muhammad and his Immaculate Household.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِىِّ اللهِ وَ ابْنَ اَوْلِيَآئِهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا سَفِيْرَ اللهِ وَ ابْنَ سُفَرَآئِهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waliyyal laahe wabna awleyaaa-eh assalaamo a’layka yaa safeeral laahe wabna sofaraaa-eh

translation.en: Peace be on the friend of Allah and the son of His friends Peace be on you, O ambassador of Allah and the son of His ambassadors

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُـجَّةَ اللهِ وَ ابْنَ حُـجَجِهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نُوْرَ اللهِ فِىْ ظُلُمَاتِ الْاَرْضِ وَ ابْنَ اَنْوَارِهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waliyyal laahe wabna awleyaaa-eh assalaamo a’layka yaa safeeral laahe wabna sofaraaa-eh

translation.en: Peace be on you O proof of Allah and son of His proofs Peace be on you, O light of Allah in the dark earth and the son of His lights

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَمُوْدَ الدِّيْنِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ الْاَنْبِیَآءِ وَ الْمُرْسَلِیْنَ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa a’moodad deen assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresal anbeyaaa-e wal mursaleen

translation.en: Peace be on you, O pillar of religion Peace be on you, O heir of the Prophets and the Messengers

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ نَجِيِّ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa aadama safwatil laah assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa noohin najiyyil laah

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Adam, the one chosen by Allah Peace be on you, O inheritor of Nuh, the confidant of Allah

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ اِبْرَاهِيْمَ خَلِيْلِ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ اِسْمَاعِيْلَ ذَبِيْحِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa ibraaheema khaleelil laah

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Ibrahim, the friend of Allah Peace be on you, O inheritor of Ismaaeel, the one to be sacrificed for Allah

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوْسٰى كَلِيْمِ اللهِ اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيْسٰى رُوْحِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa moosaa kaleemil laah assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa e’esaa roohil laah

translation.en: Peace be on you O inheritor of Moosa, the one who conversed with Allah Peace be on you, O inheritor of Eesaa, the spirit of Allah

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدٍ (حَبِيْبِ اللهِ وَ) رَسُوْلِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: ssalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa mohammadin (habeebil laahe wa) rasoolil laah

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Muhammad, (the beloved of Allah and) the Prophet of Allah

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ اَمِيْرِ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ اَبِيْ طَالِبٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ وَلِيِّ اللهِ وَ وَصِيِّ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa ameeril moameneena a’liyibne abee taalebin a’layhis salaamo waliyyil laahe wa wasiyye rasoolil laah

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of the Commander of the Faithful, Ali Ibn Abi Taalib, peace of Allah be on him, the friend of Allah, and the successor to the Prophet of Allah

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ فَاطِمَةَ الزَّهْرَآءِ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَآءِ الْعَالَمِيْنَ بِنْتِ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa faatemataz zahraaa-e sayyedate nesaaa-il a’alameena binte rasoolil laah

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Fatima al-Zahra, leader of the women of the Universe, daughter of the Prophet of Allah

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ الْحَسَنِ وَ الْحُسَيْنِ سَيِّدَيْ شَبَابِ اَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ (وَ سِبْطَيْ رَسُوْلِ اللهِ)
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresal hasane wal husaine sayyeday shabaabe ahlil jannate (wa sibtay rasoolil laah)

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of al-Hasan and al-Husain, the two leaders of all the youths in Paradise (and two grandsons of the Prophet of Allah)

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ سَيِّدِ السَّاجِدِيْنَ وَ زَيْنِ الْعَابِدِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa a’liyy ibnil husaine sayyedas saajedeena wa zaynil a’abedeen

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Ali ibn al-Husain, the leader of the prostrating ones and the adornment of the worshippers

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ بَاقِرِ عِلْمِ الْاَوَّلِيْنَ وَ الْآخِرِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa mohammad ibne a’liyyin baaqere i’lmil awwaleena wal aakhereen

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Muhammad ibn Ali, the one who splits knowledge of the first and last ones

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الصَّادِقِ الْبَارِّ التَّقِيِّ الْاَمِيْنِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa ja’far ibne mohammadenis saadeqil baarrit taqiyyil ameen

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Ja’far ibn Muhammad, the truthful, the virtuous one and trustworthy one

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوْسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ الْعَالِمِ الْكَاظِمِ الْحَفِيِّ الْحَلِيْمِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka yaa waaresa moosabne ja’farenil a’alemil kaazemil hafiyyil haleem

translation.en: Peace be on you, O inheritor of Moosa ibn Ja’far the knowledgeable, the suppressor of rage, the kind, the one of forbearance
Peace be on you, O truthful martyr

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْوَصِيُّ الرَّضِيُّ الْبَرُّ التَّقِيُّ الْوَفِيُّ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka ayyohal wasiyyur raziyyul barrut taqiyyul wafiyyo

translation.en: Peace be on you, O successor who Allah is pleased with, pious, virtuous one

segments.arabic: اَشْهَدُ اَنَّكَ قَدْ اَقَمْتَ الصَّلَاةَ وَ آتَيْتَ الزَّكَاةَ وَ اَمَرْتَ بِالْمَعْرُوْفِ وَ نَهَيْتَ عَنِ الْمُنْكَرِ وَ عَبَدْتَ اللهَ مُخْلِصًا حَتّٰى اَتَاكَ الْيَقِيْنُ
segments.transliteration: ash-hado annaka qad aqamtas salaata wa aataytaz zakaata wa amarta bil-ma’roofe wa nahayta a’nil munkare wa a’badtal laaha mukhlesan hattaa ataakal yaqeen

translation.en: I bear witness that you undertook the prayer and gave the zakat, enjoined the good and prohibited evil and worshipped Allah in all sincerity until death came to you

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا اِمَامَ قَصِيْبٍ وَ اِمَامَ نَجِيْبٍ وَ اِمَامَ بَعِيْدٍ قَرِيْبٍ وَ اِمَامَ مَسْمُوْمٍ غَرِيْبٍ
segments.transliteration: assalamo a’layka yaa emaama qaseebin wa emaama najeebin wa emaama ba-e’edeen qareebin wa emaama masmoomin ghareeb

translation.en: Peace be on you, O the great Imam, and the eminent Imam, one who is near, distant, one who was poisoned and stranger

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْعَالِمُ النَّبِيْهُ وَ الْقَدْرُ الْوَجِيْهُ النَّازِحُ عَنْ تُرْبَةِ جَدِّهِ وَ اَبِيْهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka ayyohal a’alemun nabeeho wal qadrul wajeehun naazeho a’n turbate jaddehi wa abeeh

translation.en: Peace be on you, O the exalted scholar having notable powers, one who is distant from the land of his grandfather and father

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى مَنْ اَمَرَ اَوْلَادَهُ وَ عِيَالَهُ بِالنِّيَاحَةِ عَلَيْهِ قَبْلَ وُصُوْلِ الْقَتْلِ اِلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa man amara awlaadahu wa e’yaalahu bin-neyaahate a’layhe qabla wosoolil qatle elayhe

translation.en: Peace be on the one who commanded his children and family to cry for him before he was killed

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى دِيَارِكُمُ الْمُوْحِشَاتِ كَمَا اسْتَوْحَشَتْ مِنْكُمْ مِنٰى وَ عَرَفَاتٌ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa deyaarekomul mooheshaate kamas tawha-shat minkum menaa wa a’rafaat

translation.en: Peace be on your lonely homes, just as Mina and ‘Arafat have been separated from you

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى سَادَاتِ الْعَبِيْدِ وَ عُدَّةِ الْوَعِيْدِ وَ الْبِئْرِ الْمُعَطَّلَةِ وَ الْقَصْرِ الْمَشِيْدِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa saadaadil a’beede wa u’ddatil wa-e’ede wal bearil mo-a’ttalate wal qasril masheed

translation.en: Peace be on the leader of slaves and the helper for the promised, on wells that are not used and on fortified palaces

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى غَوْثِ اللَّهْفَانِ وَ مَنْ صَارَتْ بِهِ اَرْضُ خُرَاسَانَ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa ghawsil lahfaane wa man saarat behi arzo khoraasaan

translation.en: Peace be on the sorrowful helper and the ones who travelled with him to Khorasan

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى قَلِيْلِ الزَّآئِرِيْنَ وَ قُرَّةِ عَيْنِ فَاطِمَةَ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَآءِ الْعَالَمِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa qaleeliz zaaa-ereena wa qurrate a’yne faatemata sayyedate nesaaa-il a’alameen

translation.en: Peace be on the one who has few visitors, and the delight of the eyes of Fatima, leader of the women of the Universe

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَى الْبَهْجَةِ الرَّضَوِيَّةِ وَ الْاَخْلَاقِ الرَّضِيَّةِ وَ الْغُصُوْنِ الْمُتَفَرِّعَةِ مِنَ الشَّجَرَةِ الْاَحْمَدِيَّةِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’lal bahjatir razawiyyate wal akhlaaqir raziyyate wal ghosoonil motafarre-a’te menash shajaratil ahmadiyyah

translation.en: Peace be on the peaceful, splendid branches from the tree of Ahmad

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى مَنِ انْتَهٰى اِلَيْهِ رِئَاسَةُ الْمُلْكِ الْاَعْظَمِ وَ عِلْمُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ لِتَمَامِ الْاَمْرِ الْمُحْكَمِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa manin tahaa elayhe re-aasatul mulkil a-a’zame wa i’lmo kulle shay-in le-tamaamil amril mohkam

translation.en: Peace be on the one to whom the leadership of the mighty kingdom reached, with the knowledge of everything to its ultimate, predestined end

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى مَنْ اَسْمَآؤُهُمْ وَسِيْلَةُ السَّائِلِيْنَ وَ هَيَاكِلُهُمْ اَمَانُ الْمَخْلُوْقِيْنَ وَ حُـجَجُهُمْ اِبْطَالُ شُبَهِ الْمُلْحِدِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa man asmaaa-ohum waseelatus saa-eleena wa hayaakelohum amaanul makhlooqeena wa hojajohum ibtaalo sho-bahil mulhedeen

translation.en: Peace be on those whose names are a medium for those who seek, their houses are a security for the creatures, their proofs nullify the uncertainty of those who deviate

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى مَنْ كُسِرَتْ لَهُ وِسَادَةُ وَالِدِهِ اَمِيْرِ الْمُؤْمِنِيْنَ حَتّٰى خَصَمَ اَهْلَ الْكُتُبِ وَ ثَبَّتَ قَوَاعِدَ الدِّيْنِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa man koserat lahu wesaadato waaledehi ameeril moameneena hattaa khasama ahlal kotobe wa sabbata qawaa-e’dad deen

translation.en: Peace be on the one for whom the cushion of his father, the Commander of the Faithful, was laid out so that he could dispute with the people of the book and strengthen the pillars of religion

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى عَلَمِ الْاَعْلَامِ وَ مَنْ كُسِرَتْ قُلُوْبُ شِيْعَتِهِ بِغُرْبَتِهِ اِلٰى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa a’lamil a-a’laame wa man koserat qoloobo shee-a’tehi be-ghurbatehi elaa yawmil qeyaamah

translation.en: Peace be on the distinguished one amongst the eminent ones, for whom the hearts of his Shi’as are broken due to his loneliness until the day of Judgment

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَى السِّرَاجِ الْوَهَّاجِ وَ الْبَحْرِ الْعَجَّاجِ الَّذِيْ صَارَتْ تُرْبَتُهُ مَهْبَطَ الْاَمْلَاكِ وَ الْمِعْرَاجِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’las seraajil wahhaaje wal bahril a’jjaajil lazee saarat turbatohu mahbatal amlaake wal me’raaj

translation.en: Peace be on the light of lights and the deep sea His dust has descended on different kingdoms and heavens

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى اُمَرَآءِ الْاِسْلَامِ وَ مُلُوْكِ الْاِيْمَانِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa omaraaa-il islaame wa molookil eemaan

translation.en: Peace be on the leaders of Islam and the rulers of faith

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى بَاهِرِيْ النُّوْرِ وَ طَاهِرِي الْوِلَادَةِ وَ مَنْ اَطْلَعَهُمُ اللهُ عَلٰى عُلُوْمِ الْغَيْبِ وَ الشَّهَادَةِ وَ جَعَلَهُمْ بِاِفْضَالِهِ مَنْبَعِ الْهُدٰی وَ مَعْدِنَ السَّعَادَةِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa baaherin noore wa taaheril welaadate wa man atla-a’homul laaho a’laa o’loomil ghaybe wash shahaadate wa ja-a’lahum be-ifzaalehi manba-i’l hodaa wa ma’denis sa-a’adah

translation.en: Peace be on brilliant light, and the ones born in purity, and for whom Allah has made knowledge of the unseen available, and made them source of guidance and treasure of prosperity by His bestowal

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى مَنِ ابْتَهَجَتْ بِهِ مَعَالِمُ طُوْسٍ حَيْثُ حَلَّ بِرَبْعِهَا
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa manib tahajat behi ma-a’alemo toosin hayso halla be-rab-e’haa

translation.en: Peace be on the one through whom the knowledge of Tus became adorned from the time you became its resting place

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى مُفْتَخَرِ الْاَبْرَارِ وَ نَائِيْ الْمَزَارِ وَ شَرْطِ دُخُوْلِ الْجَنَّةِ وَ النَّارِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laaa muftakharil abraare wa naa-il mazaare wa sharte dokhoolil jannate wan naar

translation.en: Peace be on the pride of the pious one, and the place where people visit, and the condition for entering heaven and hell

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى مَنْ لَمْ يَقْطَعِ اللهُ عَنْهُمْ صَلٰواتِهِ فِيْ آنَاءِ السَّاعَاتِ وَ بِهِمْ سَكَنَتِ السَّوَاكِنُ وَ تَحَرَّكَتِ الْمُتَحَرِّكَاتِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa man lam yaqta-i’l laaho a’nhum salaatehi fee aaa-naa-is saa-a’ate wa behim sakanatis sawaakeno wa taharrakatil motaharrekaat

translation.en: Peace be on the one for whom Allah has not cut off His blessings day and night, and through whom the people live and move

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى مَنْ جَعَلَ اِمَامَتَهُمْ مُـمَيِّزَةً بَيْنَ الْفَرِيْقَيْنِ كَمَا تَعَبَّدَ بِوَلَايَتِهِمْ اَهْلُ الْـخَافِقَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa man ja-a’la emaamatahum momayyezatan baynal fareeqayne kamaa ta-a’bbada be-welaayatehim ahlul khaafe-qeen

translation.en: Peace be on those whose Imamate Allah has made a distinguishing mark between two groups, the people of the east and the west become more devout by following them

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى مَنْ اَحْيَ اللهُ بِهِمْ دَارِسَ حِكَمِ النَّبِيِّيْنَ وَ ابْتَعَثَهُمْ بِوَلَايَتِهِمْ لِتَمَامِ كَلِمَةِ اللهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِيْنَ
segments.transliteration: ssalaamo a’laa man ahyal laaho behim daaresa hekamin nabiyyeena wab ta-a’sahum be-walaayatehim le-tamaame kalematil laahe rabbil a’alameen

translation.en: Peace be on the one through whom Allah has enlivened the wisdom of the Prophets and, by sending him, people become more devout so as to perfect the word of Allah, Lord of the Worlds

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى شُهُوْرِ الْحَوْلِ وَ عَدَدِ السَّاعَاتِ وَ عَدَدِ لَا اِلٰهَ اِلَّا اللهُ فِيْ رُقُوْمِ (الرُّقُوْمِ) الْمُسَطَّرَاتِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa shohooril hawle wa a’dadis saa-a’ate wa a’dade laa elaaha illal laaho fee roqoome (ar-roqoome) al-mosattaraat

translation.en: Peace be on the months of the year and number of hours and the number of Laa elaaha illal laah in the written document

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى اِقْبَالِ الدُّنْيَا وَ سُعُوْدِهَا وَ مَنْ سُئِلُوْا عَنْ كَلِمَةِ التَّوْحِيْدِ فَقَالُوْا نَحْنُ وَ اللهِ مِنْ شُرُوْطِهَا
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa iqbaalid dunyaa wa so-o’odehaa wa man so-eloo a’n kalematit tawheede faqaaloo nahno wal laahe min shorootehaa

translation.en: Peace be on the one [through whom] the world and it’s prosperity are to be approached and the one who, when asked about the words of unity, said: “By Allah, we are its conditions”

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى مَنْ يُعَلَّلُ وُجُوْدُ كُلِّ مَخْلُوْقٍ بِوِلَائِهِمْ وَ مَنْ خَطَبَتْ لَهُمُ الْخُطَبَآءُ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa man yo-a’llalo wojoodo kulle makhlooqin be-welaa-ehim wa man khatabat lahomul khota-baaa

translation.en: Peace be on the one whose friendship is the reason for the existence of every creature, the preachers address

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى مَنْ عَلَا مَجْدُهُمْ وَ ثَنَآؤُهُمْ وَ فَاقَ الْاَوَّلِيْنَ وَ الْآخِرِيْنَ اٰبَآؤُهُمْ وَ اَبْنَآئُهُمْ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa man a’laa majdohum wa sanaaa-ohum wa faaqal awwaleena wal aakhereena aabaaa-ohum wa abnaaa-ohum

translation.en: Peace be on the pride and glory of the pious one, and their fathers and sons are superior to the first and the last

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى مَنِ افْتَخَرَ الْفَخْرُ بِفَخْرِهِمْ وَ عَلَا بِهِمْ بِوُجُوْبِ الصَّلَاةِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَ طَهَارَةِ ثِيَابِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa manif takharal fakhro be-fakhrehim wa a’laa behim be-wojoobis salaate a’layhim wa tahaarate theyaabehim

translation.en: Peace be on those whose praises and adulations have been elevated, whose pride and elevated status have been known by the fact that sending blessings on them is obligatory (in the prayer), and by their purity and nobility

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى قَمَرِ الْاَقْمَارِ وَ فَخْرِ الْاَبْرَارِ الْمُتَكَلِّمِ مَعَ كُلِّ لُغَةٍ بِلِسَانِهِمُ الْقَائِلِ لِشِيْعَتِهِ مَا كَانَ اللهُ لِيُوَلِّيَ اِمَامًا عَلٰى اُمَّةٍ حَتّٰى يُعَرِّفُهُ بِلُغَاتِهِمْ وَ اَدْيَانِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa qamaril aqmaare wa fakhril abraaril motakalleme ma-a’ kulle loghatin be-lesaanehemul qaa-ele le-shee-a’tehi maa kaanal laaho le-yowaalleya emaaman a’laa ummatin hattaa yo-a’rrefohu be-loghaatehim wa adyaanehim

translation.en: Peace be on the moon of all moons, the pride of the righteous, the one who speaks to different people in their own languages, the one who said to his followers: “Allah would not impose an Imam on a community until He teaches him their language and ways”

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلٰى فُرْحَةِ الْقُلُوْبِ وَ فَرَجِ الْمَكْرُوْبِ وَ شَرِيْفِ الْاَشْرَافِ وَ مَفْخَرِ عَبْدِ مَنَافٍ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laa furhatil qoloobe wa farajil koroobe wa shareefil ashraafe wa mafkhare a’bde manaafin

translation.en: Peace be on the happiness of the heart, one who removes sorrow and the noble of all noble ones and the pride of ‘Abd al-Manaf

segments.arabic: يَا لَيْتَنِيْ كُنْتُ مِنَ الطَّآئِفِيْنَ بِعَرْصَةِ حَضْرَتِهِ مُسْتَشْهِدًا لِبَهْجَةِ مُؤَانَسَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: yaa laytanee kunto menat taaa-efeena be-a’rsate hazratehi mustashedan le-bahjate mo-aanasateh

translation.en: If only I was around his court and in his presence, I would give my life due to the joy of his friendship

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَى الْاِمَامِ الرَّؤُوْفِ الَّذِيْ هَيَّجَ اَحْزَانَ يَوْمِ الطُّفُوْفِ بِاللهِ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’lal emaamir ra-ooofil lazee hayyaja ahzaana yawmit tofoofe billaahe

translation.en: Peace be on the kind Imam who inspires sadness on the day of Aashooraa

segments.arabic: اُقْسِمُ وَ بِآبَائِكَ الْاَطْهَارِ وَ بِاَبْنَآئِكَ الْمُنْتَجَبِيْنَ الْاَبْرَارِ لَوْ لَا بُعْدُ الشُّقَّةِ حَيْثُ شَطَّتْ بِكُمُ الدَّارُ لَقَضَيْتُ بَعْضَ وَاجِبِ حَقِّكُمْ بِتَكْرَارِ الْمَزَارِ
segments.transliteration: uqsemo we be-aaa-baa-ekal athaare wa be-abnaaa-ekal muntajabeenal abraare law laa bo’dush shuqqate hayso shattat bekomud daaro laqazayto ba’za waajebe haqqekum be-takraaril mazaar

translation.en: I swear by Allah and by your pure fathers and the chosen ones amongst your pious children, had it not been for the excessive distance from home, I would have fulfilled some obligations by continuously visiting you

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا حُمَاةَ الدِّيْنِ وَ اَوْلَادَ النَّبِيِّيْنَ وَ سَادَةَ الْمَخْلُوْقِيْنَ وَ رَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهُ
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’laykum yaa homaatad deene wa awlaadan nabiyyeena wa saadatal makhlooqeena wa rahmatul laahe wa barakaatoh

translation.en: Peace be on you, O the protectors of religion, the children of the Prophets and the leaders of creation, may the mercy and blessings of Allah be on you

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسَىٰ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon `Ali the son of Musa,
the cordial, the well-pleased,
the Imam, the pious, the bright,

segments.arabic: وَحُجَّتِكَ عَلَىٰ مَنْ فَوْقَ ٱلأَرْضِ وَمَنْ تَحْتَ ٱلثَّرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa hujjatika `ala man fawqa al-ardi wa man tahta alththara

translation.en: Your argument against whoever is above the earth and whoever is beneath the dust,
and the ever-truthful and martyr
with such blessings that are very much, perfect, purified,
continuous, uninterrupted, and consecutive,

segments.arabic: كَأَفْضَلِ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَىٰ أَحَدٍ مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: ka'afdali ma sallayta `ala ahadin min awliya'ika

translation.en: and with the best form of blessings that You have ever bestowed upon any of Your intimate servants.

text.en: You may then direct to the tomb of Abu-Ja’far Muhammad ibn ‘Ali al-Jawad (‘a) whose tomb is in the back of the tomb of his grandfather (i.e. Imam al-Kazim). When you stop near the tomb, you may say the following words:
text.ar: الزيارة الخاصة بالإمام محمد التقي عليه‌السلام فقد قال فيها الاجلا الثلاثة أيضاً. ثم توجّه نحو قبر أبي جعفر محمد بن علي الجواد عليه‌السلام وهو بظهر جدّه عليه‌السلام ، فإذا وقفت عليه فقل :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O intimate servant of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s argument.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نُورَ ٱللَّهِ فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya nura allahi fi zulumati al-ardi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s light in the darkness of the earth.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.
Peace be upon you and upon your fathers.
Peace be upon you and upon your descendants.
Peace be upon you and upon your loyalists.
I bear witness that you performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rate,
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,
recited the Book as it should be recited,

segments.transliteration: wa jahadta fi allahi haqqa jihadihi

translation.en: strove for Allah as exactly as striving should be,
and endured harm for His sake
until death came upon you.
I have come to you, visiting you,
recognizing your right,
declaring loyalty to your loyalists,
and incurring the animosity of your enemies;
so, (please) intercede for me with Your Lord.

text.en: You may then kiss the tomb and put your both cheeks on it. You may then offer the two-unit prayer of ziyarah after which you may offer any other prayers. You may then prostrate yourself and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم قبل القبر وضع خدَّيك عليه ثم صلّ ركعتين للزيارة وصل بعدهما ما شئت. ثم اسجد وقل :

translation.en: (Please) have mercy upon him who had misbehaved and committed sins,
but he then submitted and confessed.

text.en: You may then place your right cheek on the ground and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم اقلب خدك الأيمن وقل :

translation.en: If I am the worst servant (of You),
then You are the All-excellent Lord.

text.en: You may then place your left cheek on the ground and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم اقلب خدّك الأيسر وقل :

translation.en: Your servant’s sin has been very flagrant,
then let Your pardon be very excellent.
O All-generous!

text.en: You may then return to the position of prostration and repeat the following word one hundred times:
text.ar: ثم عد إلى السجود وقل مائة مرة :

translation.en: Thanks.

text.en: You may then leave.
text.ar: ثم انصرف

text.en:
In his book of al-Mazar, Sayyid Ibn Tawus says:

After you visit Imam Musa al-Kazim (‘a), you may stop at the tomb of Imam al-Jawad (‘a), kiss it, and say the following words:
text.ar: زيارة أخرى للإمام محمد بن علي التقي عليه‌السلام قال السيد ابن طاووس في (المزار) : إذا زرت الإمام موسى الكاظم عليه‌السلام فقف على قبر الجواد عليه‌السلام وقبله وقل :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu-Ja`far
Muhammad the son of `Ali,
the righteous, pious,
and faithful leader.
Peace be upon you, O pleased and pure.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s intimate servant.
Peace be upon you, O confidentially talked by Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s emissary.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s secret.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s brightness.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s brilliance.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s Word.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s mercy.
Peace be upon you, O shining light.
Peace be upon you, O rising full moon.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلطَّيِّبُ مِنَ ٱلطَّيِّبِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O pure who is the descendant of the pure ones.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلطَّاهِرُ مِنَ ٱلْمُطَهَّرِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O immaculate who is the descendant of the the immaculate ones.
Peace be upon you, O greatest sign.
Peace be upon you, O grandest argument.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُطَهَّرُ مِنَ ٱلزَّلاَّتِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O purified from slips.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُنَزَّهُ عَنِ ٱلْمُعْضِلاَتِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O deemed above unforgivable failings.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْعَلِيُّ عَنْ نَقْصِ ٱلأَوْصَافِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O raised high against imperfect traits.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلرَّضِيُّ عِنْدَ ٱلأَشْرَافِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O pleased in the sight of the honorable ones.
Peace be upon you, O pillar of the religion.

segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka waliyyu allahi wa hujjatuhu fi ardihi

translation.en: I bear witness that you are the intimate servant of Allah,
the argument of Him in His lands,
the side of Allah, the best in the view of Allah,
the store of the knowledge of Allah and the knowledge of the Prophets,

segments.transliteration: wa ruknu al-imani wa tarjumanu alqur'ani

translation.en: the cornerstone of faith, and the interpreter of the Qur'an.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَقِّ وَٱلْهُدَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna man ittaba`aka `ala alhaqqi walhuda

translation.en: I also bear witness that whoever follows you has been on the right and true guidance

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّ مَنْ أَنْكَرَكَ وَنَصَبَ لَكَ ٱلْعَدَاوَةَ
segments.transliteration: wa anna man ankaraka wa nasaba laka al`adawata

translation.en: but whoever denies you and incurs your animosity
has been on deviation and perdition.

segments.arabic: أَبْرَأُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَيْكَ مِنْهُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: abra'u ila allahi wa ilayka minhum fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: I repudiate these in the presence of Allah and you in this world and in the Hereafter.

segments.arabic: وَٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مَا بَقِيتُ وَبَقِيَ ٱللَّيْلُ وَٱلنَّهَارُ
segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayka ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu

translation.en: Peace be upon you as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.

text.en: Invoking Almighty Allah’s blessings on Imam al-Jawad (‘a), you may say the following words:
text.ar: وقل في الصلاة عليه :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ahli baytihi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household,
send blessings upon Muhammad the son of `Ali,
the pure, the pious,
the righteous, the faithful,
the refined, the bright,
the guide of the nation,
the inheritor of the Imams,
the hoarder of mercy,
the spring of wisdom,
the leader of blessing,
the match of the Qur'an in obedience,

segments.transliteration: wa wahidi al-awsiya'i fi al-ikhlasi wal`ibadati

translation.en: the distinctive among the Successors in sincerity and worship,
Your premier argument,
Your highest example,
Your most excellent Word,
the caller to You,
and the director towards You,
whom You have appointed as signpost for Your servants,
interpreter of Your Book,
expounder of Your commands,
supporter of Your religion,
argument against Your creatures,
radiance through whom darkness is penetrated,
excellent example through whom true guidance is hit,
and intercessor through whom Paradise is won.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَكَمَا أَخَذَ فِي خُشُوعِهِ لَكَ حَظَّهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa kama akhadha fi khushu`ihi laka hazzahu

translation.en: O Allah, just as he took his share of reverence for You
and received completely his portion of fear of You,

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِ أَضْعَافَ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَىٰ وَلِيٍّ

translation.en: so (please) bless him with many folds of blessings that You have ever poured down on an intimate servant of You
whose obedience to You has been approved of by You
and whose servitude has been admitted by You.

segments.transliteration: wa ballighhu minna tahiyyatan wa salaman

translation.en: Convey to him greetings and salutations from us,

segments.arabic: وَآتِنَا فِي مُوَالاَتِهِ مِنْ لَدُنْكَ فَضْلًا وَإِحْسَاناً
segments.transliteration: wa atina fi muwalatihi min ladunka fadlan wa ihsanan

translation.en: and give us - from You on account of our loyalty to him - favors, kindness,
forgiveness, and pleasure.
You are verily the Lord of eternal favoring
and nice pardoning.

text.en: You may then offer the two-unit prayer of ziyarah. After accomplishment, you may say the supplication, which begins with this statement:
text.ar: ثم صل صلاة الزيارة وقل بعد السلام :

segments.transliteration: allahumma anta alrrabbu wa ana almarbubu

translation.en: O Allah, You are the Sustainer and I am the sustained.

segments.transliteration: wa anta alkhaliqu wa ana almakhluqu

translation.en: You are the Creator and I am the created.

segments.transliteration: wa anta almaliku wa ana almamluku

translation.en: You are the Owner and I am the owned.

segments.transliteration: wa anta almu`ti wa ana alssa'ilu

translation.en: You are the Granter and I am the beggar.

segments.transliteration: wa anta alrraziqu wa ana almarzuqu

translation.en: You are the Provider with sustenance and I am the receiver of sustenance.

segments.transliteration: wa anta alqadiru wa ana al`ajizu

translation.en: You are the All-powerful and I am the powerless.

segments.transliteration: wa anta alqawiyyu wa ana aldda`ifu

translation.en: You are the All-forceful and I am the weak.

segments.transliteration: wa anta almughithu wa ana almustaghithu

translation.en: You are the Aide and I am the seeker of aid.

segments.transliteration: wa anta aldda'imu wa ana alzza'ilu

translation.en: You are the Everlasting and I am destined to die.

segments.transliteration: wa anta alkabiru wa ana alhaqiru

translation.en: You are the Significant and I am the trivial.

segments.transliteration: wa anta al`azimu wa ana alssaghiru

translation.en: You are the Great and I am the tiny.

segments.transliteration: wa anta almawla wa ana al`abdu

translation.en: You are the Lord and I am the slave.

segments.transliteration: wa anta al`azizu wa ana aldhdhalilu

translation.en: You are the Almighty and I am the humble.

segments.transliteration: wa anta alrrafi`u wa ana alwadi`u

translation.en: You are the Elevated and I am the meek.

segments.transliteration: wa anta almudabbiru wa ana almudabbaru

translation.en: You are the Manager and I am managed.

segments.transliteration: wa anta albaqi wa ana alfani

translation.en: You are the Eternal and I am mortal.

segments.transliteration: wa anta alddayyanu wa ana almudanu

translation.en: You are the Judge and I am judged.

segments.transliteration: wa anta alba`ithu wa ana almab`uthu

translation.en: You are the Resurrector and I am resurrected.

segments.transliteration: wa anta alghaniyyu wa ana alfaqiru

translation.en: You are the Rich and I am the poor.

segments.transliteration: wa anta alhayyu wa ana almayyitu

translation.en: You are the Ever-living and I am subjected to death.

segments.arabic: تَجِدُ مَنْ تُعَذِّبُ يَا رَبِّ غَيْرِي
segments.transliteration: tajidu man tu`adhdhibu ya rabbi ghayri

translation.en: You, O my Lord, can find someone to torment other than me

segments.transliteration: wa la ajidu man yarhamuni ghayruka

translation.en: but I cannot find anyone to have mercy on me other than You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
hasten their Relief,
and have mercy on my humiliation before You,
my imploration to You,
my disassociation from people,
and my entertainment with You, O All-generous.

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ تَصَدَّقْ عَلَيَّ فِي هٰذِهِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ

translation.en: Then, (please) endue me at this very hour

segments.arabic: بِرَحْمَةٍ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ تُهَدِّئُ بِهَا قَلْبِي

translation.en: with mercy from You by which You tranquilize my heart,
bring together my affairs,
reunite my scattering,
whiten my face,
confer honor on my status,
relieve me from my burdens,

segments.arabic: وَتَغْفِرُ بِهَا مَا مَضَىٰ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي
segments.transliteration: wa taghfiru biha ma mada min dhunubi

translation.en: forgive my past sins,

segments.arabic: وَتَعْصِمُنِي فِي مَا بَقِيَ مِنْ عُمْرِي
segments.transliteration: wa ta`simuni fi ma baqiya min `umri

translation.en: protect me against sinning in the rest of my lifetime,
employ me in my entire lifetime
in acts of obedience to You and acts that bring about Your pleasure,
seal my deeds with the best of them,
decide Paradise to be my reward for that,
lead me to the path of the righteous,
help me do well with the virtuous of what You have given me

segments.arabic: كَمَا أَعَنْتَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ عَلَىٰ صَالِحِ مَا أَعْطَيْتَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: kama a`anta alssalihina `ala salihi ma a`taytahum

translation.en: in the same way as You have helped the righteous ones do well with what You have given them,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَنْزَعْ مِنِّي صَالِحاً أَعْطَيْتِنِيهِ أَبَداً
segments.transliteration: wa la tanza` minni salihan a`taytinihi abadan

translation.en: never deprive me of any virtuous thing that You have given me,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَرُدَّنِي فِي سُوءٍ ٱسْتَنْقَذْتَنِي مِنْهُ أَبَداً
segments.transliteration: wa la taruddani fi su'in istanqadhtani minhu abadan

translation.en: never send me back to a wicked matter from which You have saved me,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُشْمِتْ بِي عَدُوّاً وَلاَ حَاسِداً أَبَداً
segments.transliteration: wa la tushmit bi `aduwwan wa la hasidan abadan

translation.en: never make my enemy or one who envies me gloat at my misfortune,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَكِلْنِي إِلَىٰ نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ أَبَداً
segments.transliteration: wa la takilni ila nafsi tarfata `aynin abadan

translation.en: and never leave me alone with my own affairs even for a winking of an eye

segments.arabic: وَلاَ أَقَلَّ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ وَلاَ أَكْثَرَ
segments.transliteration: wa la aqalla min dhalika wa la akthara

translation.en: or less or more than that.
O Lord of the worlds!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
show the right as it is in reality so that I will follow it
and the wrong as it is in reality so that I will shun it,
never confuse the right and the wrong for me;
lest I will follow my own desires without finding true guidance from You.
And (please) cause all my desires to follow the obedience to You,

segments.transliteration: wa khudh rida nafsika min nafsi

translation.en: take the pleasure of You from the pleasure of myself,

segments.arabic: وَٱهْدِنِي لِمَا ٱخْتُلِفَ فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ بِإِذْنِكَ
segments.transliteration: wahdini lima ikhtulifa fihi min alhaqqi bi'idhnika

translation.en: and guide me to the right about which disagreement has taken place by permission of You;

segments.arabic: إِنَّكَ تَهْدِي مَنْ تَشَاءُ إِلَىٰ صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ
segments.transliteration: innaka tahdi man tasha'u ila siratin mustaqimin

translation.en: verily, You guide whomever You wish to a straight path.

text.en:
Another Form of Ziyarah of Imam Al-jawad. In man-la-yahzuruhu’l-faqih, Shaykh al-Saduq has reported the following:

When you intend to visit Imam al-Jawad (‘a), you may bathe yourself and put on two clean (and ceremonially pure) pieces of clothes. You may then say the following words:
text.ar: زيارة أخرى مختصه به عليه‌السلام روى الصدوق في (الفقيه) قال : إذا أردت زيارته فاغتسل وتنظف وألبس ثوبين طاهرين وقل في زيارته :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad the son of `Ali,
the pious, bright,
pleasing, and pleased Imam
and Your argument against all those who are on the earth
and those who are beneath the ground
with such blessings that are plentiful,
ever-increasing, pure, blessed,
continuous, consecutive, and uninterrupted

segments.arabic: كَأَفْضَلِ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَىٰ أَحَدٍ مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: ka'afdali ma sallayta `ala ahadin min awliya'ika

translation.en: and with the most excellent blessings that You have ever conferred upon any of Your intimate servants.
And peace be upon you, O Allah’s most intimate servant.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s brightness.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s argument.
Peace be upon you, O leader of the believers,
inheritor of the knowledge of the Prophets,
and descendant of the Prophets’ successors.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نُورَ ٱللَّهِ فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya nura allahi fi zulumati al-ardi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s light in the darkness of the earth.
I have come to you, visiting you,
recognizing your right,
incurring the animosity of your enemies,
and showing loyalty to your loyalists.
So, (please) intercede for me with your Lord.

text.en: You may then pray Almighty Allah to grant you your personal needs.
text.ar: ثم سل حاجتك.

text.en: You may then offer two prayers with four units under the dome that is over the tomb of Imam al-Jawad (‘a) to the side of his head; a prayer for visiting Imam al-Kazim (‘a) and another prayer for visiting Imam al-Jawad (‘a). Do not offer a prayer to the side of Imam al-Kazim’s head, because this side is facing the graves of the people of Quraysh, which is impermissible to be taken as direction of prayer (i.e. kiblah).
text.ar: ثم صلّ في القبة التي فيها قبر محمد بن علي عليه‌السلام عند رأسه أربع ركعات ، ركعتين لزيارة موسى الكاظم عليه‌السلام ، وركعتين لزيارة محمد التقي عليه‌السلام ولاتصل عند رأس موسى الكاظم عليه‌السلام فإنه يقابل قبور قريش ولا يجوز اتخاذها قبلة

text.en: Another Ziyarat
text.ar: زيارة أخرى مرويّة له عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: Peace be upon the most straight door (to true guidance),
the most upright path,
the Divinely supported knower,
the spring of wisdoms,
the lantern in darkness,
the chief of Arabs and non-Arabs,
the guide to orthodoxy,
and the granted success by means of support and leading to trueness;
my master Abu-Ja`far
Muhammad the son of `Ali the Magnanimous.
I bear witness that you are the intimate servant of Allah;
you performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rate,
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,

segments.arabic: وَجَاهَدْتَ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ حَقَّ جِهَادِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa jahadta fi sabili allahi haqqa jihadihi

translation.en: strove in the way of Allah as exactly as strife should be,

segments.arabic: وَعَبَدْتَ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصاً حَتَّىٰ أَتَاكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
segments.transliteration: wa `abadta allaha mukhlisan hatta ataka alyaqinu

translation.en: and served Allah sincerely until death came upon you.
So, you lived happily
and passed away as martyr.
Would that I were with you,
then should I achieve a great success.
Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسَىٰ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadi bni `aliyyi bni musa

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad the son of `Ali the son of Musa,
the epitome of piety,
the illumination of true guidance,
the essence of faithfulness,
the branch of the bright ones,
the vicegerent of the Successors,
and Your trustee on Your revelations.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا هَدَيْتَ بِهِ مِنَ ٱلضَّلاَلَةِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakama hadayta bihi min alddalalati

translation.en: O Allah, as You have guided through him against straying off,
saved against confusion,
directed those who were rightly guided,
and purified those who were purified,
so also (please) bless him
with the most favorite blessings that You have ever conferred
upon any of Your intimate servants and agents of Your Successors.
Verily, You are Almighty, All-wise.

text.en: In his book of Misbah al-Za’ir, Sayyid Ibn Tawus has restricted to each of the two Imams (namely, al-Hadi and al-’Askari) a long form of ziyarah, form of invocation of Allah’s blessing on them, and a supplicatory prayer to be said after the Ziyarah Prayer.Because these forms of ziyarah are full of excellent points, we will mention them hereinafter even if this may lead us to extend the book.Sayyid Ibn Tawus says:When you arrive at the holy place of Imam al-Hadi (‘a) in Samarra’, you may immediately perform the ritual bathing of ziyarah, put on the cleanest of your clothes, and walk with tranquility and gravity towards the holy shrine. When you reach the gate, you may ask permission of entrance, by saying the following words:
text.ar: السيد ابن طاووس قد خصّ في (مصباح الزائر) كل واحد منهما عليهما‌السلام بزيارة مبسوطة وصلاة عليه ودعاء يدعى به بعد صلاة زيارته وهي بما تحتويها من الفوائد تبعثنا على إيرادها هنا وإن أوجبت التطويل. قال : إذا وصلت إلى محلّه الشريف بسرّ من رأى فاغتسل عند وصولك غسل الزيارة والبس أطهر ثيابك وامش على سكينة ووقار إلى أن تصل الباب الشريف فإذا بلغته فاستأذن وقل :

translation.en: May I enter, O Prophet of Allah?
May I enter, O Commander of the Faithful?
May I enter, O Fatimah the luminous
and the doyenne of the women of the world?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ ٱلْحَسَنُ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mawlaya alhasanu bna Aliyyin

translation.en: May I enter, O my master al-Hasan the son of Ali?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ ٱلْحُسَيْنُ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mawlaya alhusaynu bna Aliyyin

translation.en: May I enter, O my master al-Husayn the son of Ali?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ عَلِيُّ بْنَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mawlaya Aliyyu bna alhusayni

translation.en: May I enter, O my master Ali the son of al-Husayn?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mawlaya muhammadu bna Aliyyin

translation.en: May I enter, O my master Muhammad the son of Ali?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ جَعْفَرُ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mawlaya ja`faru bna muhammadin

translation.en: May I enter, O my master Ja`far the son of Muhammad?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ مُوسَىٰ بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ

translation.en: May I enter, O my master Musa the son of Ja`far?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ عَلِيُّ بْنَ مُوسَىٰ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mawlaya Aliyyu bna musa

translation.en: May I enter, O my master Ali the son of Musa?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mawlaya muhammadu bna Aliyyin

translation.en: May I enter, O my master Muhammad the son of Ali?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا ابَا ٱلْحَسَنِ عَلِيُّ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mawlaya yaabaalhasani Aliyyu bna muhammadin

translation.en: May I enter, O my master Abul-Hasan Ali the son of Muhammad?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا ابَا مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلْحَسَنُ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mawlaya yaabamuhammadin alhasanu bna Aliyyin

translation.en: May I enter, O my master Abu-Muhammad al-Hasan the son of Ali?
May I enter, O angels of Allah
whom are assigned to manage this holy sanctuary?

text.en: You may then enter the holy shrine preceding your right foot to the left. When you stop on the tomb of Imam Abu’l-Hasan al-Hadi, peace be upon him, directing your face towards the tomb and your back towards the kiblah direction, you may repeat the following word one hundred times:
text.ar: ثم تدخل مقدّما رجلك اليمنى وتقف على ضريح الإمام أبي الحسن الهادي عليه‌السلام مستقبلاً القبر ومستدبراً القبلة وتقول مائة مرة :

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great.

text.en: You may then say the following words:
text.ar: وتقول :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abul-Hasan
Ali the son of Muhammad,
the pious, right-directing,
and brightly shining light.
Allahs mercy and blessings be upon you.
Peace be upon you, O sincerely attached friend of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O confidant of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O rope of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O household of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O select of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O choice of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O trustee of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O proof of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O most-beloved by Allah.
Peace be upon you, O light of the lights.
Peace be upon you, O pride of the virtuous ones.
Peace be upon you, O descendant of the upright ones.
Peace be upon you, O essence of the purified ones.
Peace be upon you, O argument of the All-beneficent God.
Peace be upon you, O essence of the true faith.
Peace be upon you, O master of the believers.
Peace be upon you, O guardian of the righteous ones.
Peace be upon you, O symbol of true guidance.
Peace be upon you, O ally of piety.
Peace be upon you, O mainstay of the religion.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَاتَمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the seal of the Prophets.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the Prophets successors.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah the Luminous
and the doyenne of the women of the world.
Peace be upon you, O faithful trustee.
Peace be upon you, O favorite epitome.
Peace be upon you, O ascetic and pious.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ ايُّهَا ٱلْحُجَّةُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْخَلْقِ اجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu Alayka ayyuha alhujjatu Ala alkhalqi ajma`ina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O decisive argument against all creatures.
Peace be upon you, O succeeding of the Qur'an.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ ايُّهَا ٱلْمُبَيِّنُ لِلْحَلاَلِ مِنَ ٱلْحَرَامِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu Alayka ayyuha almubayyinu lilhalali min alharami

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O distinguishing between the lawful and the unlawful.
Peace be upon you, O sincere saint.
Peace be upon you, O evident course.
Peace be upon you, O bright star.

segments.arabic: اشْهَدُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا ابَا ٱلْحَسَنِ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu ya mawlaya ya aba alhasani

translation.en: I bear witness, O my master Abul-Hasan,
that you are verily the decisive argument of Allah against His creatures,
His representative among His created beings,
His trusted administrator in His lands,
and His witness over His servants.
I also bear witness that you are verily the word of piety,
the door to true guidance,
the Firmest Handle,
and the evident proof against those who are on the earth
and those who are beneath the layers of the soil.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka almutahharu min aldhdhunubi

translation.en: I bear witness that you are purified from sins,
cleaned against defects,
bestowed with the honor of Allah,
endued with the proof of Allah,
granted the Word of Allah,
and the stronghold to whom the servants (of Allah) resort
and by whom the lands are revived.
I bear witness, O my master,

segments.arabic: انِّي بِكَ وَبِآبَائِكَ وَابْنَائِكَ مُوقِنٌ مُقِرٌّ
segments.transliteration: anni bika wa bi'aba'ika wa abna'ika muqinun muqirrun

translation.en: that I have faith in and I submit to you, your forefathers and your sons,

segments.transliteration: wa lakum tabi`un fi dhati nafsi

translation.en: I follow all of you in my personal affairs,
in my religious performance,
in the seals of my deed,
and in my return and final place.
I do show loyalty to your loyalists,
I show enmity towards your enemies,
I believe in all of the invisible and the visible,
and the first and the last of you.
May Allah accept my father and mother as ransoms for you.

segments.transliteration: walssalamu Alayka wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allahs mercy and blessings be upon you.

text.en: You may then kiss the tomb and place your right and then left cheeks on it and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم قبّل ضريحه وضع خدّك الأيمن عليه ثم الأيسر وقل :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma Ľalli Ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and send blessings upon Your faithful demonstrator,
Your sagacious representative,
Your well-pleased trustee,
Your sincerely attached guide,
Your Right Path,
the most important approach,
the just and equitable course,
the light of the faithful believers hearts,
the friend of the pious ones,
and the comrade of the sincere.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَاهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma Ľalli Ala sayyidina muhammadin wa ahli baytihi

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon our Master Muhammad and upon his Household

segments.transliteration: wa Ľalli Ala Aliyyi bni muhammadin

translation.en: and send blessings upon Ali the son of Muhammad,
the rightly-directing, the infallible guide,
the free from defects,
who, putting hope in You, kept himself aloof from temptations,
who was tried (by You) through seditious matters,
who was tested (by You) through tribulations,
who was examined (by You) through acting excellently towards misfortunes,
and through steadfastness against complaining;
(he is) the spiritual guide of Your servants,
the blessing for Your lands,
the destination of Your mercy,
the hoarder of Your wisdom,
the leader to Your Paradise,
the all-knowledgeable among Your created beings,
the true guide of Your creatures,
whom You pleased, preferred,
selected to take the place of Your Prophet among his people,
and bounded with the guardianship of his laws.
So, he accomplished the onerous task of representation (of the Prophet),
carrying it perfectly,
and undertaking the responsibility of bearing it.
He neither slipped in any problematic action
nor did he fail to solve any complexity.
Rather, he relieved all agonies,
sealed the loopholes,
and fulfilled the required.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا اقْرَرْتَ نَاظِرَ نَبِيِّكَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakama aqrarta nazira nabiyyika bihi

translation.en: O Allah, just as You made him a source of delight for Your Prophet,
so also (please) raise him to the most elevated position,
give him the most fitting reward that suits him,
bless him,

segments.transliteration: wa ballighhu minna tahiyyatan wa salaman

translation.en: convey our greetings and salutations to him,

segments.arabic: وَآتِنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ فِي مُوَالاَتِهِ فَضْلاًَ وَإِِحْسَاناً
segments.transliteration: wa atina min ladunka fi muwalatihi fadlan wa ihsanan

translation.en: and give us, on account of our love for him, from You bounties, favors,
amnesty, and approval.
Verily, You are the Lord of superabundant favors.

text.en:
You may then offer the Ziyarah Prayer. When you accomplish, you
may say the following supplicatory prayer:
text.ar: ثم تصلّي صلاة الزيارة فإذا سلّمت فقل :

translation.en: O Lord of omnipotent power!
O Lord of all-inclusive mercy!
O Lord of successive favors!
O Lord of uninterrupted bounties!
O Lord of magnificent bestowals!
O Lord of abundant conferrals!

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلصَّادِقِينَ
segments.transliteration: Ľalli Ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin alĽĽadiqina

translation.en: (Please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad the veracious ones,
grant me that which I ask from You,
re-unify me (with my family),
unite me (with my family),
purify my deeds,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُزِغْ قَلْبِي بَعْدَ إِِذْ هَدَيْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa la tuzigh qalbi ba`da idh hadaytani

translation.en: cause not my heart to stray after You have guided me,
cause not my footstep to slip,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَكِلْنِي إِلَىٰ نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ ابَداً
segments.transliteration: wa la takilni ila nafsi tarfata Aynin abadan

translation.en: never refer me to myself even for a time as short as a wink of an eye,
disappoint not my desire,
expose not my private parts,
disclose not my covering,
cause me not to feel lonely, despair me not,
be to me kind and merciful,
guide me (to the right path), make me grow,
purify me, cleanse me,
dedicate me to You, select me, render me suitable,
arrange me for You alone, attach me to Yourself,
draw me near You, take me not far away from You,

segments.transliteration: wa qarribni ilayka wa la tuba`idni minka

translation.en: be kind to me, do not turn away from me,
honor me, do not humiliate me,
do not deprive me of all that which I ask from You,
and give me altogether all that which I have not asked from You.
(Please do all that) in the name of Your mercy, O most merciful of all those who show mercy.
I also beseech You in the name of the sacredness of Your Honorable Face,
the sanctity of Your Prophet Muhammad,
may Your blessings be upon him and upon his Household,
and the sanctity of Your Prophets Household;
namely, Ali the Commander of the Faithful,
al-Hasan, al-Husayn,
Ali, Muhammad,
Ja`far, Musa,
Ali, Muhammad,
Ali, al-Hasan,
and the Remaining Successor;
may Your benedictions and blessings be upon them all,
(I beseech You in their names) to send blessings upon all of them,
hasten the Relief of their Rising Imam by Your permission,
support him, betake him as the means of victory of Your religion,

segments.transliteration: wa tanĽurahu wa tantaĽira bihi lidinika

translation.en: and include me with those who shall be redeemed through him

segments.transliteration: wa tajAlani fi jumlati alnnajina bihi

translation.en: and those who act sincerely in obedience to him.
I also beseech You in the name of their right
to respond to my prayer,
grant me my needs,
answer my requests,
and save me from whatever aggrieves me
from the affairs of this world as well as the world to come.
O most merciful of all those who show mercy!
O Light! O Evident!
O Granter of light! O Granter of evidence!
O Lord! (Please do) save me from all evils
and from vicissitudes of time.
I also beseech You for redemption
on the Day when the Trumpet is blown.

text.en:
You may then pray Almighty Allah for anything you wish.
You may also repeat the following supplicatory prayer as many
times as possible:
text.ar: وادع بما شئت وأكثر من قولك :

translation.en: O my means when I lack means!
O my hope and my trust!
O my haven and my support!
O One! O One and Only!

segments.transliteration: wa ya qul huwa allahu ahadun

translation.en: O (described in) "Say: He is Allah, the One."

segments.arabic: اسْالُكَ ٱللَّهُمَّ بِحَقِّ مَنْ خَلَقْتَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka allahumma bihaqqi man khalaqta min khalqika

translation.en: I beseech You in the name of those whom You created from among Your creations

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ تَجْعَلْ فِي خَلْقِكَ مِثْلَهُمْ احَداً
segments.transliteration: wa lam tajAl fi khalqika mithlahum ahadan

translation.en: but You have not made anyone to be like them at all,
(please do) send blessings upon them all...

text.en: You may now submit your requests (before Almighty Allah). Imam al-Hadi, peace be upon him, is reported to have said, “I have besought Allah the Almighty and All-majestic not to disappoint any one who says this supplicatory prayer in my shrine.”
text.ar: وسل حوائجك عوض هذه الكلمة فقد روي عنه (صلوات الله عليه) أنّه قال : إنّني دعوت الله عزَّ وجلَّ أن لا يخيب من دعا به في مشهدي بعدي.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma Ľalli Ala Aliyyi bni muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Ali the son of Muhammad,
the successor of the Successors,
the leader of the pious,
the descendant of the leaders of the religion,
and the argument against all of the creatures.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ كَمَا جَعَلْتَهُ نُوراً يَسْتَضِيءُ بِهِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma kama jaAltahu nuran yastadi'u bihi almu'minuna

translation.en: O Allah, as You have made him the source of light from which the believers derive light,
and so he conveyed the good tidings of Your abundant reward,
warned against Your painful punishment,
notified against Your prowess,
reminded of Your sings,
rendered legal that which You have deemed legal,
rendered illegal that which You have deemed illegal,
explained Your laws and the duties towards You,
encouraged on servitude to You,
enjoined obedience to You,
and forbade disobedience to You,
so also (please) bless him
with the most favorite blessings that You have ever bestowed
upon any of Your intimate servants and descendants of Your Prophets.
O God of the Worlds!

text.en:
Shaykh al-Tusi has reported through a considerable chain of authority that Imam al-Hasan al-’Askari (‘a) said, “My grave will be in Surra-man-Ra’a (currently Samarra’). It will be shelter for the people of the two parties.” Explaining this saying, Shaykh al-Majlisi says that ‘people of the two parties’ means the Shi’ah and the Sunnah. This means that the virtue of the Imam (‘a) includes both his adherents and his enemies. Similarly, the holy tomb of Imam al-Kazim and Imam al-Jawad is shelter for the people of Baghdad.Sayyid Ibn Tawus says that once you intend to visit the holy tomb of Imam al-Hasan al-’Askari (‘a), you may do all the prefatory acts of visiting Imam ‘Ali al-Hadi (‘a), as previously cited.

You may then stop at the tomb and say the following words:
text.ar: روى الشيخ بسند معتبر عنه عليه‌السلام قال : قبري بسر من رأى أمان لأهل الجانبين. وقد فسر المجلسي الأول كلمة أهل الجانبين بالشيعة وأهل السنّة وقال : إنّ فضله عليه‌السلام يعمّ الموالي والمعادي ، كما إنّ قبر الكاظمين أمان لبغداد ... الخ. وقال السيد ابن طاووس : إذا أردت زيارة أبي محمد الحسن العسكري عليه‌السلام فليكن بعد عمل جميع ماقدّمناه في زيارة أبيه الهادي عليه‌السلام ثم قف على ضريحه عليه‌السلام وقل :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O my Master

segments.arabic: يَا ابَا مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلْحَسَنُ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ

translation.en: Abu-Muhammad al-Hasan the son of `Ali,
the guide and well-guided.
Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ اوْلِيَائِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waliyya allahi wabna awliya'ihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s intimate servant and son of Allah’s intimate servants.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ حُجَجِهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s decisive Argument and son of Allah’s decisive Arguments.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَفِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ اصْفِيَائِهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s elite and son of Allah’s elite ones.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَلِيفَةَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ خُلَفَائِهِ وَابَا خَلِيفَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka yakhalifata allahi wabna khulafa'ihi wa abakhalifatihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s representative, son of Allah’s representatives, and father of His representative.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَاتَمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Seal of the Prophets.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the Prophets’ successors.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ امِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the doyenne of all women of the world.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ ٱلائِمَّةِ ٱلْهَادِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the guiding leaders.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ ٱلاوْصِيَاءِ ٱلرَّاشِدِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the orthodox successors (of the Prophets.)
Peace be upon you, O shelter of the pious ones.
Peace be upon you, O leader of the winning party.
Peace be upon you, O haven of the (true) believers.
Peace be upon you, O relief of the aggrieved ones.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ ٱلانْبِيَاءِ ٱلْمُنْتَجَبِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O heir of the Prophets: the choice ones.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَازِنَ عِلْمِ وَصِيِّ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O keeper of the knowledge of the successor of Allah’s Messenger.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ ايُّهَا ٱلدَّاعِي بِحُكْمِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O he who invites to the judgment of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ ايُّهَا ٱلنَّاطِقُ بِكِتَابِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O he who speaks with the Book of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O prime Argument of all the arguments (of Allah.)
Peace be upon you, O guide of all nations.
Peace be upon you, O source of all bounties.
Peace be upon you, O store of knowledge.
Peace be upon you, O ark of forbearance.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ابَا ٱلإِمَامِ ٱلْمُنْتَظَرِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O father of the Awaited Imam:
whose claim is evident for the rational people,
whose recognition is fixed in the most certain things,
whom is concealed against the eyes of the oppressors,
whom is hidden from the regimes of the faithless authorities,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْمُعيدِ رَبُّنَا بِهِ ٱلإِسْلاَمَ جَدِيداً بَعْدَ ٱلإِنْطِمَاسِ
segments.transliteration: walmu`idi rabbanabihi al-islama jadidan ba`da al-intimasi

translation.en: and through whom our Lord shall recover Islam over again after it will be effaced
and He shall recover the Qur'an fresh over again after it will be eradicated.

segments.transliteration: ashhadu ya mawlaya annaka aqamta alssalata

translation.en: O master, I bear witness that you performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rate,
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,
called to the way of your Lord
with wisdom and goodly exhortation,
and worshipped Allah sincerely
until death came upon you.

segments.arabic: اسْالُ ٱللَّهَ بِٱلشَّانِ ٱلَّذِي لَكُمْ عِنْدَهُ

translation.en: I thus beseech Allah in the name of the rank that you enjoy with Him
to accept my visit to you,
receive my efforts with gratitude,
respond to my prayers through you,
and include me with the supporters of the truth,
its followers, its adherents,
its devotees, and its lovers.

segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayka wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

text.en: You may then kiss the tomb, place your right and then left cheeks on it, and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم قبل ضريحه وضع خدّك الأيمن عليه ثم الأيسر وقل :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَاهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala sayyidina muhammadin wa ahli baytihi

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon our master Muhammad and his Household
and send blessings upon al-Hasan the son of `Ali
who guides to Your religion
and calls to Your way,
who is the sign of true guidance,
the lantern of true piety,
the essence of rationality,
the resource of reason,
the raining cloud over mankind,
the cloud of wisdom,
the ocean of admonition,
the heir of the Imams,
the witness over the (Muslim) community,
the sinless, the well-mannered,
the virtuous, the favorable (by Allah),
the purified against filth,
and the one whom You have given the knowledge of the (Holy) Book in inheritance,
You have inspired with clear judgment,
You have appointed as the leading sign for those who follow the direction You have decided,
You have decided the obedience to him to be attached to the obedience to You,
and You have imposed the love for him upon all Your creatures.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا انَابَ بِحُسْنِ ٱلإِخْلاَصِ فِي تَوْحِيدِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakama anaba bihusni al-ikhlasi fi tawhidika

translation.en: O Allah, as he always turned to You with excellent sincerity in Your Oneness,

segments.transliteration: wa arda man khada fi tashbihika

translation.en: argued and defeated those who anthropomorphized You,
and defended those who faithfully believed in You;
so, O my Lord, (please) pour down on him Your blessings
due to which he joins the rank of those who behave humbly toward You
and due to which he surmounts in Paradise
to the rank of his forefather the Seal of the Prophets.

segments.transliteration: wa ballighhu minna tahiyyatan wa salaman

translation.en: And (please do) convey to him greetings and compliments from us,

segments.transliteration: wa atina min ladunka fi muwalatihi

translation.en: grant us from You, on account of our loyalty to him,
favor and benevolence
and also grant us forgiveness and gratification,
for You are most certainly the Lord of enormous favor
and huge bliss.

text.en:
You may then offer the two-unit prayer of ziyarah. When you
accomplish, you may say the following supplicatory prayer:
text.ar: ثم تصلي صلاة الزيارة فإذا فرغت قل :

translation.en: O All-eternal Lord! O All-everlasting!
O Ever-living! O All-subsisting!
O Reliever of agonies and grief!
O Soother of anguishes!
O Appointer of Messengers!
O Truthful to what You promise!

segments.arabic: وَيَا حَيُّ لاََ إِِلٰهَ إِِلاَّ انْتَ
segments.transliteration: wa ya hayyu la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: O Ever-living! there is no deity save You.
I beg You in the name of Your dear one Muhammad
and in the name of his successor `Ali his cousin
and the husband of his daughter,
through both of whom You have sealed Your laws
and opened the interpretation and Your pioneering ordains.
So, (please do) send upon both of them blessings
that are witnessed by the ancient and the coming generations
and by which the intimate servants and the righteous ones are saved.
I also beg You in the name of Fatimah the Luminous,
the mother of the well-guided Imams,
and the Doyenne of the women of the worlds,
who shall be allowed to intercede for the adherents of her immaculate descendants.
So, (please do) send upon her blessings that are as endless
as ages and as endless as times.
I also beg You in the name of al-Hasanthe pleased,
the infallible, and the pure,
and in the name of al-Husayn the oppressed,
the pleased, the pious, and the righteous;
(they both are) the masters of the youth of Paradise,
the two Imams who are virtuous,
infallible, pious,
pure, immaculate,
martyred, oppressed, and slain.

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِمَا مَا طَلَعَتْ شَمْسٌ وَمَا غَرَبَتْ
segments.transliteration: fasalli `alayhima ma tala`at shamsun wa ma gharabat

translation.en: So, (please do) send upon them blessings whenever the sun rises and sets;
blessings that are consecutive and successive.

segments.transliteration: wa atawassalu ilayka bi`aliyyi bni alhusayni

translation.en: I also beg You in the name of `Ali the son of al-Husayn
the chief of the worshippers
and the concealed for fear of the oppressors,
and in the name of Muhammad the son of `Ali,
the splitter of knowledge, the pure,
the glowing light.
(They both are) the two Imams and masters,
the keys to blessings,
and the lanterns in the murk.

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِمَا مَا سَرَىٰ لَيْلٌ وَمَا اضَاءَ نَهَارٌ
segments.transliteration: fasalli `alayhima ma sara laylun wa ma ada'a naharun

translation.en: So, (please) send blessings upon them whenever night comes and whenever daylight rises;
such blessings that are ceaseless.

segments.transliteration: wa atawassalu ilayka bija`fari bni muhammadin

translation.en: I also beg You in the name of Ja`far the son of Muhammad,
the truthful in what he conveys from Allah
and the spokesman of Allah’s knowledge
and in the name of Musa the son of Ja`far,
the self-righteous servant (of Allah)
and the well-whishing successor (of the Prophet);
(they both are) the two guiding and well-guided Imams
and the two adequate and saving Imams.

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِمَا مَا سَبَّحَ لَكَ مَلَكٌ

translation.en: So, (please) send upon them blessings whenever an angel glorifies You
and whenever a planet moves;
such blessings that are increasable and growing

segments.transliteration: wa la tafna wa la tabidu

translation.en: and neither ending nor stopping.

segments.arabic: وَاتَوَسَّلُ إِِلَيْكَ بِعَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسَىٰ ٱلرِّضَا
segments.transliteration: wa atawassalu ilayka bi`aliyyi bni musa alrrida

translation.en: I also beg You in the name of `Ali the son of Musa the well-pleased
and in the name of Muhammad the son of `Ali the well-contented;
the two purified and divinely selected Imams.

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَيْهِمَا مَا اضَاءَ صُبْحٌ وَدَامَ
segments.transliteration: fasalli `alayhima ma ada'a subhun wa dama

translation.en: So, (please) send upon them blessings whenever morning glows and endures
with such blessings that take them up to the rank of Your pleasure
in the highest level of the gardens of Your Paradise.

segments.arabic: وَاتَوَسَّلُ إِِلَيْكَ بِعَليِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلرَّاشِدِ
segments.transliteration: wa atawassalu ilayka bi`aliyyi bni muhammadin alrrashidi
