translation.en: I also beg You in the name of `Ali the son of Muhammad the rightly-directing
and in the name of al-Hasan the son of `Ali the guide;
the two Imams who supervise the affairs of Your servants,
whom are tested by unbearable ordeals,
and who acted patiently against the swerving enmities.
So, (please do) send upon them blessings that are suitable to the reward of the enduring people
and worth being the prize of the winners;
such blessings that pave for them the way to exaltation.

segments.transliteration: wa atawassalu ilayka ya rabbi bi'imamina

translation.en: I also beg You, O Lord, in the name of our Imam
the rising in our ages,
the promised day,
the witnessed observer,
the luminous light,
the bright illumination,
the supported by means of horror,
and the triumphant with happiness.
So, (please) send upon him blessings that are as many as the numbers of fruits,
the leaves of trees,
the townspeople,
the hairs of people and animals,
and all things that Your knowledge encompasses
and You Book counts;
such blessings due to which all the ancient and the last generations wish to have their like.
O Allah, (please do) include us with his group,
make us keep on obeying him,
guard us through his state,
confer upon us with the loyalty to him,
give us victory over our enemies as a result of his power,
and include us, O Lord, with those who turn to You constantly.
O most merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.transliteration: allahumma wa inna iblisa almutamarrida alla`ina

translation.en: O Allah, Iblis the rebel and accursed
asked You to grant him respite so that he would mislead Your creatures; and You granted him so.
He asked You to reprieve him so that he would misguide Your servants, and You reprieved him.
This is because You had already known about him.
He thus nested and gave birth to many hosts.
So, his armies have been overcrowding,
his propagandists have widespread in all the corners of this earth,
they have mislead Your servants, deformed Your religion,
displaced the words from their right places,
and made Your servants diverse revelries
and rebellious parties.
You promised that You would demolish his (i.e. Iblis) edifice
and tear out his matters.
So, (please do) deaden his sons and armies,

segments.transliteration: wa tahhir biladaka min ikhtira`atihi wakhtilafatihi

translation.en: purify Your lands from his inventions and fabrications,

segments.transliteration: wa arih `ibadaka min madhahibihi wa qiyasatihi

translation.en: relieve Your servants from his factions and analogies,
make the disaster of evil surround them,
extend Your justice,
give victory to Your religion,
give strength to Your intimate servants,
weaken Your enemies,
make Your intimate servants inherit the lands of Iblis
and these of his fans,
make the fans of Iblis stay forever in the blazing Fire,
make them taste the painful torment,
and make the curses of You that are kept
in the evil part of the creation
and in the deformed part of the nature
surround them forever,
control over them,

segments.transliteration: wa jariyatan fihim kulla sabahin wa masa'in

translation.en: and strike them every morning and evening
and every moment of coming and going.
O Our Lord, (please do) grant us goodness in this world
and goodness in the world to come
and save us, out of Your mercy, from the torment of Fire.
O most merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en: You may then pray the Almighty for anything you like for yourself and your brethren-in-faith.
text.ar: ثم ادع بما تحبّ لنفسك ولاخوانك

text.en: The noble Shaykh Ja’far ibn Qawlawayh al-Qummi has reported through a considerable chain of authority that Abu-Hamzah al-Thumali reported Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) as saying: If you intend to visit the tomb of al-’Abbas ibn ‘Ali (‘a) that lies on the bank of the River Euphrates opposite to al-Ha’ir, you should stop at the gate of the shed (precinct) and say these words:
text.ar: روى الشيخ الأجل جعفر بن قولويه القمّي بسند معتبر عن أبي حمزة الثمالي عن الصادق عليه‌السلام قال : إذا أردت زيارة قبر العباس بن علي وهو على شط الفرات بحذاء الحائر فقف على باب السقيفة (الروضة) وقل :

segments.transliteration: salamu allahi wa salamu mala'ikatihi almuqarrabina

translation.en: Peace of Allah and peace of His favorite angels,
His commissioned prophets,
His righteous servants,
all the martyrs, and all the veracious (ones),

segments.transliteration: walzzakiyatu alttayyibatu fima taghtadi wa taruhu

translation.en: and also pure, true blessings that come and go,
be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful.
I testify to you of submission (to the will of God), honest acceptance as true,
loyalty, and sincerity

segments.arabic: لِخَلَفِ ٱلنَّبِيِّ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِ
segments.transliteration: likhalafi alnnabiyyi salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi almursali

translation.en: to the descendant of the commissioned Prophet, Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household,
the chosen grandson (of the Prophet),
the well knowledgeable guide (to the true religion),
the conveying successor,
and the wrongfully oppressed one.
So, Allah may reward you on behalf of His Messenger,
the Commander of the Faithful,
al-Hasan, and al-Husayn,
peace of Allah be upon them,
with the best reward
for your steadfastness, dedication (to the sake of God), and support (for the right party).
Very excellent be the reward of the eternal life.
Allah’s curse be on him who killed you.

segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu man jahila haqqaka

translation.en: Allah’s curse be on him who ignored your position
and belittled your sanctity.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ مَنْ حَالَ بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَ مَاءِ ٱلْفُرَاتِ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu man hala baynaka wa bayna ma'i alfurati

translation.en: Allah’s curse be on him who precluded you from having from the water of the Euphrates.
I testify that you were killed wrongfully

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ مُنْجِزٌ لَكُمْ مَا وَعَدَكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa anna allaha munjizun lakum ma wa`adakum

translation.en: and that Allah will verily fulfill His promise that He made with you.

segments.arabic: جِئْتُكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلُمْؤْمِنينَ وَافِداً إِلَيْكُمْ
segments.transliteration: ji'tuka yabna amiri almu'minina wafidan ilaykum

translation.en: O son of the Commander of the Faithful, I have come to you to present myself before you.

segments.transliteration: wa qalbi musallimun lakum wa tabi`un

translation.en: My heart is submissive to you and is following you.
And I am your follower.
I am ready to support you
until Allah decides.
He is surely the best of all those who decide.
I am verily with you,
not with your enemy.

segments.transliteration: inni bikum wa bi'iyabikum min almu'minina

translation.en: I am one of those who believe in you and believe in your Return.

segments.transliteration: wa biman khalafakum wa qatalakum min alkafirina

translation.en: I also one of those who deny your opposites and killers.

segments.arabic: قَتَلَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً قَتَلَتْكُمْ بِٱلأَيْدِي وَٱلأَلْسُنِ
segments.transliteration: qatala allahu ummatan qatalatkum bil-aidi wal-alsuni

translation.en: Allah may kill the group who killed you with hands and tongues (by giving orders of killing you.)

text.en: You should then enter, throw yourself on the tomb, and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم ادخل وانكب على القبر وقل :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O righteous servant (of Allah)

segments.transliteration: almuti`u lillahi wa lirasulihi wa li'amiri almu'minina

translation.en: and obedient to Allah, to His Messenger, to the Commander of the Faithful,

segments.arabic: وَٱلحَسَنِ وَٱلحُسَيْنِ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمْ وَسَلَّمَ
segments.transliteration: walhasani walhusayni salla allahu `alayhim wa sallama

translation.en: to al-Hasan, and to al-Husayn, peace and greetings of Allah be upon them.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace, Allah’s mercy, blessings,

segments.transliteration: wa maghfiratuhu wa ridwanuhu wa `ala ruhika wa badanika

translation.en: forgiveness, and gratifications be upon you, your soul, and your body.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ وَأُشْهِدُ ٱللَّهَ أَنَّكَ مَضَيْتَ عَلَىٰ مَا مَضَىٰ بِهِ ٱلبَدْرِيُّونَ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu wa ushhidu allaha annaka madayta `ala ma mada bihi albadriyyuna

translation.en: I testify, and call Allah to witness, that you abided by the same course that was taken by the warriors of (the battle of) Badr
and the strivers for Allah’s sake
who sincerely served Him in the battlefields against His enemies,
did their bests for supporting His disciples,
and defended His intimate ones.
So, Allah may reward you the best,
the maximum,
the most abundant,

segments.arabic: وَأَوْفَىٰ جَزَاءِ أَحَدٍ مِمَّنْ وَفَىٰ بِبَيْعَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa awfa jaza'i ahadin mimman wa fa bibay`atihi

translation.en: and the most conclusive reward that He may give to any one who fulfills his homage,
answers the call (of the religion),
and obeys his (divinely elected) leaders.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ قَدْ بَالَغْتَ فِي ٱلنَّصِيحَةِ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka qad balaghta fi alnnasihati

translation.en: I testify that you acted extremely sincerely
and exerted all your efforts (in this regard).
Allah may attach you to the martyrs,

segments.transliteration: wa ja`ala ruhaka ma`a arwahi alssu`ada'i

translation.en: add your soul to the souls of the happy ones,

segments.transliteration: wa a`taka min jinanihi afsahaha manzilan

translation.en: give you the largest abode in His Paradise
and the most handsome room,
exalt your mention in `Illiyyin (the most elevated position),
and join you to the Prophets, the veracious ones,
the martyrs, and the righteous ones.
Very excellent is the companionship of such ones.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ لَمْ تَهِنْ وَلَمْ تَنْكُلْ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka lam tahin wa lam tankul

translation.en: I testify that you did not lag behind and did not turn away the face,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّكَ مَضَيْتَ عَلَىٰ بَصِيرَةٍ مِنْ أَمْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa annaka madayta `ala basiratin min amrika

translation.en: and that you left this life with full awareness of the truth,
following the examples of the righteous ones
and sticking to the Prophets.
So, Allah may gather us with you,
with His Messenger, and with His disciples
in the abodes of those who practiced humbly (with their Lord).
He is certainly the most merciful of all the merciful ones.

text.en: It is expedient to say this form of ziyarah while standing behind the holy tomb and facing the kiblah direction, as is also advised by Shaykh al-Tusi in his book of Tahdhib al-Ahkam. You may then enter, throw yourself on the tomb, and say the following words while facing the kiblah direction:
text.ar: أقول : من المستحسن أن يزار بهذه الزيارة خلف القبر مستقبل القبلة كما قال الشيخ في التهذيب. ثم ادخل فانكب على القبر وقل وأنت مستقبل القبلة :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O righteous servant (of Allah)

text.en: According to the previously mentioned narration, the ziyarah of al-’Abbas ends here. But Sayyid Ibn Tawus and Shaykh al-Mufid, as well as other scholars, have added the following: You may then turn to the side of the head and offer a two-unit prayer. Afterwards, you may offer prayers as many as you wish. You may also supplicate Almighty Allah earnestly. After these prayers, you may say the following supplicatory prayer:
text.ar: واعلم أيضاً أنّ إلى هنا تنتهي زيارة العباس عليه‌السلام على الرواية السالفة ولكن السيد ابن طاووس والشيخ المفيد وغيرهما ذيّلوها قائلين : ثم انحرف إلى عند الرأس فصلّ ركعتين ثم صل بعدهما مابداً لك وادع الله كَثِيراً وقل عقيب الركعات :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَلا تَدَعْ لِي فِي هٰذَا ٱلمَكَانِ ٱلمُكَرَّمِ وَٱلمَشْهَدِ ٱلمُعَظَّمِ ذَنْباً إِلاَّ غَفَرْتَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa la tada` li fi hadha almakani almukarrami walmashhadi almu`azzami dhanban illa ghafartahu

translation.en: and do not leave for me, in this honored place and glorified shrine, any sin that I did but that You forgive it,
any care but that You relieve it,
any illness but that You cure it,
any defect buth that You cover up,
any source of sustenance but that You expand it,
any item of terror but that You pacify it,
any disunity but that You reunify it,

segments.transliteration: wa la gha'iban illa hafiztahu wa adnaytahu

translation.en: any absent one but that You guard it and approach (him to me),

segments.arabic: وَلا حَاجَةً مِنْ حَوَائِجِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hajatan min hawa'iji alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: and any single need, among the many needs for this life as well as the life to come

segments.arabic: لَكَ فِيهَا رِضَىٰ وَلِيَ فِيهَا صَلاحٌ
segments.transliteration: laka fiha ridan wa liya fiha salahun

translation.en: whose settlement achieves your gratification and my good,
but that You grant it. O He Who is the most merciful of all the merciful ones!

text.en: You may then return to the tomb, stop at the side of the legs, and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم عد إلى الضريح فقف عند الرجلين وقل :

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَاَ ٱلفَضْلِ ٱلعَبَّاسَ بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya aba alfadli al`abbasa ibna amiri almu'minina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu’l-Fadl al-`Abbas the son of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the successors (of the Prophets).

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَوَّلِ ٱلْقَوْمِ إِسْلاَماً

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the foremost to Islam,
the first to believe,
the best to have served the religion of Allah,
and the most careful for Islam.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ لَقَدْ نَصَحْتَ لِلَّهِ وَلِرَسُولِهِ وَلأَخِيكَ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu laqad nasahta lillahi wa lirasulihi wa li'akhika

translation.en: I bear witness that you served Allah, His Messenger, and your brother sincerely.
You were the most excellent self-sacrificing brother.
So, Allah’s curse be on the group who killed you.
Allah’s curse be on the group who wronged you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً ٱسْتَحَلَّتْ مِنْكَ ٱلْمَحَارِمَ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu ummatan istahallat minka almaharima

translation.en: Allah’s curse be on the group who violated your sanctities
and infringed the sanctity of Islam.
You were the most excellent steadfast fighter,
protector, supporter,
and brother who defended his brother,
responded to the obedience to his Lord,

segments.arabic: ٱلرَّاغِبُ فِيمَا زَهِدَ فِيهِ غَيْرُهُ مِنَ ٱلثَّوَابِ ٱلْجَزِيلِ
segments.transliteration: alrraghibu fima zahida fihi ghayruhu min alththwabi aljazili

translation.en: and worked desirably for gaining the abundant reward, which others refused,
and the nice tribute.

segments.arabic: وَأَلْحَقَكَ ٱللَّهُ بِدَرَجَةِ آبَائِكَ فِي جَنَّاتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa alhaqaka allahu bidarajati aba'ika fi jannati alnna`imi

translation.en: So, Allah may attach you to the rank of your fathers in the gardens of bliss.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي تَعَرَّضْتُ لِزِيَارَةِ أَوْلِيَائِكَ رَغْبَةً فِي ثَوَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ta`arradtu liziyarati awliya'ika raghbatan fi thawabika

translation.en: O Allah, I have done the pilgrimage to Your disciples out of my desire for (winning) your reward

segments.transliteration: wa raja'an limaghfiratika wa jazili ihsanika

translation.en: and my wish for Your forgiveness and Your abundant benevolence.

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: fa's'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa alihi alttahirina

translation.en: So, I implore You to send Your blessings upon Muhammad and his immaculate Household

segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala rizqi bihim darran

translation.en: and to make my sustenance flow copiously in their names,
my living delightful in their names,
my pilgrimage rewardable in their names,
and my life pleasant in their names,
to make me take to the conduct of the honored ones,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنْ يَنْقَلِبُ مِنْ زِيَارَةِ مَشَاهِدِ أَحِبَّائِكَ
segments.transliteration: waj`alni mimman yanqalibu min ziyarati mashahidi ahibba'ika

translation.en: to make me one of those who, as returning from the pilgrimage to the tombs of Your beloved ones,
win success and prosperity
and deserve forgiveness of sins,
covering up of defects,
and relief of disasters.

segments.transliteration: innaka ahlu alttaqwa wa ahlu almaghfirati

translation.en: You are surely worthy of being feared and worthy of forgiving.

text.en: If you intend to take leave, you may approach the holy tomb and say the following words, which has been reported from Abu-Hamzah al-Thumali and have been mentioned by other scholars:
text.ar: فإذا أردت وداعه فادن من القبر الشريف وودّعه بما ورد في رواية أبي حمزة الثمالي وذكره العلماء أيضا :

translation.en: I entrust you with Allah, beseech Him to keep you under His guard,
and invoke peace upon you.

segments.transliteration: amanna billahi wa birasulihi wa bikitabihi

translation.en: We have believed in Allah, in His Messenger, in His Book,

segments.arabic: وَبِمَا جَاءَ بِهِ مِنْ عِنْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa bima ja'a bihi min `indi allahi

translation.en: and in that which he conveyed from Allah.
O Allah, record our names with the witnesses.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ لا تَجْعَلْهُ آخِرَ ٱلعَهْدِ مِنْ زِيَارَتِي قَبْرَ ٱبْنِ أَخِي رَسُولِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma la taj`alhu akhira al`ahdi min ziyarati qabra ibni akhi rasulika

translation.en: O Allah, do not decide this pilgrimage to the tomb of the son of Your Messenger’s brother to be the last one of mine.
Peace be upon him (i.e. the Messenger) and upon his Household.
Grant me opportunities to visit him so long as You keep me alive,

segments.arabic: وَٱحْشُرْنِي مَعَهُ وَمَعَ آبَائِهِ فِي ٱلْجِنَانِ
segments.transliteration: wahshurni ma`ahu wa ma`a aba'ihi fi aljinani

translation.en: join me to him and to his fathers in the gardens of Paradise,

segments.arabic: وَعَرِّفْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَهُ وَبَيْنَ رَسُولِكَ وَأَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa `arrif bayni wa baynahu wa bayna rasulika wa awliya'ika

translation.en: and introduce me to him, to Your Messenger, and to Your disciples.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send Your blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and take me to You while I am abiding by the believing in You,
giving credence to Your Messenger,

segments.arabic: وَٱلوِلاَيَةِ لِعَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ وَٱلأَئِمَّةِ مِنْ وُلْدِهِ
segments.transliteration: walwilayati li`aliyyi bni abi talibin wal-a'immati min wuldihi

translation.en: being faithful to `Ali the son of Abu-Talib and the Imams from his progeny,
and disavowing their enemy.

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي قَدْ رَضِيتُ يَا رَبِّي بِذٰلِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'inni qad raditu ya rabbi bidhalika

translation.en: My Lord, I have accepted such.

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: Allah may send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

text.en: You may then pray Almighty Allah for yourself, your parents, your brethren-in-faith, and for Muslims. You may choose any statement of supplication you like.
text.ar: ثم ادع لنفسك ولابويك وللمؤمنين والمسلمين واختر من الدعاء ما شئت

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَیْکَ اَیُّہَا الْعَبْدُ الصَّالِحُ الْمُطِیْعُ لِلّٰہِ وَ لِرَسُوْلِہٖ
اَشْہَدُ اَنَّکَ قَدْ جَاہَدْتَ وَ نَصَحْتَ وَ صَبَرْتَ حَتّٰی اَتٰیکَ الْیَقِیْنُ
لَعْنَ اﷲُ الظَّالِمِیِن لَکُمْ مِنَ الْاَوَّلِیْنَ وَالْآخِرِیْنَ وَ اَلْحِقْہُمْ بِدَرَکِ الْجَحِیْمِ.

translation.en: Glory be to the Lord of Honor and Sublime Authority.
Glory be to the Lord of Majesty and Exalted Greatness.
Glory be to the Lord of eternal, splendid sovereignty.

segments.arabic: سُبحَانَ مَنْ يَرَىٰ أَثَرَ ٱلَّنمْلِ فِي ٱلصَّفَا
segments.transliteration: subhana man yara athara alnnamli fi alssafa

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who makes out the footprints of the ant on the stone.

segments.arabic: سُبحَانَ مَنْ يَرَىٰ وَقْعَ ٱلطَّيْرِ فِي ٱلْهَوَاءِ
segments.transliteration: subhana man yara waq`a alttayri fi alhawa'i

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who knows the exact time and place of the bird dipping down through the air.

segments.arabic: سُبحَانَ مَنْ هُوَ هٰكَذَا لاَ هكَذَا غَيْرُهُ
segments.transliteration: subhana man huwa hakadha la hakadha ghayruhu

translation.en: Glory be to Him Who is like this and no one other than Him is like this.
Sufficient, sufficient, sufficient,
unto my prayer is Your knowledge with my status.

name: Ziyarat Imam Husain(as) on the eve of Eid

text.en: زيارة الحُسَين عليه‌السلام
في عيدَي الفطر والأضحى

It is worth mentioning that scholars have dedicated two forms of
ziyarah to these two blessed feast days (i.e. ‘Id al-Fitr and ‘Id al-
Azha). The first form has been previously cited as the ziyarah form at
the Qadr Nights, while the other is the following. What is apparently
understood from the words of the scholars is that the first form of
ziyarah is said when one visits the holy shrine on the two days of ‘Id
al-Fitr and ‘Id al-Azha, while the following form is said when the holy
shrine is visited at the two nights before these two days. Thus, the
ziyarah form is as follows:
When you intend to visit Imam al-Husayn’s tomb at these two
nights, you may stop at the gate of the holy dome, cast your sight on
the tomb, and seek permission of admission by saying,
text.ar: واعلم أنّ العلماء قد أوردوا لهذين العيدين الشريفين زيارتين إحداهما مامضت من الزّيارة في ليالي القدر والثانية هي ما يلي والزيارة السابقة يزار بها على ما يظهر من كلماتهم في يومي العيدين وهذه الزيارة تخص ليلتهما.  قالوا : إذا أردت زيارته في الليلتين المذكورتين فقف على باب القبَّة الطاهرة وارْمِ بنظرك نحو القبر مستأذنا فقل :

segments.arabic: يا مَوْلايَ يا أَبا عَبْدِ الله يا بْنَ رَسُولِ الله عَبْدُكَ وَابْنُ أَمَتِكَ الذَّلِيلُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ وَالمُصَغَّرُ فِي عُلُوِّ قَدْرِكَ وَالمُعْتَرِفُ بِحَقِّكَ جأَكَ مُسْتَجِيراً بِكَ قاصِداً إِلى حَرَمِكَ مُتَوَجِّها إلى مَقامِكَ مُتَوَسِّلاً إِلى الله تَعالى بِكَ ، أَأَدْخُلُ يا مَوْلايَ أَأَدْخُلُ يا وَلِيَّ الله أَأَدْخُلُ يا مَلائِكَةَ الله المُحْدِقِينَ بِهذا الحَرَمِ المُقِيمِينَ فِي هذا المَشْهَدِ.

text.en:
If your heart feels reverence and your eyes shed tears, then you may
enter by preceding your right foot to your left one. You may then say
the following words:
text.ar: فإن خشع قلبك ودمعت عينك فادخل وقدم رجلك اليمنى على اليسرى وقل :

segments.arabic: بِسْمِ الله وَبِالله وَفِي سَبِيلِ الله وَعَلى مِلَّةِ رَسُولِ الله اللّهُمَّ أَنْزِلْنِي مُنْزَلاً مُبارَكا وَأَنْتَ

text.en: You may then say the following words:
text.ar: ثم قل

segments.arabic: الله أَكْبَرُ كَبِيراً والحمدلله كثيراً وَسُبْحانَ الله بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلاً وَالحَمْدُ للهِ الفَرْدِ الصَّمَدِ الماجِدِ الاَحَدِ المُتَفَضِّلِ المَنَّانِ المُتَطَوِّلِ الحَنَّانِ الَّذِي مِنْ تَطَوُّلِهِ سَهَّلَ لِي زِيارَةَ مَوْلايَ بِإِحْسانِهِ وَلَمْ يَجْعَلْنِي عَنْ زِيارَتِهِ مَمْنُوعاً وَلا عَنْ ذِمَّتِهِ مَدْفُوعاً بَلْ تَطَوَّلَ وَمَنَحَ.

text.en:
You may then enter the shrine. When you reach its center, you may
stop near the tomb with reverence, weeping, and submission, and say
the following words:
text.ar: ثم ادخل فإذا توسطت فقم حذاءالقبر بخضوع وبكاء وتضرُّع وقل :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha adama safwati allahi

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ امِينِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha nuhin amini allahi

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha ibrahima khalili allahi

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ كَلِيمِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha musa kalimi allahi

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيسَىٰ رُوحِ ٱللَّهِ
صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ حَبِيبِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi habibi allahi

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عَلِيٍّ حُجَّةِ ٱللَّهِ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ ايُّهَا ٱلْوَصِيُّ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلْتَّقِيُّ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ وَٱلْوِتْرَ ٱلْمَوْتُورَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi walwitra almawtura
wa jahadta fi allahi haqqa jihadihi
hatta istubiha haramuka wa qutilta mazluman

text.en:
You may then stop at the side of the Imam’s head with submissive
heart and teary eyes and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم قم عند رأسه خاشعاً قلبك دامعة عينك ثم قل :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ابَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ
اشْهَدُ انَّكَ كُنْتَ نُوراً فِي ٱلاصْلاَبِ ٱلشَّامِخَةِ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka kunta nuran fi al-aslabi alshshamikhati
wa lam tulbiska min mudlahimmati thiyabiha
wa ashhadu annaka min da`a'imi alddini

segments.arabic: وَاشْهَدُ انَّكَ ٱلإِمَامُ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلتَّقِيُّ ٱلرَّضِيُّ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka al-imamu albarru alttqiyyu alrrdiyyu
wa ashhadu anna al-a'immata min wuldika

text.en:
You may then throw yourself on the tomb and say the following
words:
text.ar: ثم انكب على القبر وقل :

segments.transliteration: inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji`una
wa ana bikum mu'minun wa bi'iyabikum

segments.arabic: انْتَ مَوْلاَيَ حُجَّةُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَىٰ ٱلْخَلْقِ اجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: anta mawlaya hujjatu allahi `ala alkhalqi ajma`ina

segments.arabic: وَاشْهَدُ انَّكَ ٱلتَّالِي لِكِتَابِ ٱللَّهِ وَامينُ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka alttali likitabi allahi wa aminu allahi

segments.arabic: ٱلدَّاعِي إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ بِٱلْحِكْمَةِ وَٱلْمَوْعِظَةِ ٱلْحَسَنَةِ
segments.transliteration: aldda`i ila allahi bilhikmati walmaw`izati alhasanati

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ امَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذٰلِكَ فَرَضِيَتْ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu ummatan sami`at bidhalika faradiyat bihi

text.en:
You may then offer a two-unit prayer to the side of the Imam’s
head and when you finish, you may say the following words:
text.ar: ثم صل عند الرأس ركعتين فإذا سلمت فقل :

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إِنِّي لَكَ صَلَّيْتُ وَلَكَ رَكَعْتُ وَلَكَ سَجَدْتُ وَحْدَكَ لاشَرِيكَ لَكَ فَإِنَّهُ لاتَجُوزُ الصَّلاةُ وَالرُّكُوعُ وَالسُّجُودُ إِلاّ لَكَ أَنْتَ الله الَّذِي لا إِلهَ إِلاّ أَنْتَ ، اللّهُمَّ [١] صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَبْلِغْهُمْ عَنِّي أَفْضَلَ  السَّلامِ وَالتَّحِيَّةِ وارْدُدْ عَلَيَّ مِنْهُمُ السَّلامَ ، اللّهُمَّ وَهاتانِ الرّكْعَتانِ هَدِيَّةٌ مِنِّي إِلى سَيِّدِي الحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عليهما‌السلام ، اللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَيْهِ وَتَقَبَّلْهُما مِنِّي وَأَجِرْنِي عَلَيْهِما أَفْضَلَ أَمَلِي وَرَجائِي فِيكَ وفِي وَلِيِّكَ يا وَلِيَّ المُؤْمِنِينَ.

text.en:
You may then throw yourself on the tomb, kiss it, and say the
following words:
text.ar: ثم انكب على القبر وقبِّله وقل :

segments.arabic: سَّلامُ عَلى الحُسَين بْنِ عَلِيٍّ المَظْلُومِ الشَّهِيدِ قَتِيلِ العَبَراتِ وَأَسِيرِ الكُرُباتِ ، اللّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَشْهَدُ أَنَّهُ وَلِيُّكَ وَابْنُ وَلِيِّكَ وَصَفِيُّكَ الثَّائِرُ بِحَقِّكَ أَكْرَمْتَهُ بِكَرامَتِكَ وَخَتَمْتَ لَهُ بِالشَّهادَةِ وَجَعَلْتَهُ سَيِّداً مِنَ السَّادَةِ وَقائِداً مِنَ القادَةِ وَأَكْرَمْتَهُ بِطِيبِ الوِلادَةِ وَأَعْطَيْتَهُ مَوارِيثَ الأَنْبِياءِ وَجَعَلْتَهُ حُجَّةً على خَلْقِكَ مِنَ الأَوْصِياء

فَأَعْذَرَ فِي الدُّعاءِ وَمَنَحَ النَّصِيحَةَ وَبَذَلَ مُهْجَتَهُ فِيكَ حَتّى اسْتَنْقَذَ عِبادَكَ مِنَ الجَهالَةِ وَحَيْرَةِ الضَّلالَةِ ،وَقَدْ تَوازَرَ عَلَيهِ مَنْ غَرَّتْهُ الدُّنْيا وَباعَ حَظَّهُ مِنَ الآخِرةِ بِالاَدْنى وَتَرَدّى فِي هَواهُ وَأَسْخَطَكَ وَأَسْخَطَ نَبِيِّكَ وَأَطاعَ مِنْ عِبادِكَ أُولِي الشِّقاقِ وَالنِّفاقِ وَحَمَلَةَ الاَوْزارِ المُسْتَوْجِبِينَ النَّارَ

فَجاهَدَهُمْ فِيكَ صابِراً مُحْتَسِباً مُقْبِلاً غَيْرَ مُدْبِرٍ لاتَأْخُذُهُ فِي الله لَوْمَةُ لائِمٍ حَتّى سُفِكَ فِي طاعَتِكَ دَمُهُ وَاسْتُبِيحَ حَرِيمُهُ ؛ اللّهُمَّ العَنْهُمْ لَعْنا وَبِيلاً وَعَذِّبْهُمْ عَذاباً أَلِيماً.

text.en:
You may then turn to ‘Ali ibn al-Husayn (‘a), who is buried to the
side of Imam al-Husayn’s feet, and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم اعطف على علي بن الحسين عليه‌السلام وهو عند رجل الحُسَين عليه‌السلام وقل :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَاتَمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ امِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

text.en:
You may then turn to the tombs of the martyrs - may Allah’s
pleasure be upon them - and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم انحرف إلى قبور الشهداء رضوان الله عليهم وقل :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ ايُّهَا ٱلذَّابُّونَ عَنْ تَوْحِيدِ ٱللَّهِ

text.en:
You may then walk to the shrine of al-’Abbas ibn ‘Ali, stop at his
holy tomb, and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم امضِ إلى مشهد العباس بن عليٍّ عليه‌السلام وقف على ضريحه الشريف وقل :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ ايُّهَا ٱلْعَبْدُ ٱلصَّالِحُ وَٱلصِّدِّيقُ ٱلْمُوَاسِي
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ayyuha al`abdu alssalihu walssiddiqu almuwasi

segments.arabic: فَعَلَيْكَ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ افْضَلُ ٱلتَّحِيَّةِ وَٱلسَّلاَمِ
segments.transliteration: fa`alayka min allahi afdalu alttahiyyati walssalami

text.en:
You may now throw yourself on the tomb and say the following
words:
text.ar: ثم انكب على القبر وقل :

segments.arabic: بِابِي انْتَ وَامِّي يَا نَاصِرَ دِينِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi ya nasira dini allahi

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نَاصِرَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ ٱلصِّدِّيقِ
اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نَاصِرَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ ٱلشَّهِيدِ

segments.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu

text.en:
You may then stand up to offer a two-unit prayer to the side of his
head and then repeat the same words that you have said after offering
a prayer at Imam al-Husayn’s shrine. These words, which have been
previously cited, begin with the following statement: اللّهُمَّ إِنِّي صَلَّيْتُ
text.ar: ثم صلّ عند رأسه عليه‌السلام ركعتين وقل ما قلت عند راس الحُسَين عليه‌السلام أي ادع بدعاء : اللّهُمَّ إِنِّي صَلَّيْتُ ... الخ ص ٥٢٧.

text.en:
ou may then return to the shrine of Imam al-Husayn (‘a) to reside
there for any period you like. However, it is recommended not to
appoint the holy shrine as one’s place of residence and spending the
night there.
If you intend to leave and bid farewell to the Imam (‘a), you may
stop at the side of the head and say the following words while
weeping:
text.ar: فإذا أردت وداعه فقم عند الرأس وأنت تبكي وتقول :

segments.arabic: سَلاَمَ مُوَدِّعٍ لاَ قَالٍ وَلاَ سَئِمٍ
segments.transliteration: salama muwaddi`in la qalin wa la sa'imin

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ اقِمْ فَلاَ عَنْ سُوءِ ظَنٍّ
segments.transliteration: wa in uqim fala `an su'i zannin

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاَيَ لاَ جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ آخِرَ ٱلْعَهْدِ مِنِّي لِزِيَارَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ya mawlaya la ja`alahu allahu akhira al`ahdi minni liziyaratika

text.en:
You may then kiss the tomb and try to pass your entire body over
it, because this tomb is security and protection. You may then leave it
by walking backwards without giving your back to the tomb. You may
say the following words:
text.ar: ثم قبِّله وأَمِرَّ عليه جميع جسدك فإنّه أمان وحرز ، واخرج من عنده القهقرى ولاتوله دبرك وقل :

segments.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu

text.en: You may also say the following words
text.ar: وقل :

segments.transliteration: inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji`una

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَلِيِّ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahi al`aliyyi al`azimi

text.en:
You may then leave.
Sayyid Ibn Tawus and Muhammad ibn al-Mashhadi said, “If you
do all these devotional acts (correctly), you will be as if you have
visited Almighty Allah in His Divine Throne.
text.ar: ثم انصرف. وقال السيد ابن طاووس ومحمد ابن المشهدي : فإذا فعلت ذلك كنت كمن زار الله في عرشه.

text.en: Then pray two rak'ahs at the head, and when you greet, say:
text.ar: ثم صل عند الرأس ركعتين فإذا سلمت فقل :

segments.transliteration: wa laka raka`tu wa laka sajadtu

segments.arabic: لاِنَّكَ انْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ انْتَ
segments.transliteration: li'annaka anta allahu alladhi la ilaha illa anta

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
allahumma wa hatani alrrak`atani hadiyyatun minni

segments.arabic: افْضَلَ امَلِي وَرَجَائِي فِيكَ وَفِي وَلِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: afdala amali wa raja'i fika wa fi waliyyika

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اشْهَدُ انَّهُ وَلِيُّكَ وَٱبْنُ وَلِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna ashhadu annahu waliyyuka wabnu waliyyika

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَهُ حُجَّةً عَلَىٰ خَلْقِكَ مِنَ ٱلاوْصِيَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa ja`altahu hujjatan `ala khalqika min al-awsiya'i

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ ٱسْتَنْقَذَ عِبَادَكَ مِنَ ٱلْجَهَالَةِ وَحَيْرَةِ ٱلضَّلاَلَةِ
segments.transliteration: hatta istanqadha `ibadaka min aljahalati wa hayrati alddalalati

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ تَوَازَرَ عَلَيْهِ مَنْ غَرَّتْهُ ٱلدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: wa qad tawazara `alayhi man gharrat-hu alddunya
wa ba`a hazzahu min al-akhirati bil-adna

segments.arabic: وَاطَاعَ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ اوْلِي ٱلشِّقَاقِ وَٱلنِّفَاقِ
segments.transliteration: wa ata`a min `ibadika uli alshshiqaqi walnnifaqi

segments.arabic: لاَ تَاخُذُهُ فِي ٱللَّهِ لَوْمَةُ لاَئِمٍ
segments.transliteration: la ta'khudhuhu fi allahi lawmatu la'imin

name: Special Ziyarat of Imam Hussain (as) - 15th of shaban

text.en: Ziyarat Imam Husain (as)
text.ar: زيارة الحُسَين عليه‌السلام

text.en: to be recited on the eve of 15 Shaban
text.ar: زيارة النصف من شعبان

text.en: The Prophets & The Angels visit Imam Hussain (as) on this night & performing the ziyarah is one of the most meritorious acts of this night.It has been said whoever wishes to shake hands with 124,000 prophets should perform this ziyarah on this night
text.ar: عن الإمام زين العابدين وعن الإمام جعفر الصادق عليه‌السلام قالا : من أحبّ ان يصافحه مائة ألف نبي وأربعة وعشرون ألف نبي فليزر قبر أبي عبد الله الحُسَين بن علي عليه‌السلام في النصف من شعبان.

text.en: The least one can do as a short salutation to Imam Hussain(as) is ,one may go to the terrace/elevated place, look left, right & towards the sky & recite :
text.ar: وهي كما يلي : تقف عند قبره وتقول :

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللّه السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ وَرَحْمَةُ اللّه وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
segments.transliteration: Assalamu Alalika Ya Aba Abdillah Assalamu Alaikum wa Rahmatullah e wabarakatoh

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O Aba-`Abdullah! Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.
All praise be to Allah; the Most High, the All-great.

segments.arabic: والسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أيُّها الْعَبْدُ الصَّالِحُ الزَّكيُّ
segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayka ayyuha al`abdu alSSalihu alzzakiyy

translation.en: Peace be upon you; O the righteous, pure servant (of Allah).

segments.arabic: اُودِعُكَ شَهادَةً مِنِّي لَكَ تُقَرِّبُني إلَيْكَ فِي يَوْمِ شَفاعَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: udi`uka shahadatan minny laka tuqarribuny ilayka fi yawmi shafa`atika

translation.en: I entrust with you a testimony of mine that takes me near you on the day of your intercession (for some people).

segments.transliteration: ash-hadu annaka qutilta wa lam tamut

translation.en: I bear witness that although you were slain, you have not died;

segments.arabic: بَلْ بِرَجاءِ حَياتِكَ حَيِيَتْ قُلُوبُ شيعَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: bal biraja‘i hayatika hayiyat qulubu shi`atika

translation.en: Rather the hearts of your adherents (Shi`ah) are living on the hope of your being alive;

segments.transliteration: wa biziya‘i nurika ahtada alttalibuna ilayka

translation.en: And by the light of your illumination have those seeking you been guided (to the right path).

segments.arabic: وَأشْهَدُ أنَّكَ نُورُ اللهِ الَّذي لَمْ يُطْفَأْ وَلا يُطْفَأُ أبَداً،
segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu annaka nuru allahi alladhy lam yutfa wa la yutfa’u abadan

translation.en: And I bear witness that you are verily the Light of Allah that has not and shall never be extinguished.

segments.arabic: وَأنَّكَ وَجْهُ اللهِ الَّذي لَمْ يَهْلِكْ وَلا يُهْلَكُ أبَداً،
segments.transliteration: wa annaka wajhu allahi alladhy lam yahlik wa la yuhlaku abadan

translation.en: And you are verily the Face of Allah that has not and shall never be perishing.

segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu ann hadhihi alttrbata turbatuka

translation.en: And I bear witness that this soil is yours,
And this holy precinct is yours.
And this death is the death of your body only,
While you have never been humiliated since Allah is the One Who is pouring honor upon you
And you have never been defeated since Allah is the One Who is supporting you.

segments.arabic: هذِهِ شَهادَةٌ لي عِنْدَكَ إلى يَوْمَ قَبْضِ روُحي بِحَضْرَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: hadhihi shahadatun li `indaka ila yawmi qabzi ruhy bihazratika

translation.en: I would like you to keep this testimony of mine with you up to the day when my soul will be grasped in the presence of you.

segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayka wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

text.en: You may then offer a two-unit prayer and when you finish, you may say the following words:
text.ar: صل عند الرأس ركعتين فإذا سلمت فقل :

translation.en: O Allah, I have offered a prayer for You

segments.transliteration: wa laka raka`tu wa laka sajadtu

translation.en: and I have genuflected and prostrated myself for You
alone without setting any partner to You,
because prayers,
genuflections, and prostrations are illegal for anyone save You,

segments.arabic: لاِنَّكَ انْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ انْتَ
segments.transliteration: li'annaka anta allahu alladhi la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: because You are Allah; there is no god save You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
convey to them the most favorite salutations and greetings from me,
and convey to me their response to my greeting.

segments.transliteration: allahumma wa hatani alrrak`atani hadiyyatun minni

translation.en: O Allah, these two units of prayer are a present from me
to my master al-Husayn the son of `Ali,
peace be upon both of them.
O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and upon him,
accept these two units of prayer from me, and reward me for them

segments.arabic: افْضَلَ امَلِي وَرَجَائِي فِيكَ وَفِي وَلِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: afdala amali wa raja'i fika wa fi waliyyika

translation.en: by granting me the best of my hope and expectation in you and in Your Friend,
O Guardian of the believers!
Peace be upon al-Husayn the son of `Ali,
the wronged and martyred,
the victim of shed tears,
and the captive of agonies.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اشْهَدُ انَّهُ وَلِيُّكَ وَٱبْنُ وَلِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna ashhadu annahu waliyyuka wabnu waliyyika

translation.en: O Allah, I do bear witness that he is Your intimate friend and the son of Your intimate friend
and Your choicest one who revolted to demand with Your right.
You have thus honored him with Your honor,
sealed his lifetime with martyrdom,
made him one of the chiefs
and one of the leaders,
honored him with immaculate birth,
gave him the inheritances of the prophets,

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَهُ حُجَّةً عَلَىٰ خَلْقِكَ مِنَ ٱلاوْصِيَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa ja`altahu hujjatan `ala khalqika min al-awsiya'i

translation.en: and made him argument against Your creatures and one of the Successors.
So, he called to You flawlessly,
gave advice,
and sacrificed himself for Your sake

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ ٱسْتَنْقَذَ عِبَادَكَ مِنَ ٱلْجَهَالَةِ وَحَيْرَةِ ٱلضَّلاَلَةِ
segments.transliteration: hatta istanqadha `ibadaka min aljahalati wa hayrati alddalalati

translation.en: until he could save Your servants from ignorance and perplexity of straying off.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ تَوَازَرَ عَلَيْهِ مَنْ غَرَّتْهُ ٱلدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: wa qad tawazara `alayhi man gharrat-hu alddunya

translation.en: Yet, those whom were seduced by this worldly life,

segments.transliteration: wa ba`a hazzahu min al-akhirati bil-adna

translation.en: those who sold their share of the Hereafter with the lowly price,
those who perished because of following their desires,
those who brought to themselves Your wrath and the wrath of Your Prophet,

segments.arabic: وَاطَاعَ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ اُوْلِي ٱلشِّقَاقِ وَٱلنِّفَاقِ
segments.transliteration: wa ata`a min `ibadika uli alshshiqaqi walnnifaqi

translation.en: and those who obeyed the dissident and hypocritical servants of You
and the bearers of the burdens (of sins) who deserve Hellfire—all those supported each other against him;
so, he fought against them with steadfastness and expectation of Your reward,
facing them courageously, never turning back,

segments.arabic: لاَ تَاخُذُهُ فِي ٱللَّهِ لَوْمَةُ لاَئِمٍ
segments.transliteration: la ta'khudhuhu fi allahi lawmatu la'imin

translation.en: and never fearing the blame of anyone concerning carrying out his duty towards You
until his blood was shed while he was in obedience to You
and his inviolability was also infringed.
O Allah, curse them with incessant curses
and chastise them with painful chastisement.

text.en: Dua Alqama( Safwan) after Ziarat

This form of ziyarah on the `Ashura' Day is not as famous as the earlier one; rather, it is similar to it in reward and merits although it does not comprise the one-hundred time statements of invoking curse on the enemies and invoking blessings on the Imam and his companions. It is considered a great success for one whom is diverted from that form of ziyarah by a more important matter. The method of this form of ziyarah, as quoted from the book of al-Mazar al-Qadim, without mentioning the explanatory introduction, is as follows:
text.ar: زيارة عاشوراء الغير المشهورة : وهي تناظر الزيارة المشهورة المتداولة في الأجر والثواب خلوّا من عناء اللّعن والسَّلام مائة مرة وهي فوز عظيم لمن يشغله عن تلك الزيارة شاغل هام. و كيفيتها على ما في كتاب (المزار القديم) من دون الشرح كمايلي :

text.en: If you would like to visit Imam al-Husayn (peace be upon him) from remote places or from the vicinity of his holy tomb, you may bathe yourself and come out to a desert or go up the roof on your house. You may then offer a two-unit prayer, reciting (after Surah al-Fatihah) Surah al-Tawhid in both units. When you accomplish the prayer, you may point to Imam al-Husayn (peace be upon him) to greet him. The greetings, pointing, and intention must be made while turning the face towards the side of Imam al-Husayn’s tomb. Then, you may say the following words with reverence and submission:
text.ar: من أحب أن يزوره عليه‌السلام من بعد البلاد أو قربها فليغتسل ويبرز إلى الصحراء أو يصعد إلى سطح داره فيصلّي ركعتين يقرأ فيهما سورة (قل هو الله أحد) ، فإذا سلّم أومأ إليه بالسلام وليتوجه بالسلام والايماء والنّية إلى جهة قبر أبي عبد الله الحسين عليه‌السلام ثم يقول بخشوع واستكانة :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ ٱلْبَشِيرِ ٱلنَّذِيرِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the bearer of glad tidings and the warner
and son of the chief of the Prophets’ successors.
Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah
the doyenne of the women of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خِيَرَةِ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ خِيَرَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya khiyarata allahi wabna khiyaratihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O choicest of Allah and son of His choicest.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O vengeance of Allah and son of His vengeance.
Peace be upon you, O he who has not been avenged so far.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلإِمَامُ ٱلْهَادِي ٱلزَّكِيُّ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O guide and pure leader,
and upon souls that gathered in your courtyard,
resided in your vicinity,
and came with your visitors.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ مِنِّي مَا بَقيتُ وَبَقِيَ ٱللَّيْلُ وَٱلنَّهَارُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka minni ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu

translation.en: Peace be upon you from me as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.
Unbearable is the commiseration for you
and gross is it for the believers, Muslims,

segments.arabic: وَفِي أَهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَأَهْلِ ٱلأَرَضِينَ أَجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa fi ahli alssamawati wa ahli al-aradina ajma`ina

translation.en: and for all the inhabitants of the heavens and the layers of the earth.

segments.transliteration: fa'inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji`una

translation.en: So, we are Allah’s and to Him shall we return.

segments.transliteration: salawatu allahi wa barakatuhu wa tahiyyatuhu

translation.en: Allah’s benedictions, blessings, and greetings

segments.arabic: عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْحُسَيْنُ

translation.en: be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah al-Husayn,
upon your fathers the immaculate and finely selected,
and upon your offspring the guide and well-guided.
May Allah curse the people who disappointed you
and abstained from supporting and aiding you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً أَسَّسَتْ أَسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ لَكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu ummatan assasat asasa alzzulmi lakum

translation.en: May Allah curse the people who laid the basis of persecution against you,
paved the way for transgression against you,

segments.transliteration: wa tarraqat ila adhiyyatikum wa tahayyufikum

translation.en: opened the way towards injuring and wronging you,

segments.transliteration: wa jarat dhalika fi diyarikum wa ashya`ikum

translation.en: and spread so in your lands and against your adherents.

segments.arabic: بَرِئْتُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ وَإِلَيْكُمْ
segments.transliteration: bari'tu ila allahi `azza wa jalla wa ilaykum

translation.en: I declare my repudiation in the presence of Allah the Almighty and All-majestic, and in the presence of you,

segments.transliteration: ya sadati wa mawaliyya wa a'immati

translation.en: O my masters, chiefs, and leaders,

segments.transliteration: minhum wa min ashya`ihim wa atba`ihim

translation.en: from them, their adherents, and their followers.

segments.arabic: وَسْأَلُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي أَكْرَمَ يَا مَوَالِيَّ مَقَامَكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa as'alu allaha alladhi akrama ya mawaliyya maqamakum

translation.en: And I beseech Allah Who has honored your position, O my chiefs,
and enhanced your status and standing,

segments.arabic: أَنْ يُكْرِمَنِي بِوِلاَيَتِكُمْ وَمَحَبَّتِكُمْ وَٱلٱِئْتِمَامِ بِكُمْ
segments.transliteration: an yukrimani biwilayatikum wa mahabbatikum wali'timami bikum

translation.en: to endue me with the honor of being loyal to you, bearing love for you, choosing you as my leaders,
and declaring repudiation from your enemies.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلْبَرَّ ٱلرَّحِيمَ أَنْ يَرْزُقَنِي مَوَدَّتَكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa as'alu allaha albarra alrrahima an yarzuqani mawaddatakum

translation.en: And I beseech Allah the Benign and Merciful to endow upon me with fondness of you,
to grant me success of demanding with your vengeance

segments.arabic: مَعَ ٱلإِمَامِ ٱلْمُنْتَظَرِ ٱلْهَادِي مِنْ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: ma`a al-imami almuntazari alhadi min ali muhammadin

translation.en: with the awaited and guiding leader from the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يَجْعَلَنِي مَعَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa an yaj`alani ma`akum fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: to include me with you in this world and the Hereafter,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يُبَلِّغَنِيَ ٱلْمَقَامَ ٱلْمَحْمُودَ لَكُمْ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa an yuballighani almaqama almahmuda lakum `inda allahi

translation.en: and to make me attain the praiseworthy position that you enjoy with Allah.

segments.transliteration: wa as'alu allaha `azza wa jalla bihaqqikum

translation.en: And I beseech Allah the Almighty and All-majestic, in the name of your right

segments.transliteration: wa bilshsha'ni alladhi ja`ala allahu lakum

translation.en: and in the name of the status that you enjoy with Him,
to grant me, on account of my commiseration for you,
the most favorable of that which He has ever granted to any one afflicted with a misfortune.

segments.transliteration: inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji`una

translation.en: To Allah do we belong and to Him shall we return.
What a terrible misfortune it was;

segments.arabic: مَا أَفْجَعَهَا وَأَنْكَاهَا لِقُلُوبِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُسْلِمينَ
segments.transliteration: ma afja`aha wa ankaha liqulubi almu'minina walmuslimina

translation.en: how a calamitous and painful misfortune it was for the hearts of the believers and Muslims.

segments.transliteration: fa'inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji`una

translation.en: So, to Allah do we belong and to His shall we return.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and make me, in this situation of mine,

segments.arabic: مِمَّنْ تَنَالُهُ مِنْكَ صَلَوَاتٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ وَمَغْفِرَةٌ
segments.transliteration: mimman tanaluhu minka salawatun wa rahmatun wa maghfiratun

translation.en: one of those who receive blessings, mercy, and forgiveness from You
and make me worthy of regard with You

segments.transliteration: fi alddunya wal-akhirati wa min almuqarrabina

translation.en: in this world and in the Hereafter and of those drawn near to You,

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: fa'inni ataqarrabu ilayka bimuhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: for I seek nearness to You through Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
Your blessings be upon him and upon all of them.

segments.transliteration: allahumma wa inni atawassalu wa atawajjahu

translation.en: O Allah, I also choose as means to You and I turn my face towards You
in the name of Your select from among Your creatures
and Your elite from Your beings;
namely, Muhammad, `Ali, and the immaculate ones from their offspring.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fasalli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: So, O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
decide my lifestyle to be the same as theirs
and my death to be the same as theirs,

segments.transliteration: wa la tufarriq bayni wa baynahum

translation.en: and never separate me from them
in this world and in the Hereafter.
You are verily Hearer of prayers.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَهٰذَا يَوْمٌ تُجَدَّدُ فِيهِ ٱلنِّقْمَةُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa hadha yawmun tajaddada fihi alnniqmatu

translation.en: O Allah, on this day, imprecation is renewed
and curses are poured down

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ ٱللَّعينِ يَزِيدَ وَعَلَىٰ آلِ يَزِيدَ

translation.en: on the accursed Yazid and on the family of Yazid

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ آلِ زِيَادٍ وَعُمَرَ بْنِ سَعْدٍ وَٱلشِّمْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala ali ziyadin wa `umara bni sa`din walshshimri

translation.en: as well as on the family of Ziyad, `Umar ibn Sa`d, and al-Shimr.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱلْعَنْهُمْ وَٱلْعَنْ مَنْ رَضِيَ بِقَوْلِهِمْ وَفِعْلِهِمْ
segments.transliteration: allahumma il`anhum wal`an man radiya biqawlihim wa fi`lihim

translation.en: O Allah, pour curses upon them all and upon him who has approved of their words and deeds

segments.transliteration: min awwalin wa akhirin la`nan kathiran

translation.en: from the past and the last generations; (and pour down on them) copious curses,
expose them to the heat of Your Fire,

segments.transliteration: wa askinhum jahannama wa sa'at masiran

translation.en: and lodge them in Hellfire; and how an evil destiny it is,

segments.arabic: وَأَوْجِبْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ كُلِّ مَنْ شَايَعَهُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa awjib `alayhim wa `ala kulli man shaya`ahum

translation.en: disclose (Your chastisement) to them and to all those who adhered to them,

segments.transliteration: wa baya`ahum wa taba`ahum wa sa`adahum

translation.en: paid homage to them, patterned after them, helped them,
and approved of their deeds;
and lay open to them and on them
as well as on every one who has approved of that deed of them

segments.arabic: لَعَنَاتِكَ ٱلَّتِي لَعَنْتَ بِهَا كُلَّ ظَالِمٍ
segments.transliteration: la`anatika allati la`anta biha kulla zalimin

translation.en: Your curses with which You have cursed all wrongdoers,

segments.transliteration: wa kulla ghasibin wa kulla jahidin

translation.en: all usurpers, all deniers,

segments.transliteration: wa kulla kafirin wa kulla mushrikin

translation.en: all unbelievers, all polytheists,

segments.arabic: وَكُلَّ شَيْطَانٍ رَجِيمٍ وَكُلَّ جَبَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa kulla shaytanin rajimin wa kulla jabbarin `anidin

translation.en: all accursed devils, and all obstinate potentates.

segments.transliteration: allahumma il`an yazida wa ala yazida

translation.en: O Allah, pour curses upon Yazid, the family of Yazid,
and all the descendants of Marwan.

segments.transliteration: allahumma wa da``if ghadabaka wa sakhataka

translation.en: O Allah, multiply Your wrath, ire,
torment, and chastisement

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ أَوَّلِ ظَالِمٍ ظَلَمَ أَهْلَ بَيْتِ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: `ala awwali zalimin zalama ahla bayti nabiyyika

translation.en: for the first transgressor who wronged the Household of Your Prophet.
O Allah, pour curses upon all those who persecuted them
and (please) expose them to Your chastisement.
Verily, You inevitably chastise the criminals.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَٱلْعَنْ أَوَّلَ ظَالِمٍ ظَلَمَ آلَ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wal`an awwala zalimin zalama ala bayti muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, pour curses upon the foremost transgressor who wronged the members of Muhammad’s household,

segments.transliteration: wal`an arwahahum wa diyarahum wa quburahum

translation.en: and (pour curses) upon their souls, abodes, and graves;

segments.arabic: وَٱلْعَنِ ٱللَّهُمَّ ٱلْعِصَابَةَ ٱلَّتِي نَازَلَتِ ٱلْحُسَيْنَ
segments.transliteration: wal`an illahumma al`isabata allati nazalat alhusayna

translation.en: and pour curses, O Allah, upon the gang who encountered al-Husayn
the son of Your Prophet’s daughter

segments.transliteration: wa harabat-hu wa qatalat ashabahu wa ansarahu

translation.en: and who fought against him and killed his companions, supporters,
aides, loyalists,
adherents, lovers,
household, and progeny.
And also pour curses, O Allah, upon those who robbed his possessions,
despoiled his women,

segments.transliteration: wa lam yasma`u kalamahu wa la maqalahu

translation.en: and did not listen to his words and discourse.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَٱلْعَنْ كُلَّ مَنْ بَلَغَهُ ذٰلِكَ فَرَضِيَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wal`an kulla man balaghahu dhalika faradiya bihi

translation.en: O Allah, pour curses upon every one who, when informed about that, was pleased with it
from the past and the last generations
and from all the creatures up to the Judgment Day.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْحُسَيْنُ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah al-Husayn
and upon those who helped and aided you

segments.arabic: وَوَاسَاكَ بِنَفْسِهِ وَبَذَلَ مُهْجَتَهُ فِي ٱلذَّبِّ عَنْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa wasaka binafsihi wa badhala muhjatahu fi aldhdhabbi `anka

translation.en: and those who offered themselves for you and sacrificed their souls in defense of you.
Peace be upon you O my master, upon them,
upon your souls, upon their souls,
upon your soil, and upon their soils.
O Allah, (please) make them find mercy, pleasure,
happiness, and bounty.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O my master Abu-`Abdullah,
O son of the seal of the Prophets,
O son of the chief of the Prophets’ successors,
O son of the doyenne of the women of the worlds.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا شَهِيدُ يَا بْنَ ٱلشَّهِيدِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O martyr and son of the martyr.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ بَلِّغْهُ عَنِّي فِي هٰذِهِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ

translation.en: O Allah, convey at this very hour,

segments.arabic: وَفِي هٰذَا ٱلْيَوْمِ وَفِي هٰذَا ٱلْوَقْتِ
segments.transliteration: wa fi hadha alyawmi wa fi hadha alwaqti

translation.en: on this day, in this moment,

segments.transliteration: wa kulli waqtin tahiyyatan wa salaman

translation.en: and in every moment, to him greetings and salutations from me.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the worlds
and upon those who were martyred with you;

segments.arabic: سَلاَماً مُتَّصِلاَ مَا ٱتَّصَلَ ٱللَّيْلُ وَٱلنَّهَارُ
segments.transliteration: salaman muttasilan ma ittasala allaylu walnnaharu

translation.en: such peace that is as connected as day and night.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ٱلشَّهِيدِ

translation.en: Peace be upon al-Husayn the son of `Ali the martyr.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ علىٰ عليِّ بنِ ٱلْحُسَينِ ٱلشَّهِيدِ

translation.en: Peace be upon `Ali the son of al-Husayn the martyr.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ علىٰ ٱلْعَبَّاسِ بنِ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٱلشَّهِيدِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala al`abbasi bni amiri almu'minina alshshahidi

translation.en: Peace be upon al-`Abbas the son of the Commander of the Faithful the martyr.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلشُّهَدَاءِ مِنْ وُلْدِ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala alshshuhada'i min wuldi amiri almu'minina

translation.en: Peace be upon the martyrs from the sons of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلشُّهَدَاءِ مِنْ وُلْدِ جَعْفَرٍ وَعَقِيلٍ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala alshshuhada'i min wuldi ja`farin wa `aqilin

translation.en: Peace be upon the martyrs from the sons of Ja`far and `Aqil.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ مُسْتَشْهَدٍ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon every faithful believer who was martyred.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and convey to them greetings and salutation from me.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s Messenger.

segments.transliteration: wa `alayka alssalamu wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.
May Allah console you satisfactorily
regarding your son al-Husayn, peace be upon him.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا ٱلْحَسَنِ يَا أَمِيرَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya aba alhasani ya amira almu'minina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu’l-Hasan the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.transliteration: wa `alayka alssalamu wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَكَ ٱلْعَزَاءَ فِي وَلَدِكَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: ahsana allahu laka al`aza'a fi waladika alhusayni

translation.en: May Allah console you satisfactorily regarding your son al-Husayn.
Peace be upon you, O Fatimah,
O daughter of the Messenger of the Lord of the Worlds.

segments.transliteration: wa `alayki alssalamu wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَكِ ٱلْعَزَاءَ فِي وَلَدِكِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: ahsana allahu laki al`aza'a fi waladiki alhusayni

translation.en: May Allah console you satisfactorily regarding your son al-Husayn.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلْحَسَنُ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu-Muhammad al-Hasan.

segments.transliteration: wa `alayka alssalamu wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَكَ ٱلْعَزَاءَ فِي أَخِيكَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: ahsana allahu laka al`aza'a fi akhika alhusayni

translation.en: May Allah console you satisfactorily regarding your brother al-Husayn.
Peace be upon the souls of the believing men and women,
both the alive and the dead.

segments.transliteration: wa `alayhim alssalamu wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon them.

segments.arabic: أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمُ ٱلْعَزَاءَ فِي مَوْلاَهُمُ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ
segments.transliteration: ahsana allahu lahum al`aza'a fi mawlahum alhusayni

translation.en: May Allah console them satisfactorily regarding their chief al-Husayn.
O Allah, (please) include us with those who shall demand with his vengeance

segments.arabic: مَعَ إِمَامٍ عَدْلٍ تُعِزُّ بِهِ ٱلإِسْلاَمَ وَأَهْلَهُ
segments.transliteration: ma`a imamin `adlin tu`izzu bihi al-islama wa ahlahu

translation.en: with a just leader through whom You may confer might on Islam and its people,
O Lord of the Worlds.

text.en: You may then prostrate yourself and say the following words meanwhile:
text.ar: ثم اسجد وقل :

translation.en: O Allah, all praise be to You

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ مَا نَابَ مِنْ خَطْبٍ

translation.en: for all adversaries that have afflicted us.
All praise be to You for all matters.
The complaint about the gross distresses
that afflicted Your select ones and Your intimate servants is addressed to You alone.

segments.arabic: وَذٰلِكَ لِمَا أَوْجَبْتَ لَهُمْ مِنَ ٱلْكَرَامَةِ وَٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْكَثِيرِ
segments.transliteration: wa dhalika lima awjabta lahum min alkaramati walfadli alkathiri

translation.en: This is on account of the honor and abundant favor that You have decided for them.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fasalli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: So, O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي شَفَاعَةَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ يَوْمَ ٱلْوُرُودِ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni shafa`ata alhusayni `alayhi alssalamu yawma alwurudi

translation.en: endue me with the intercession of al-Husayn, peace be upon him, on the Day of Coming (to You),
the witnessed standing, and the approached pond.
Decide for me with You a step of honesty

segments.arabic: مَعَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ وَأَصْحَابِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: ma`a alhusayni wa ashabi alhusayni `alayhi alssalamu

translation.en: with al-Husayn and the companions of al-Husayn, peace be upon him,
who offered him their souls,
sacrificed themselves in defense of him,
and fought against his enemies with him,
seeking Your pleasure, placing their hope in You,
believing in Your promise,
and fearing from Your threat.
You are verily Benignant to whom You wish,
O most merciful of all those who show mercy

text.en: First: As is instructed by Imam al-Sadiq (‘a), one who intends to visit the tomb of Imam al-Husayn (‘a) must first of all observe fasting for three consecutive days before he/she leaves his/her home and then bathe himself/herself on the third day. In the introductory acts of ziyarah on the ‘Id Days, Shaykh Muhammad ibn al-Mashhadi has mentioned that if you intend to visit the holy tomb of Imam al-Husayn (‘a), you may observe fasting for three days, bathe yourself on the third day, gather your family members and dependants, and then say the following supplicatory prayer:
text.ar: الأول : أن يصوم ثلاث أيام متوالية قبل الخروج من بيته ، ويغتسل في اليوم الثالث على ما أمر به الصادق صَلَواتُ الله وسَلامُهُ عَلَيهِ. وقال الشيخ محمد ابن المشهدي في مقدّمات زيارة العيدين : إذا أردت زيارته عليه‌السلام فصم ثلاثة أيام واغتسل في اليوم الثالث واجمع إليك أهلك وعيالك وقل :

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أسْتَوْدِعُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ نَفْسِي وَأهْلِي

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You on this day to accept as trusts with You my self, my family members,
my property, my children,
whatever belongs to me, and whatever for which I am responsible,
the present and the absent.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱحْفَظْنَا بِحِفْظِ ٱلإِيـمَانِ وَٱحْفَظْ عَلَيْنَا

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) protect us with the protection of faith and safeguard us.
O Allah, (please do) make us under Your shelter,
do not deprive us of Your bounty,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُغَيِّرْ مَا بِنَا مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ وَعَافِيَةٍ

translation.en: do not change the bliss and good health that we are enjoying,
and provide us with more favor of You.
Indeed, we desire for You.

text.en: You may then leave your house while you are in a state of submission. You may repeat as many times as possible the following statements:
text.ar: واخرج من منزلك خاشعاً وأكثر من قول :

translation.en: There is no god save Allah.
Allah is the Most Great.
All praise be to Allah.

text.en: You may also repeat statements of glorification of Almighty Allah and invocations of His blessings upon the Holy Prophet and his Household. You may also walk with gravity and tranquility.It is narrated that Almighty Allah creates from each drop of sweat that pours from the pilgrims of Imam al-Husayn’s tomb seventy thousand angels to glorify Him and implore His forgiveness for the pilgrims of Imam al-Husayn’s tomb up to the Hour of Resurrection.
text.ar: ومن تمجيد الله تعالى والصلاة على النبي وآله (صَلَواتُ الله وسَلامُهُ عَلَيهم) ، وامض وعليك السكينة والوقار. وروي أن الله يخلق من عرق زوّار قبر الحسين عليه‌السلام من كل عرقة سبعين ألف ملك يسبحون الله ويستغفرون له ولزوّار الحسين عليه‌السلام إلى أن تقوم الساعة

text.en: Second: Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) is reported to have said, “When you visit the tomb of Abu-’Abdullah (i.e. Imam al-Husayn), you may visit him while you are sad, grieved, shaggy, covered with dust, hungry, and thirsty. This is because al-Husayn (‘a) was slain while he was sad, grieved, shaggy, covered with dust, hungry, and thirsty. You may ask him to grant you your requests and then leave without residing there.”
text.ar: الثاني : عن الصادق عليه‌السلام قال : إذا زرت أبا عبد الله عليه‌السلام فزره وأنت حزين مكروب شعث مغبر جائع عطشان ، فإنّ الحسين عليه‌السلام قتل حزيناً مكروباً شعثاً مغبراً جائعاً عطشاناً واسأله الحوائج وانصرف عنه ولا تتخذه وطناً

text.en: Third: During the journey to Imam al-Husayn’s tomb, a pilgrim must not carry with him delicious and palatable food, such as roasted meat and sweets; rather, a pilgrim must feed on bread and yoghurt.In this respect, Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) is reported to have said, “I have been informed that some people, on their way to visiting the tomb of al-Husayn, carry with them luggage full of meat of young goats, sweats, and the like palatable food; but if they visited the tombs of their fathers and dear ones, they would never carry with them such food!”According to another considerably reported narration, Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) said to al-Mufazzal ibn ‘Umar, “To visit is better than not to visit; and not to visit is better than to visit.”“You have broken my back (i.e. this is so ambiguous that I will never understand)!” said al-Mufazzal.The Imam (‘a) explained, “When you visit the graves of your fathers, you visit them while you are in a miserable, depressed mood! But when you visit the tomb of al-Husayn (‘a), you visit it as if you are on a picnic! No, this is not acceptable unless you visit his tomb while you are unkempt and covered with dust.”The rich and businessmen are the worthiest of observing this instruction during their pilgrimages to the holy tomb of Imam al-Husayn (‘a). Hence, when their associates who live in the towns lying on their way to Karbala’ invite them to banquets, they must refuse; and when they fill their luggage with palatable food, they must also refuse and say, ‘We are on our way to visit Karbala’ and it is unsuitable for us to have such food.’Shaykh al-Kulayni has reported that after Imam al-Husayn (‘a) had been slain, his wife from the tribe of Kalb held a funeral ceremony in which women and servants wept so heavily that their tears dried up. She was gifted a grilled grouse to help her mourn the Imam (‘a). But she refused to take it and said, “We are not in a wedding party! We have nothing to do with this.” She thus ordered to take it out of her house.
text.ar: الثالث : أن لا يتخذ الزاد في سفر زيارته عليه‌السلام مما لذَّ وطاب من الغذاء كاللحم المشوي والحلاوة ، بل يغتذي بالخبز واللّبن. عن الصادق صَلَواتُ الله وسَلامُهُ عَلَيهِ قال : بلغني أن قوما إذا زاروا الحسين عليه‌السلام حملوا معهم السفر فيها الجِداء والاخبصة وأشباهه ، ولو زاروا قبور آبائهم وأحبّائهم ما حملوا معهم هذا. قال عليه‌السلام للمفضل بن عمر في حديث معتبر آخر : تزورون خير من أن لاتزورون ولا تزورون خيرٌ من أن تزوروا. قال قلت : قطعت ظهري. قال : تالله إن أحدكم ليذهب إلى قبر أبيه كئيباً حزيناً وتأتونه بالسفر. كلاّ حتى تأتوه شعثاً غبراً.أقول : ما أجدر للأثرياء والتجار أن يراعوا هذا الأمر في سفر زيارة الحسين صَلَواتُ الله وسَلامُهُ عَلَيهِ ، فإذا دعاهم أخلاؤهم في المدن الواقعة على المسير إلى المَآدب رفضوا الدعوة فإذا عمدوا إلى حقائبهم وسفرهم يملؤونها بما طاب من مطبوخ الزاد كالدجاج المشوي وغيره من الشواء أبوا ذلك وصدّوا عنه قائلين : إنّنا راحلون إلى كربلاء ولا يجدر بنا أن نتغذى بمثل ذلك. روى الكليني (رض) : أنّه لما قتل الحسين صَلَواتُ الله وسَلامُهُ عَلَيهِ أقامت امرأته الكلبية عليه مأتما وبكت وبكت النساء والخدم حتى جفت دموعهن فأهدي إليها الجوني وهو القطا على مافسّر ليقتتن به فيقوين على البكاء على الحسين عليه‌السلام فلما رأته سألت عنه فقيل هو هدية أهداها فلان تستعنّ بها في مأتم الحسين عليه‌السلام فقالت : لسنا في عرس فما نصنع بها؟ فأمرت بإخراجه من الدار .

text.en: Fourth: Among the advisable matters to be considered in journeys to the holy tomb of Imam al-Husayn (‘a) is that a pilgrim should show modesty, humility, and meekness and walk like subservient slaves. Hence, those who have modern vehicles, which move in high speeds… etc. are advised to avoid arrogance and vanity and to stop sturting before the other pilgrims who might suffer troubles and difficulties on their way to Karbala’; therefore, they are advised not to glance sideways at these people.Scholars have narrated that the People of the Cave (i.e. the Seven Sleepers of Ephesus) were among the retinue of Decius (the Roman emperor), but when they were included with Almighty Allah’s mercy, they recognized Him with their minds. Therefore, they began to amend their affairs through practicing monasticism, seclusion, and resort to a cave where they worshipped Him. So, they rode on their horses and left the city. When they walked for three miles, one of them; namely, Malchus, said to them, “O brothers! The submission of the Hereafter has come and the kingdom of the worldly life has gone. So, ride off your horses and walk on your feet.” To explain, he advised them to ride off the horses and walk in the way of Allah on their foot hoping that the Lord would cover them with His compassion and mercy and make for them a relief.These great and reverent persons rode off their horses and walked on feet for seven pharasangs( ) on that day until blood shed from their feet.The point is that a pilgrim to the holy shrine of Imam al-Husayn (‘a) is advised to pay attention to this matter and to know that modesty in journeys, when intended for Almighty Allah, is in fact sublimity and elevation.About the etiquettes of visiting the holy tomb of Imam al-Husayn (‘a), Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) is reported to have said, “Whoever comes to the tomb of al-Husayn (‘a) walking, Almighty Allah will record for him one thousand rewards, erase one thousand of his evildoings, and raise him one thousand ranks for each step he walks. So, when you reach the river Euphrates, you may wash yourself, take off your shoes, and walk barefoot like a subservient slave.”
text.ar: الرابع : مما ندب إليه في سفر زيارة الحسين عليه‌السلام هو التواضع والتذلّل والتخاشع والمشي مشي العبد الذليل. فمن ركب من الزائرين المراكب الحديثة التي تجري مسرعة بقوة البخار وأمثالها يجب عليه التحفظ والاحتراز عن الكبر والخيلاء والتمالك عن التبختر على سائر الزّوار من عباد الله الذين هم يقاسون الشدائد والصعاب في طريقهم إلى كربَلاءِ فلا يرنو إليهم نظر التحقير والازدراء. روى العلماء في أصحاب الكهف أنهم كانوا من خاصة دقيانوس ووزرائه فلمّا وسعتهم رحمة الله تعالى فاستقام فكرهم في معرفة الله عزّ وجلّ وفي إصلاح شأنهم استقرّوا على الرَّهبنة والانزواء عن الخلق والايواء إلى كهف يعبدون الله تعالى فيه فركبوا خيولهم وخرجوا من المدينة فلمّا ساروا ثلاثة أميال قال لهم تمليخا وكان هو أحدهم : يا أخوتاه جاءت مسكنة الآخِرة وذهب ملك الدنيا إنزلوا عن خيولكم وامشوا على أرجلكم. (انزلوا عن الخيول وسيروا في سبيل الله على أرجلكم لعل الله تعالى ينزل عليكم عطفه ورحمته ويجعل لكم من أمركم مخرجاً) فنزل أولئك العظماء الأجلاء عن خيولهم ومشوا على أرجلهم سبعة فراسخ في ذلك اليوم حتى تقاطرت أرجلهم دماً . فعلى زائر هذا القبر الشريف أن يراعي هذا الأمر وليعلم أيضاً أن تواضعه في هذا الطريق لوجه الله تعالى إنما هو رفعة له واعتلاء. وقد روى في آداب زيارته عليه‌السلام عن الصادق عليه‌السلام قال : من أتى قبر الحسين صَلَواتُ الله وسَلامُهُ عَلَيهِ ماشياً كتب الله له بكل خطوة ألف حسنة ومحا عنه ألف سيئة ورفع له ألف درجة. فإذا أتيت الفرات فاغتسل وعلق نعليك وامش حافياً وامش مشي العبد الذليل.

text.en: Fifth: A pilgrim to Imam al-Husayn’s tomb is advised to make all possible efforts to help the walking pilgrims who seem to be tired and exhausted, through taking care of their affairs and carrying them to a rest house where they can have some rest. To belittle such poor pilgrims and to refrain from lending them a hand are strongly discommended matters.
text.ar: الخامس : أن يجتهد ما وسعه الاجتهاد في إعانة الزائر الراجل إذا شاهده وقد تعب وأعياه المسير فيهتم بشأنه ويبلغه منزلاً يستريح فيه ، وحذار من الاستخفاف به وعدم الاهتمام لشأنه.روى الكليني بسند معتبر عن أبي هارون عن أبي عبدالله عليه‌السلام قال : قال لنفر عنده وأنا حاضر :ما لكم تستخفون بنا؟ فقام من بينهم رجلٌ من أهل خراسان وقال : نعوذ بالله أن نستخفّ بكم أو بشي من أمركم. فقال : نعم أنت ممّن استخفّ بي وأهانني. قال الرجل : أعوذ بالله أن أكون كذلك. قال عليه‌السلام : ويلك ألم تسمع فلاناً يناديك عندما كنّا بقرب جحفة ، ويقول أركبني ميلاً فوالله لقد تعبت؟ إنك والله لم ترفع إليه رأسك واستخففت به ، ومن أذلّ مؤمنا فقد أذَلّنا وأضاع حرمة الله عزّ وجلّ.

text.en: Sixth: Muhammad ibn Muslim, the lofty and trustworthy companion of the Imam, has reported that he asked Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (‘a), “When we go on a journey for visiting your father, are we not on a ritual pilgrimage (i.e. hajj)?” The Imam (‘a) answered, “Yes, we are.” Muhammad asked, “Are we required to do whatever we do when we are on ritual pilgrimage?” The Imam (‘a) said, “You are required to commit yourself to excellent company with those who accompany you. You are required to speak as little as possible except when you utter good wording. You are required to mention Almighty Allah as much as possible. You are required to keep your dress clean. You are required to bathe yourself before arriving at al-Ha’ir. You are required to be fearful of Almighty Allah, to offer as many prayers as possible, and to invoke Almighty Allah’s blessings upon the Holy Prophet and his Household. You are required to keep yourself away from whatever you are advised not to do. You are required to cast down your sight against whatever is forbidden for you to see and whatever is suspected. You are required to bestow charitably upon your needy brethren-in-faith when they are detached (of relatives or friends) and to give them the half of your expenditure. You are required to adhere to taqiyyah (self-protection: the practice of concealing one’s belief and foregoing ordinary religious duties when under threat of death or injury to oneself and one’s brethren-in-faith), which is the basis of your religion, to forsake all deeds against which you have been warned, and to leave disputation with others, taking much oath, and engaging yourself in arguments that oblige you to swear. If you do all these required instructions, your obligatory and recommended pilgrimage will be perfect and you will have been qualified to receive forgiveness, mercy, and pleasure from the One Whom you sought what He has in possession through spending such money and leaving your family members.
text.ar: السادس : عن الثقة الجليل محمد بن مسلم عن الإمام محمد الباقر عليه‌السلام قال : قلت له : إذا خرجنا إلى أبيك أفلسنا في حجّ؟ قال : بلى. قلت : فيلزمنا ما يلزم الحاج؟ قال : يلزمك حسن الصحبة لمن يصحبك ويلزمك قلّة الكلام إِلاّ بخير ، ويلزمك كثرة ذكر الله ويلزمك نظافة الثياب ، ويلزمك الغسل قبل أن تأتي الحير ، ويلزمك الخشوع وكثرة الصلاة والصلاة على محمد وآل محمد ويلزمك التوقير لاخذ ما ليس لك ، ويلزمك أن تغضّ بصرك (من المحرّمات والمشتبهات) ويلزمك أن تعود على أهل الحاجة من إخوانك إذا رأيت منقطعاً ، والمواساة (أن تناصفه نفقتك) ويلزمك التقيّة التي قوام دينك بها ، والورع عمّا نهيت عنه وترك الخصومة وكثرة الايمان والجدال الّذي فيه الإيمان فإذا فعلت ذلك تمّ حجُّك وعمرتك واستوجبت من الذي طلبت ما عنده بنفقتك واغترابك عن أهلك ورغبتك فيما رغبت أن تنصرف بالمغفرة والرحمة والرضوان

text.en: Seventh: According to the report of Abu-Hamzah al-Thumali, Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) said about the journey of visiting Imam al-Husayn’s tomb, “As soon as you arrive at Nineveh, you may reside there. As long as you reside there, you must not anoint your body, darken your eyes with kohl, or eat meat.”
text.ar: السابع : في حديث أبي حمزة الثمالي عن الصادق صلوات الله عليه في زيارة الحسين عليه‌السلام أنه قال : إذا بلغت نينوى فحطّ رحلك هناك ولا تدّهن ولا تكتحل ولا تأكل اللحم ما أقمت فيه

text.en: Eighth: It is recommended to bathe oneself with the water of River Euphrates. Many traditions have revealed the merits of doing so. For instance, Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) is reported to have said, “Whoever bathes himself with the water of the Euphrates and then comes to visit Imam al-Husayn’s tomb, will be as free of sins as the day on which his mother gave birth to him, even if such sins were grand ones.”
text.ar: الثامن : أن يغتسل بماء الفرات. فالروايات في فضله كثيرة ، وفي رواية عن الصادق صَلَواتُ الله وسَلامُهُ عَلَيهِ قال : من اغتسل بماء الفرات وزار قبر الحسين عليه‌السلام كان كيوم ولدته أُمه صفراً من الذنوب ولو اقترفها كبائر.

text.en: Ninth: On the instruction of Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) to Yusuf al-Kunnasi, it is recommended to enter the courtyard of Imam al-Husayn’s holy shrine from the eastern gate.
