and You alone can respond to my request.
You know my neediness
and whatever is concealed by the premonitions of hearts
and the thoughts of inner selves.
I therefore beseech You in the name of Muhammad, the Chosen Prophet,
through whom You have stopped all the claims of those who may excuse
and the pretexts of those who may make apologies
and whom You have decided to be mercy to the peoples,

segments.arabic: أَنْ لاََ تَحْرِمَنِي ثَوَابَ زِيَارَةِ وَلِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: an la tahrimani thawaba ziyarati waliyyika

translation.en: (I beseech You) not to deprive me of the rewards of my visiting Your intimate servant,

segments.transliteration: wa akhi nabiyyika amiri almu'minina wa qasdahu

translation.en: the brother of Your Prophet, and the Commander of the Believers and my directing to him,
and to include me with the virtuous delegation to him
and with his pious adherents;
(I beseech for that) in the name of Your mercy, O most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en: Once your eyes fall on the holy dome, say these words:
text.ar: فإذا تراءت لك القُبَّة الشريفة فقل :

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَلَىٰ مَا ٱخْتَصَّنِي بِهِ

translation.en: All praise be to Allah, for He has conferred upon me exclusively
the legitimacy of birth,
and for He has bestowed me, out of His honoring me,
with the loyalty to the pious,
immaculate representatives (of Him),
the best of all, and the most knowledgeable.
O Allah, (please do) accept my seeking for You
and my earnest imploration in Your Presence

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي لاََ تَخْفَىٰ عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati la takhfa `alayka

translation.en: and (please do) forgive my sins that cannot be hidden from You.
Verily, You are Allah, the King, the All-forgiving.

text.en: When you reach at the fortress of Najaf (hisn al-najaf), you may say the following words:
text.ar: فإذا بلغت باب حصن النّجف فقل :

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has guided us to this;

segments.arabic: وَمَا كُنَّا لِنَهْتَدِيَ لَوْلاَ أَنْ هَدَانَا ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ma kunna linahtadiya lawla an hadana allahu

translation.en: and we would not have found the way had it not been that Allah had guided us.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي سَيَّرَنِي فِي بِلاَدِهِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi sayyarani fi biladihi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has made me travel in His countries,
Who has caused me to ride His animals,
Who has made the distant space seem near for me,
Who has kept away from me what is dangerous,
and Who has held off against me what is unwanted
until He made me come up to the Precinct of the brother of His Messenger,
peace be upon him and his Household.

text.en: You may then enter the city, saying:
text.ar: ثم ادخل وقل :

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَدْخَلَنِي هٰذِهِ ٱلْبُقْعَةَ ٱلْمُبَارَكَةَ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi adkhalani hadhihi albuq`ata almubarakata

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has allowed me to enter this blessed zone,
which Allah has blessed
and has chosen for His Prophet’s Successor.
O Allah, (please do) make this zone witness for me.

text.en: When you reach at the first doorstep, you may say the following:
text.ar: فإذا بلغت العتبة الأولى فقل :

translation.en: O Allah, I have stopped at Your door,
I have come to Your court,
to Your Cord do I cling,
Your mercy do I seek,
and by Your Intimate Servant—may Your blessings be upon him—do I beg You.
So, (please do) make it an admissible visit
and a responded supplication.

text.en: You may then stop at the gate of the courtyard, saying the following:
text.ar: ثم قف على باب الصحن وقل :

translation.en: O Allah, this holy place is verily Yours,
this situation is Yours,
and I am entering here so as to confide to You
things that You are more knowledgeable than I am
as well as You are more knowledgeable than I am as regards my secrets and my confidential speech.
All praise be to Allah, the All-benevolent, the All-favorer, the All-munificent,

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي مِنْ تَطَوُّلِهِ سَهَّلَ لِي زِيَارَةَ مَوْلاَيَ بِإِحْسَانِهِ
segments.transliteration: alladhi min tatawwulihi sahhala li ziyarata mawlaya bi'ihsanihi

translation.en: Who, out of His munificence, has made it easy for me to visit my master,
Who has not made me banned from visiting him,
and Who has not included me with those who are prevented from being loyal to his (Divinely commissioned) leadership;
rather, He has bestowed upon me and donated me (this favor).
O Allah, just as You have conferred upon me with the favor of recognition of him,
so also (please do) include me with his adherents (Shi`ah)
and allow me to enter Paradise by means of his intercession,
O most merciful of all those who show mercy.

text.en: You may then enter the courtyard of the holy shrine and say the following words:
text.ar: ثُمَّ ادخل الصحن وَقل :

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has honored me with the recognition of Him,
the recognition of His Messenger,
and the recognition of him the obedience to whom has been made incumbent upon me by Him
on account of His mercy to me,
His favor that He bestowed upon me,
and His conferral upon me with faith.

segments.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَدْخَلَنِي حَرَمَ أَخِي رَسُولِهِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi adkhalani harama akhi rasulihi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has allowed me to enter the shrine of His Messenger’s brother
and has made me see this shrine while I enjoy good health.

segments.arabic: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَنِي مِنْ زُوَّارِ قَبْرِ وَصِيِّ رَسُولِهِ
segments.transliteration: alhamdu lillahi alladhi ja`alani min zuwwari qabri wasiyyi rasulihi

translation.en: All praise be to Allah Who has included me with the visitors of the tomb of His Messenger’s successor.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاََ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god but Allah,
alone without having any associate,

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna muhammadan `abduhu wa rasuluhu

translation.en: and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger.
He has conveyed the truth from Allah.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ عَلِيّاً عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ وَأَخُو رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna `aliyyan `abdu allahi wa akhu rasuli allahi

translation.en: And I bear witness that `Ali is the servant of Allah and the brother of Allah’s Messenger.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ ٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ ٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: allahu akbaru allahu akbaru allahu akbaru

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great. Allah is the Most Great. Allah is the Most Great.

segments.arabic: لاََ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَٱللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa allahu wallahu akbaru

translation.en: There is no god but Allah, and Allah is the Most Great.
All praise be to Allah for He has guided me

segments.arabic: وَتَوْفِيقِهِ لِمَا دَعَا إِلَيْهِ مِنْ سَبِيلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa tawfiqihi lima da`a ilayhi min sabilihi

translation.en: and led me successfully to His course to which He has invited (us).
O Allah, You are verily the most excellent besought One
and the most honorable purposed One.
I thus have come to You, seeking nearness to You
in the name of Your Prophet, the Prophet of Mercy
and in the name of his brother, the Commander of the Faithful,

segments.arabic: عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ عَلَيْهِمَا ٱلسَّلاَمُ

translation.en: `Ali the son of Abu-Talib—peace be upon them both.
So, (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
do not disappoint my efforts,

segments.arabic: وَٱنْظُرْ إِلَيَّ نَظْرَةً رَحيمَةً تُنْعَشُنِي بِهَا
segments.transliteration: wanzur ilayya nazratan rahimatan tun`ishuni biha

translation.en: (please) grant me a merciful look from You through which You refresh me,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْنِي عِنْدَكَ وَجِيهاً فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ

translation.en: make me illustrious in Your view in this world as well as the world to come,
and make me of those brought near to You.

text.en: You may then walk until you stop at the door of the portico and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم امش حتى تقف على باب الرواق وقل :

translation.en: Peace be upon Allah’s Messenger

segments.arabic: أَمِينِ ٱللَّهِ عَلَىٰ وَحْيِهِ وَعَزَائِمِ أَمْرِهِ

translation.en: whom Allah has entrusted with His Revelations and with His determined commandments,
who sealed the previous Messages,
paved the way to the coming blessings,
and who prevails over all that.
May the mercy and blessings of Allah be upon him, too.
Peace be upon the holder of tranquility.
peace be upon the one buried at al-Madinah.
Peace be upon the triumphed and supported (by Allah).

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ أَبِي ٱلْقَاسِمِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala abi alqasimi muhammadi bni `abdi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon Abu’l-Qasim, Muhammad the son of `Abdullah.
May the mercy and blessings of Allah be upon him, too.

text.en: You may then enter the portico with your right foot, stop at the door of the dome, and say these words:
text.ar: ثم ادخل الرواق وقدم رجلك اليمنى قبل اليسرى وقف على باب القُبَّة وقل :

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاََ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god but Allah,
alone without having any associate,

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna muhammadan `abduhu wa rasuluhu

translation.en: and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger.

segments.arabic: جَاءَ بِٱلْحَقِّ مِنْ عِنْدِهِ وَصَدَّقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
segments.transliteration: ja'a bilhaqqi min `indihi wa saddaqa almursalina

translation.en: He has conveyed the truth from Him and verified the (past) Messengers.
Peace be upon you, O Messenger of Allah!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حَبِيبَ ٱللَّهِ وَخِيَرَتَهُ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya habiba allahi wa khiyaratahu min khalqihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O most-beloved of Allah and best of His beings!
Peace be upon the Commander of the Faithful:
the servant of Allah and the brother of Allah’s Messenger.
O master, O Commander of the Faithful!
I, your slave and the son of your slave and your bondmaid,
have come to you seeking the refuge of your protection,
directing to your shrine,
turning my face toward your place,
and begging Almighty Allah in your name.
May I enter, O master?
May I enter, O Commander of the Faithful?
May I enter, O argument of Allah?
May I enter, O trustee of Allah?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا مَلاَئِكَةَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُقِيمِينَ فِي هٰذَا ٱلْمَشْهَدِ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mala'ikata allahi almuqimina fi hadha almashhadi

translation.en: May I enter, O angels of Allah who reside in this shrine?
O master, may you permit me to enter

segments.arabic: أَفْضَلَ مَا أَذِنْتَ لأَحَدٍ مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: afdala ma adhinta li'ahadin min awliya'ika

translation.en: in the best way of permission you have ever given to any of your devotees?

segments.arabic: فَإِنْ لَمْ أَكُنْ لَهُ أَهْلاًَ فَأَنْتَ أَهْلٌ لِذٰلِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'in lam akun lahu ahlan fa'anta ahlun lidhlika

translation.en: If I am too little to deserve your permission, then You are too exalted to deprive me of it.

text.en: You may then kiss the doorstep and enter there with your right foot, saying the following:
text.ar: ثم قبل العتبة وقدم رجلك اليمنى على اليسرى وادخل وأنت تقول :

translation.en: In the Name of Allah (I begin), in Allah (I trust),
on the way of Allah,
and on the norm of the Messenger of Allah (I proceed),
may Allah bless him and his Household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱغْفِرْ لِي وَٱرْحَمْنِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ighfir li warhamni wa tub `alayya

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) forgive me
for You are verily the Oft-Returning.

text.en: You may then walk until you face and become opposite to the holy tomb. You may stop there before reaching the tomb, and say the following:
text.ar: ثم امش حتى تحاذي القبر واستقبله بوجهك وقف قبل وصولك إليه وقل :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu min allahi `ala muhammadin rasuli allahi

translation.en: Peace of Allah be upon Muhammad the Messenger of Allah,
the trustee of Allah over His Revelations, Messages,
and determined commandments,
the core of the Divine Inspiration and Revelation,
who sealed the previous Messages,
paved the way to the coming blessings,
who prevails over all that,
the witness over the creatures,
and the luminous torch.

segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayhi wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon him.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ ٱلْمَظْلُومِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ahli baytihi almazlumina

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and his Household, the oppressed ones,
with the best, most perfect, most exalted,
and most honored blessings that You have ever showed on any

segments.transliteration: min anbiya'ika wa rusulika wa asfiya'ika

translation.en: of Your Prophets, Messengers, and Chosen servants.
O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon the Commander of the Faithful,
Your servant, the best of Your creatures after Your Prophet,
the brother of Your Messenger,
the Successor of Your most-beloved one,
whom You have selected from among Your beings,
the guide to those whom You sent with Your messages,
the establisher of the true religion by means of Your justice,
and the decisive judge among Your beings.

segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayhi wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon him.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلأَئِمَّةِ مِنْ وُلْدِهِ

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon the Imams from his offspring,
(who are) the holders of Your commandments after him,
and the immaculate ones whom You have accepted as supporters of Your religion,
keepers of Your secret,
witnesses over Your created beings,
and signs (of example) for Your servants.
May Your blessings be upon them all.
Peace be upon the Commander of the Faithful,
`Ali the son of Abu-Talib,
the successor of Allah’s Messenger, his representative,
who managed his affairs after him,

segments.transliteration: sayyidi alwasiyyina wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: and the master of all Prophet’s successors. May Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon him, too.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ فَاطِمَةَ بِنْتِ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon Fatimah, the daughter of Allah’s Messenger,
may Allah’s blessings be upon him,
(she is) the doyenne of all the women of this world.
Peace be upon al-Hasan and al-Husayn,

segments.arabic: سَيِّدَيْ شَبَابِ أَهْلِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ مِنَ ٱلْخَلْقِ أَجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: sayyiday shababi ahli aljannati min alkhalqi ajma`ina

translation.en: the chiefs of the youth of Paradise among all beings.
Peace be upon the Guiding Imams.
Peace be upon the Prophets and the Messengers.
Peace be upon the Imams whom are entrusted (with the religion by Allah).

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ خَاصَّةِ ٱللَّهِ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon the elite creatures of Allah.
Peace be upon those who understand by tokens.
Peace be upon the faithful believers
who have carried out His orders,
supported the saints of Allah,
and have feared for their fear.
Peace be upon the Favorite Angels.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ عِبَادِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلصَالِحِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon us and upon the righteous servants of Allah.

text.en: You may then draw near the tomb, face it, make the kiblah direction behind you, and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم أدنُ من القبر وإستقبله واجعل القبلة خلفك وقل :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Commander of the Faithful.
Peace be upon you, O beloved by Allah.
Peace be upon you, O choice of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O intimate servant of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Argument of Allah (against His creatures).
Peace be upon you, O leader of true guidance.
Peace be upon you, O sign of piety.
Peace be upon you, O successor,
religious, pious,
pure, and loyal.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا ٱلْحَسَنِ وَٱلْحُسَيْنِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O father of al-Hasan and al-Husayn.
Peace be upon you, O pillar of the religion.
Peace be upon you, O chief of the successors (of Prophets),
trustee of the Lord of the worlds,
judge on the Judgment Day,
best of the believers,
chief of the most truthful ones,
elite of the Prophets’ lineage,
door to the wisdom of the Lord of the worlds,
keeper of His Revelation,
container of His knowledge,
advisor of His Prophet’s people,
next to His Messenger,
who sacrificed himself for him (i.e. for the Messenger),
speaker with his arguments,
inviter to his principles,
and steadfast on his instructions.
O Allah, I do bear witness

segments.arabic: أَنَّهُ قَدْ بَلَّغَ عَنْ رَسُولِكَ مَا حُمِّلَ
segments.transliteration: annahu qad ballagha `an rasulika ma hummila

translation.en: that he carried out the mission conveyed to him by Your Messenger,
achieved what he was ordered to keep,
kept what has been stored with him,
deemed lawful that which You deem lawful,
deemed unlawful that which You deem unlawful,
put into practice Your laws,
strove against the contraveners for Your sake,
against the wrongdoers according to Your laws,
and against the apostates from Your decree,
did all that with steadfastness, expecting Your reward,
and no blame of any blamer could ever influence him.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَيْهِ أَفْضَلَ مَا صَلَّيْتَ

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon him with the best way
You have ever blessed any of Your intimate servants, Your choicest ones,
and Your Prophet’s successors.
O Allah, this is the tomb of Your representative
the obedience to whom has been made by You incumbent (upon us),
the loyalty to whom has been made by You in the necks of Your servants,

segments.transliteration: wa khalifatika alladhi bihi ta'khudhu wa tu`ti

translation.en: and (it is the tomb of) Your viceroy through whom You will give and take,
and through whom You will reward and punish.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ قَصَدْتُهُ طَمَعاً لِمَا أَعْدَدْتَهُ لأَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa qad qasadtuhu tama`an lima a`dadtahu li'awliya'ika

translation.en: I have directed to him, seeking for what You have prepared for Your intimate servants.
So, (I beseech You) in the name of his eminent standing with You,
in the name of his great status in Your view,
and in the name of the closeness of his position to You,
to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and to do to me that which is expected from You,
for You are verily worthy of honoring and generous granting.
Peace be upon you, O my master,
and upon your partners in the place, (Prophet) Adam and (Prophet) Noah.
May Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you, too.

text.en: You may then kiss the tomb from the head’s side and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم قبل الضريح وقف مما يلي الرأس وقل :

translation.en: O my master, to You is my coming
and in your name do I beseech my Lord
so that I may achieve my goal.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ ٱلْمُتَوَسِّلَ بِكَ غَيْرُ خَائِبٍ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna almutawassila bika ghayru kha'ibin

translation.en: I bear witness that he who beseeches (Allah) in your name shall never be disappointed
and he who implores (Allah) in your name, with full cognizance,
shall never be rejected; rather, all his needs shall be settled.
So, (please) be my interceder to Allah—

segments.transliteration: rabbika wa rabbi fi qada'i hawa'iji

translation.en: my and your Lord—for purpose of settling my needs,
making easy my affairs,
relieving my depressions,
forgiving my sins,
expanding my sustenance sources,
extending my lifetime,

segments.transliteration: wa i`ta'i su'li fi akhirati wa dunyaya

translation.en: and granting me all my requests for the world to come as well as this world.
O Allah, curse the killers of the Commander of the Faithful.
O Allah, curse the killers of al-Hasan and al-Husayn.
O Allah, curse the killers of the Imams,
and subject them to such a painful chastisement
that You have never subjected any of Your creatures to it,
such an enormous chastisement that never ceases,

segments.transliteration: wa la ajala wa la amada

translation.en: nor comes to an end, nor reaches a deadline,
for what they contended against Your authorities.
And (please do) prepare for them such an intense torture
that You have not decided for any of Your creatures.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ وَأَدْخِلْ عَلَىٰ قَتَلَةِ أَنْصَارِ رَسُولِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa adkhil `ala qatalati ansari rasulika

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) impose upon the killers of Your Messenger’s supporters,
the killers of the Commander of the Faithful,
the killers of al-Hasan and al-Husayn,
the killers of the supporters of al-Hasan and al-Husayn,

segments.arabic: وَقَتَلَةِ مَنْ قُتِلَ فِي وِلاَيَةِ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ أَجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa qatalati man qutila fi wilayati ali muhammadin ajma`ina

translation.en: and the killers of all those whom were killed because of their loyalty to the Household of Muhammad,
a painful, cyclic punishment
in the lowest class of Hellfire
that the punishment shall not be lightened for them
and they shall lay therein in utter despair and endless curse;
they shall be hanging down their heads before their Lord
after they shall find out with certainty regret and long-lasting disgrace,
for they killed the members of the household of Your Prophets and Messengers
and the righteous servants from their followers.
O Allah, (do) curse them in the most concealed secrecy
and in the most apparent openness,
in Your lands and in Your heavens.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْ لِي قَدَمَ صِدْقٍ فِي أَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al li qadama sidqin fi awliya'ika

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) decide for me a truthful step with Your intimate servants

segments.transliteration: wa habbib ilayya mashahidahum wa mustaqarrahum

translation.en: and make me long for their shrines and their residing-places
until You include me with them

segments.arabic: وَتَجْعَلَنِي لَهُمْ تَبَعاً فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa taj`alani lahum taba`an fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: and make me among their followers in this world as well as the world to come.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: ثم قبل الضريح واستقبل قبرالحسين بن علي عليه‌السلام بوجهك واجعل القبلة بين كتفيك وقل :

translation.en: You may then kiss the tomb, face the tomb of Imam al-Husayn ibn ‘Ali (‘a), make the kiblah direction seem to be between your shoulders, and say the following words:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah, the luminous lady,
the doyenne of all women of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا ٱلأَئِمَّةِ ٱلْهَادِينَ ٱلْمَهْدِيِّينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya aba al-a'immati alhadina almahdiyyina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O father of the Imams—the guides and well-guided.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَرِيعَ ٱلدَّمْعَةِ ٱلسَّاكِبَةِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O victim of the pouring tears.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَاحِبَ ٱلْمُصِيبَةِ ٱلرَّاتِبَةِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O man of the disastrous misfortune.
Peace be upon you and upon your grandfather and father.
Peace be upon you and upon your mother and brother.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ ٱلأَئِمَّةِ مِنْ ذُرِيَّتِكَ وَبَنِيكَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka wa `ala al-a'immati min dhurriyyatika wa banika

translation.en: Peace be upon you and upon the Imams from your offspring and descendants.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ لَقَدْ طَيَّبَ ٱللَّهُ بِكَ ٱلتُّرَابَ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu laqad tayyaba allahu bika altturaba

translation.en: I bear witness that Allah has purified the soil (on which you fell down) through you,
has made clear His Book through you,

segments.transliteration: wa ja`alaka wa abaka wa jaddaka

translation.en: and has made you, your father, your grandfather,

segments.transliteration: wa akhaka wa banika `ibratan li'uli al-albabi

translation.en: your brother, and your descendants examples for the owners of intellects.
O son of the blessed, purified ones
who recite (and apply) the Book utterly,
I direct my greetings to you.
May Allah make His peace and blessings to be upon you

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلَ أَفْئِدَةً مِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ تَهْوِي إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ja`ala af'idatan min alnnasi tahwi ilayka

translation.en: and may He make the hearts of some people yearn toward you.

segments.arabic: مَا خَابَ مَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِكَ وَلَجَأَ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: ma khaba man tamassaka bika wa laja'a ilayka

translation.en: Disappointment shall never chase him who adheres to you and resorts to you.

text.en: You may then move to the side of the feet and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم تحول إلى عند الرجلين وقل :

translation.en: Peace be upon the father of the Imams,
the intimate friend of Prophethood,
and the marked, exclusively, by fraternity (with the Holy Prophet).
Peace be upon the head of the religion and faith,
and the word of the All-beneficent Lord.
Peace be upon the Scale of the deeds
the turner over of manners,
the sword of the Lord of Majesty,
and who supplies with the fresh water of Salsabil.
Peace be upon the most righteous of the believers,
the inheritor of the Prophet’s knowledge,
and the judge on the Judgment Day.
Peace be upon the tree of piety
and the hearer of hidden and confidential speeches.
Peace be upon Allah’s conclusive argument,
His flowing boon,
and His forceful punishment.
Peace be upon the clear-cut path,
the patent star,
the advising leader,
and the igniting firelock.
May Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon him.

text.en: You may then say the following:
text.ar: ثم قل :

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon the Commander of the Faithful,
`Ali the son of Abu-Talib:
the brother, ally,

segments.transliteration: wa nasirihi wa wasiyyihi wa wazirihi

translation.en: supporter, successor, and patron of Your Prophet,
the store of his knowledge,
the depot of his secrets,
the door to his wisdom,
the spokesman with his arguments,
the caller to his code of law,
his viceroy in his community,
the reliever of agony from his face,
the terminator of the infidels,
the conqueror on the wicked ones,
whom You have made, with regard to his position to Your Prophet,
to occupy the same position that (Prophet) Aaron enjoyed with (Prophet) Moses.
O Allah, (please do) give support to any one who supports him,
be the enemy of every one who antagonizes him,
give victory to any one who gives him his victory,
disappoint every one who disappoints him,
and lay curse on any one who incurs the hostility of him
from the past and the coming generations.
And (please do) bless him with the best blessings
that You have ever poured on any of Your Prophet’s successors.
O Lord of the worlds!

text.en: You may then return to your place at the side of the head for visiting Prophet Adam and Prophet Noah, peace be upon them. Visiting Prophet Adam, you may say the following:
text.ar: ثم عد إلى جانب الرأس لزيارة آدم ونوح عليه‌السلام وقل في زيارة آدم عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O choice of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O beloved by Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Prophet of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O trustee of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَلِيفَةَ ٱللَّهِ فِي أَرْضِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya khalifata allahi fi ardihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O representative of Allah in His lands.
Peace be upon you, O father of all mankind.
Peace be upon you and upon your soul and body,

segments.transliteration: wa `ala alttahirina min wuldika wa dhurriyyatika

translation.en: and upon the pure ones from your sons and descendants.

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ صَلاَةً لاََ يُحْصيهَا إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `alayka salatan la yuhsiha illa huwa

translation.en: May Allah pour upon you such innumerable blessings that none can count save Him.
May Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

text.en: Visiting Prophet Noah, you may say the following words:
text.ar: وقل في زيارة نوح عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Prophet of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O choice of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O intimate servant of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O beloved by Allah.
Peace be upon you, O chief of the Messengers.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَمِينَ ٱللَّهِ فِي أَرْضِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya amina allahi fi ardihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O trustee of Allah in His lands.

segments.arabic: صَلَوَاتُ ٱللَّهِ وَسَلاَمُهُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ روُحِكَ وَبَدَنِكَ
segments.transliteration: salawatu allahi wa salamuhu `alayka wa `ala ruhika wa badanika

translation.en: May Allah’s peace and blessings be upon you, upon your soul and body,
and upon the pure ones from among your sons.
May Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

text.en:
You may then offer a six unit prayer. In the first two units, which are intended for visiting the tomb of Imam ‘Ali Amir al-Mu’minin (‘a), you may recite Surah al-Fatihah and <ref=1:55>Surah Al-Rahman</ref>
 at the first unit, and recite Surah al-Fatihah and <ref=1:36>Surah Yasin</ref>  in the second. When you say the tashahhud and taslim statements, you may then say the famous Tasbih al-Zahra’ litany, implore for Almighty Allah’s forgiveness (i.e. istighfar), pray Him to grant you your personal needs, and then say the following words:
text.ar:
ثم صل ست ركعات ركعتان منها لزيارة أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام تقرأ في الركعة الأولى فاتحة الكتاب وسورة <ref=1:55>الرحمن</ref> ، وفي الثانية الحمد وسورة <ref=1:36>یس</ref>
 وتشهد وسلم وسبح تسبيح الزهراء عليها‌السلام واستغفر الله عزَّ وجلَّ وادع لنفسك ثم قل :

translation.en: O Allah, I have offered these two units of prayer,

segments.transliteration: hadiyyatan minni ila sayyidi wa mawlaya

translation.en: as present from me to my master and chief:
Your intimate servant, the brother of Your Messenger,
the Commander of the Faithful
and the chief of the Prophets’ successors;
namely, `Ali the son of Abu-Talib,
may Allah’s blessings be upon him and his household.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fasalli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: So, O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
accept that prayer from me,
and confer upon me with the reward that You give to the good-doers.
O Allah, to You have I offered prayer,
genuflected,
and prostrated myself;
to You alone without associating anyone with You,
because prayers,
genuflections, and prostrations are submitted to none save You,

segments.arabic: لأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاََ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: li'annaka anta allahu la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: because You are Allah; there is no god save You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
admit my visit,
and respond to my requests
in the name of Muhammad and his Household—the immaculate ones.

text.en: You may then provide the other four units as present to Prophet Adam and Prophet Noah. You may then prostrate yourself for thanksgiving (sajdat al-shukr) and say the following words:
text.ar: وتهدى الأَربع ركعات الآخِر إلى آدم عليه‌السلام ونوح عليه‌السلام ثم تسجد سجدة الشكر وقل فيها :

translation.en: O Allah, to You do I direct my face,
to You do I resort,
and on You do I rely.
O Allah, You are my trust and my hope;

segments.arabic: فَٱكْفِنِي مَا أَهَمَّنِي وَمَا لاََ يُهِمُّنِي
segments.transliteration: fakfini ma ahammani wa ma la yuhimmuni

translation.en: so, (please do) save me from whatever concerns me, whatever does not concern me,

segments.transliteration: wa ma anta a`lamu bihi minni

translation.en: and whatever You know more than I do.
Certainly, protected is he who lies under Your protection,
glory be to Your praise,
and there is no deity save You.
(Please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
and hasten their Relief.

text.en: You may then put your right cheek on the ground and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم ضع خدّك الأيمن على الأَرض وقل :

translation.en: (Please do) have mercy on my humiliation before You,
on my earnest imploring to You,
on my loneliness among people,
and on my amiability with You.

segments.arabic: يَا كَرِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ
segments.transliteration: ya karimu ya karimu ya karimu

translation.en: O All-generous! O All-generous! O All-generous!

text.en: You may then put your left cheek on the ground and say the following words:
text.ar: ثم ضع خدّك الأيسر على الأَرض وقل :

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي حَقّاً حَقّاً
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa anta rabbi haqqan haqqan

translation.en: There is no god save You, my Lord; truly, truly.

segments.arabic: سَجَدْتُ لَكَ يَا رَبِّ تَعَبُّداً وَرِقّاً
segments.transliteration: sajadtu laka ya rabbi ta`abbudan wa riqqan

translation.en: O Lord, I prostrate myself before You as sign of my worshipfulness and servitude to You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ عَمَلِي ضَعيفٌ فَضَاعِفْهُ لِي

translation.en: O Allah, my deed is certainly feeble; so, (please do) grant it strength by increasing it many times,

segments.arabic: يَا كَرِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ
segments.transliteration: ya karimu ya karimu ya karimu

translation.en: O All-generous! O All-generous! O All-generous!

text.en: You may then return to the state of ordinary prostration and repeat the following word one hundred times:
text.ar: ثم عد إلى السجود وقل مائة مرة:

translation.en: Thanks

text.en: You are recommended to pray Almighty Allah as earnestly as possible, because the place you are in is the zone of granting requests. You are also recommended to implore Almighty Allah for forgiveness as sincerely as possible, because the place you are in is the zone of forgiveness. You are recommended to beseech Almighty Allah for settling your needs as seriously as possible, because the place you are in is the zone of responding to the needs.
text.ar: واجتهد في الدعاء فإنه موضع مسألة وأكثر من الاستغفار فإنه موضع مغفرة واسأل الحوائج فإنه مقام إجابة.

name: Dua After The Ziyarah of imam ali

text.en: In his book of al-Mazar, Sayyid ibn Tawus says: Whenever you offer an obligatory or a supererogatory prayer during your residence in the holy shrine of Imam ‘Ali Amir al-Mu’minin (‘a), you are recommended to say the following supplication:
text.ar: وقال السيد ابن طاووس في المزار وكلما صلّيت صلاة فرضاً كانت أو نفلاً مدة مقامك بمشهد أمير المؤمنين وادع بهذا الدعاء :

translation.en: O Allah, Your determination is surely unavoidable,
Your destiny is unavoidable,
Your act is unavoidable,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa bika

translation.en: and there is no power and no might except with You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَمَا قَضَيْتَ عَلَيْنَا مِنْ قَضَاءٍ

translation.en: So, O Allah, whatever act You decide on us
and whatever decree You make on us,

segments.transliteration: fa'a`tina ma`ahu sabran yaqharuhu wa yadmaghuhu

translation.en: (please do) grant us along with it patience that repels and fends it off
and make it ascend for our good toward Your Pleasure
so that it shall grow up our rewards, favors,
tributes, honor,
glory, boon,
and dignity in this world as well as the world to come.
And (please) do not lessen our rewards.
O Allah, whatever donation You give us,
whatever virtue You confer on us,
whatever endowment You bestow on us,

segments.transliteration: fa'a`tina ma`ahu shukran yaqharuhu wa yadmaghuhu

translation.en: (please) grant us with it thanksgiving that repels and fends it off.
And make it ascend for our good toward Your Pleasure,
and ascend in our rewards, tribute,
honor, Your boon,
and Your honoring (us) in this world as well as the world to come.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْهُ لَنَا أَشَراً وَلاَ بَطَراً
segments.transliteration: wa la taj`alhu lana asharan wa la bataran

translation.en: And (please) do not make it to be for us a source of evil, ungratefulness,

segments.transliteration: wa la fitnatan wa la maqtan

translation.en: seditious matter, hatred,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ عَذَاباً وَلاَ خِزْياً فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa la `adhaban wa la khizyan fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: torture, or disgrace in this world as well as the world to come.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَثْرَةِ ٱللِّسَانِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna na`udhu bika min `athrati allisani

translation.en: O Allah, we do seek Your protection against slips of tongues,
evil situations,
and lightness of the Scale.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
make us meet our the rewards of good deeds at the hours of our death,
do not show us the fruits of our deeds as nothing but regrets,
do not disgrace us when You judge us,

segments.transliteration: wa la tafdahna bisayyi'atina yawma nalqaka

translation.en: do not expose us because of our evildoings on the Day when we shall meet You,

segments.transliteration: waj`al qulubana tadhkuruka wa la tansaka

translation.en: make our hearts remember You always and never forget You,

segments.transliteration: wa takhshaka ka'annaha taraka hatta talqaka

translation.en: make our hears fear You as if they can see You until we meet You,

segments.transliteration: wa salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
change our evildoings into good deeds,
make our good deeds to be grades,
change our grades into chambers (in Paradise),
and make our chambers high.
O Allah, (please do) expand the source of sustenance for our poor people

segments.arabic: مِنْ سَعَةِ مَا قَضَيْتَ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِكَ

translation.en: from the expansion that You have taken upon Yourself to make.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and endue us with true guidance as long as You grant us life,
with honor as long as You keep us alive,
with forgiveness when You decide to cease our lifetime,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْحِفْظِ فِي مَا بَقِيَ مِنْ عُمْرِنَا

translation.en: with protection in the rest of our lifetime,
with blessings in the sustenance that You give us,
with help to carry out what You have burdened us with,
and with steadfastness against what You have imposed on us.
And do not punish us for our wrongdoings,
do not treat us on basis of our lack of knowledge,
do not draw us near to destruction gradually on account of our sins,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ أَحْسَنَ مَا نَقُولُ ثَابِتاً فِي قُلُوبِنَا
segments.transliteration: waj`al ahsana ma naqulu thabitan fi qulubina

translation.en: make the best of our words to be firm in our hearts,
make us to be great persons in Your view
but humble ones in our own views,
make that which You have taught us to benefit us,
and increase us with useful knowledge.

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ قَلْبٍ لاََ يَخْشَعُ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min qalbin la yakhsha`u

translation.en: And I seek Your protection against a heart that does not submit (to You),
an eye that does not shed tears (for fear of You),
and a prayer that is not admitted (by You).
(Please do) rescue us from the evil seditious matters,
O Manager of this world and the world to come.

text.en: In Misbah al-Za’ir, Sayyid Ibn Tawus has mentioned another supplication that is advisably said after Ziyarah of Imam ‘Ali (‘a). As a matter of fact, this supplication is the same as the supplicatory prayer known as <ref=3:1252>Dua Alqamah</ref>.
text.ar: قال السيد في (مصباح الزائر) : دعاء آخر يستحب الدعاء به عقيب زيارة أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام : <ref=3:1252>علقمة دعاء</ref>

name: Ziyarat of Imam Hussain before Imam Ali

text.en: Ziyarah Of The Head Of Imam Husayn (A) In The Tomb Of Imam Ali(A) And Masjid Al Hannanah
text.ar: وروي في المستدرك عن كتاب (المزار) لمحمد ابن المشهدي أنه زار الصادق عليه‌السلام رأس الحسين عليه‌السلام عند رأس أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام وصلّى عنده أربع ركعات وهذه هي الزيارة :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ ٱلصِّديقَةِ ٱلطَّاهِرَةِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the veracious and pure
doyenne of all women of the world.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O my master, Abu-`Abdullah.
So be upon you Allah’s mercy and blessings.
I bear witness that you offered the prayers,
gave alms (zakat),
you enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,
recited the Book as it ought to be read,

segments.transliteration: wa jahadta fi allahi haqqa jihadihi

translation.en: strove for the sake of Allah as it ought to be striven,
and stood harm for His sake,
seeking His reward, until death came upon you.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna alladhina khalafuka wa harabuka

translation.en: And I witness that those who dissented with you, those who fought against you,

segments.transliteration: wa anna alladhina khadhaluka walladhina qataluka

translation.en: those who disappointed you, and those who slew you—
all those are accused in the words of the Ummi (i.e. inhabitant of Umm al-Qura, Makkah) Prophet.
And the forger must suffer frustration!
May Allah curse those who prosecuted you
from the past and the coming generations
and may He double for them the painful chastisement.

segments.arabic: أَتَيْتُكَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: ataytuka ya mawlaya yabna rasuli allahi

translation.en: O my master and son of Allah’s Messenger,
I have come visiting you and recognizing your status,
showing loyalty to your adherents,
incurring the hostility of your enemies,
acknowledging the true guidance that you follow,
and understanding the deviation (from the right path) of any one who disagrees with you.
So, (please) intercede for me with your Lord.

text.en: It is appropriate to say this form of Ziyarah of Imam al-Husayn’s tomb from the the mosque known as Masjid al-Hannanah, for Shaykh Muhammad ibn al-Mashhadi has reported that Imam Ja’far al-Sadiq (‘a) said this form of Ziyarah at this mosque and then offered a four unit prayer there.
text.ar: أقول : من المناسب أن يزار بهذه الزيارة في مسجد الحنانة ، فقد روى محمد ابن المشهدي عن الصادق عليه‌السلام أنّه زار الحسين عليه‌السلام في مسجد الحنانة بهذه الزيارة وصلّى أربع ركعات ولا يخفى أنّ مسجد الحنانة من مساجد النجف الشريفة وقد روي أنّ فيه رأس الحسين عليه‌السلام .

text.en: It goes without saying that Masjid al-Hannanah is one of the honorable mosques of the holy city of Najaf. It has been also narrated that the head of Imam al-Husayn (‘a) is buried at that mosque.
text.ar: وروى أيضاً أنّ الصادق عليه‌السلام صلى هناك ركعتين فسئل : ما هذه الصلاة؟ فقال : هذا موضع رأس جدّي‌الحسين بن علي عليه‌السلام وضعوه هنا عندما أتوا به من كربَلاءِ ثم ذهبوا به إلى عبيد الله بن زياد. وروي أنه عليه‌السلام قال : أدع هنالك فقل :

text.en: It has been also narrated that after Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) has accomplished a two unit prayer at this mosque, he was asked about the prayer. “This is the place where they put the head of my grandfather, al-Husayn ibn ‘Ali, when they brought it from Karbala’,” answered the Imam (‘a). “From here, they took the head to ‘Ubaydullah ibn Ziyad,” he added.
It has been further narrated that Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) advised that the following supplicatory prayer would be said at this mosque:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ تَرى مَكانِي وَتَسْمَعُ كَلامِي وَلا يَخْفى عَلَيْكَ شَيٌْ مِنْ أَمْرِي وَكَيْفَ يَخْفى عَلَيْكَ ما أَنْتَ مَكَوِّنُهُ وَبارِئُهُ ، وَقَدْ جِئْتُكَ مُسْتَشْفِعاً بِنَبِيِّكَ نَبِيِّ الرَّحْمَةِ وَمُتَوَسِّلاً بِوَصِيِّ رَسُولِكَ ، فَأَسْأَلُكَ بِهِما ثَباتَ القَدَمِ وَالهُدى وَالمَغْفِرَةَ فِي الدُّنْيا وَالآخِرةِ

name: The Other Ziyarats of imam ali

text.en: The Second Ziyarat: <ref=3:1233>Ziarat Ameenallah</ref>
text.ar: الزیارة الثانیة: <ref=3:1233>الزيارة المعروفة بأمين الله</ref>

text.en: Third Ziyarah
text.ar: الزيارة الثالثة

text.en: Sayyid `Abd al-Karim ibn Tawus has reported the following from Safwan al-Jammal:
text.ar: روى السيّد عبد الكريم ابن طاووس عن صفوان الجمّال قال : لما وافيت مع جعفر الصادق عليه‌السلام الكوفة يريد أبا جعفر المنصور قال لي : يا صفوان الجمال أنخ الراحلة فهذا قبر جدّي أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام فأنختها ثم نزل فاغتسل وغيَّر ثوبه وتحفّى وقال لي : إفعل مثل ما أفعله. ثم اخذ نحو الذّكوة (النجف) وقال : قصّر خطاك وألقِ ذقنك نحو الأَرض فإنه يكتب لك بكل خطوة مائة ألف حسنة ويمحي عنك مائة ألف سيئة وترفع لك مائة ألف درجة وتقضى لك مائة ألف حاجة ويكتب لك ثواب كلّ صدّيق وشهيد مات أو قتل ثمَّ مشى

text.en: During my journey with him to al-Kufah for meeting Abu-Ja`far al-Mansur the `Abbasid ruler, Imam Ja`far al-Sadiq (‘a) asked me to make our camels kneel down at a certain place, saying, “This is the tomb of my grandfather, the Commander of the Faithful.” As I made the camels kneel down there, he rode off, bathed himself, changed his clothes, took off his shoes, and ordered me to imitate him in everything. He then directed towards the hillock of Najaf (al-dhakwah), saying, “If you walk in short steps and nod your head to the ground, you shall be given one hundred thousand rewards for each step, one hundred thousand sins shall be erased from your sins, you shall be elevated one hundred thousand ranks, one hundred thousand of your requests shall be granted, and you shall be granted the rewards of all veracious individuals who died and all martyrs whom were slain.”
text.ar: ومشيت معه على السكينة والوقار نسبّح ونقدّس ونهلّل إلى أن بلغنا الذَّكوات (التلول) فوقف عليه‌السلام ونظر يمنةً

segments.arabic: ويسرةً وخط بعكازته فقال لي : اطلب فطلبت فإذا أثر القبر ثم أرسل دموعه على خده وقال :

translation.en: Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) then walked with tranquility and gravity, and I followed him, pronouncing statements of glorification and sanctification of Almighty Allah and confession of His Oneness until we reached the hillocks there. He stopped there, looked to the right and the left, sketched something on the ground with his stick, and asked me to look for the signs of the tomb. As I did, I could notice the traces of the tomb of Imam `Ali (‘a). Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) immediately shed tears down his face and said these words:

segments.transliteration: inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji`una

translation.en: To Allah we belong and to Him is our return.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ﭐلْوَصِيُّ ﭐلْبَرُّ ﭐلتَّقِيُّ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O successor (of the Prophet), righteous, and pious.
Peace be upon you, O Great News.
Peace be upon you, O veracious and right-directing one.
Peace be upon you, O righteous and pure.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَصِيَّ رَسُولِ رَبِّ ﭐلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya wasiyya rasuli rabbi al`alamina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Successor of the Messenger of the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خِيَرَةَ ﭐللَّهِ عَلَىٰ ﭐلْخَلْقِ أَجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya khiyarata allahi `ala alkhalqi ajma`ina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O choice of Allah over all creatures.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ حَبيبُ ﭐللَّهِ وَخَاصَّةُ ﭐللَّهِ وَخَالِصَتُهُ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka habibu allahi wa khassatu allahi wa khalisatuhu

translation.en: I bear witness that you are verily Allah’s beloved, elite, and select.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِيَّ ﭐللَّهِ وَمَوْضِعَ سِرِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waliyya allahi wa mawdi`a sirrihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O intimate servant of Allah, center of His secrets,
store of His knowledge, and keeper of His Revelation.

text.en: Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) then threw himself on the tomb and said these words:
text.ar: ثم انكب على القبر وقال :

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا أَمِيرَ ﭐلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi ya amir almu'minina

translation.en: May Allah accept my father and mother as ransoms for you, O Commander of the Faithful!

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا حُجَّةَ ﭐلْخِصَامِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi ya hujjata alkhisami

translation.en: May Allah accept my father and mother as ransoms for you, O argument in controversies!

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا بَابَ ﭐلْمَقَامِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi ya baba almaqami

translation.en: May Allah accept my father and mother as ransoms for you, O door to the (elevated) position!

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا نُورَ ﭐللَّهِ ﭐلتَّامَّ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi ya nura allahi alttamma

translation.en: May Allah accept my father and mother as ransoms for you, O utter light of Allah!

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ قَدْ بَلَّغْتَ عَنِ ﭐللَّهِ

translation.en: I bear witness that you have conveyed all that which you were ordered to convey from Allah
and from Allah’s Messenger,

segments.arabic: صَلَّىٰ ﭐللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ مَا حُمِّلْتَ
segments.transliteration: salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi ma hummilta

translation.en: may Allah’s peace be upon him and his Household,
attended to that which was kept with you,
kept that which was stored with you,
decided as lawful all that which Allah has deemed lawful,
decided as unlawful all that which Allah has deemed unlawful,
carried out the decrees of Allah,
never exceeded the limits of Allah,
and worshipped Allah sincerely
until death came upon you.
May Allah send blessings upon you
and upon the Imams who came after you!

text.en: Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) then stood up and offered a number of units of prayer at the side of the Imam’s head. He then said to me (i.e. Safwan), “Whoever visits Amir al-Mu'minin with this form of Ziyarah and then offers the like of this prayer shall return home while all his sins are forgiven, all his efforts are accepted, and will have the rewards of all the angels who visit this tomb recorded for him.” I asked, “Do you mean the reward of all the angels who visit this tomb?”
text.ar: ثم قام عليه‌السلام فصلى عند الرأس ركعات وقال : يا صفوان من زار أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام بهذه الزيارة وصلى بهذه الصلاة ورجع إلى أهله مغفُوراً ذنبه مشكوراً سعيه ويكتب له ثواب كل من زاره من الملائكة قلت : ثواب كل من يزوره من الملائكة؟ قال : بلى يزوره في كل ليلة سبعون قبيلة. قلت كم القبيلة؟ قال : مائة ألف ثم خرج من عنده القهقري وهو يقول :

text.en: The Imam (‘a) answered, “Yes, I do. Each night, this tomb is visited by seventy thousand tribes of angels.”
“How many is a tribe of angels?” asked I.
“Each tribe consists of one hundred thousand angels,” answered the Imam (‘a).
The Imam (‘a) then left the place waling back but his face was still to the grave direction, uttering the following words:

translation.en: O grandfather! O master!
O pure! O infallible!

segments.arabic: لاََ جَعَلَهُ ﭐللَّهُ آخِرَ ﭐلْعَهْدِ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: la ja`alahu allahu akhira al`ahdi minka

translation.en: May Allah not cause this (visit of mine) to be the last of my compliments to you.
May He grant me the opportunity to visit you again,
to reside at your holy shrine,
and to be included with you
and with the righteous ones among your sons!
May Allah send blessings upon you
and upon the angels surrounding you!

text.en: I then said to him, “O master! May I inform our acquaintances in al-Kufah about this and lead them to this tomb?”The Imam (‘a) answered in the affirmative and gave me a sum of money to construct the tomb.
text.ar: قال صفوان : يا سيدي أتأذن لي أن أخبر أصحابنا من أهل الكوفة وأدلهم على هذا القبر فقال : نعم ، وأعطاني دراهم وأصلحت القبر.

text.en: Fourth Ziyarah
text.ar: الزيارة الرابعة

text.en: In Mustadrak al-Wasa’il, the following narration has been quoted from the book of al-Mazar al-Qadim on the authority of our master, Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (‘a): Accompanying my father, I went for visiting the tomb of my grandfather, Amir al-Mu’minin ‘Ali ibn Abi-Talib (‘a), in al-Najaf. My father stopped at the holy tomb, wept, and said the following:
text.ar: روي في مستدرك الوسائل عن كتاب (المزار القديم) عن مولانا الباقر عليه‌السلام قال : ذهبت مع أبي إلى زيارة قبر جدّي أمير المؤمنين علي بن أبي طالب عليه‌السلام في النجف فوقف أبي عند القبر المطهر وبكى وقال :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ أَبِي ﭐلأَئِمَّةِ وَخَلِيلِ ﭐلنُّبُوَّةِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala abi al-a'immati wa khalili alnnubuwwati

translation.en: Peace be upon the father of the Imams, the friend of the Prophethood,
and the one exclusively granted the fraternity (of the Holy Prophet).
Peace be upon the chief of true faith,
the Scale of the deeds
and the sword of the Lord of Majesty.
Peace be upon the most righteous of the believers,
the inheritor of the knowledge of the Prophets,
and the judge on the Judgment Day.
Peace be upon the Tree of Piety.
Peace be upon Allah’s conclusive argument,
His flowing boon,
and His forceful punishment.
Peace be upon the clear-cut path,
the patent star,
and the advising leader.
May Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon him.

text.en: My father (‘a) then added the following:
text.ar: وزاد قائلاً :

segments.transliteration: anta wasilati ila allahi wa dhari`ati

translation.en: You are verily my means and my course to Allah.

segments.transliteration: wa li haqqu muwalati wa ta'mili

translation.en: And I enjoy the right of my loyalty to you and my hoping for you.

segments.arabic: فَكُنْ لِي شَفيعِي إِلَىٰ ﭐللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ
segments.transliteration: fakun shafi`i ila allahi `azza wa jalla

translation.en: So, (please) be my intercessor before Allah—the Almighty and All-majestic—
as regards the settlement of my request,

segments.transliteration: wa hiya fakaku raqabati min alnnari

translation.en: which is the release of my neck from Hellfire.
And (please) seal my current situation with success

segments.transliteration: wa bima sa'altuhu kullahi birahmatihi wa qudratihi

translation.en: and with response to all that which I have asked for, out of His mercy and power.
O Allah, (please do) grant me an utter intellect,
sharp aptitude,
pure heart,
much deed,
and fabulous courtesy,
and make all that for my good
and do not make it against me,
[I beseech You] in the name of Your mercy, O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: Fifth Ziyarah
text.ar: الزيارة الخامسة

text.en: Shaykh al-Kulayni has reported that Imam ‘Ali ibn Muhammad al-Naqi (al-Hadi) instructed the following: At the tomb of Amir al-Mu’minin (‘a), you may say the following:
text.ar: روي عن الكليني عن أبي الحسن الثالث الإمام علي بن محمد النقي عليه‌السلام قال : تقول عند قبر أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O intimate servant of Allah.
You are the first to have been oppressed
and the first to have had his right usurped.
You, nevertheless, acted patiently, seeking the reward of Allah,
until death came upon you.

segments.arabic: فَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ لَقِيتَ ﭐللَّهَ وَأَنْتَ شَهِيدٌ
segments.transliteration: fa'ashhadu annaka laqita allaha wa anta shahidun

translation.en: I thus bear witness that you met Allah as martyr.
May Allah torture him who killed you with the various kinds of torture
and may He renew torture for him ceaselessly.
I have come to you, recognizing your right,
acknowledging your position,
and bearing enmity against your enemies and against those who wronged you.

segments.arabic: أَلْقَىٰ عَلَىٰ ذٰلِكَ رَبِّي إِنْ شَاءَ ﭐللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: alqa `ala dhalika rabbi in sha'a allahu

translation.en: I, by Allah’s willing, will meet my Lord carrying these principles.
O intimate servant of Allah,
I have (committed) numerous sins;
so, (please) intercede for me before your Lord,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ لَكَ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ مَقَاماً مَعْلُوماً

translation.en: for you verily enjoy a famous rank with Allah

segments.arabic: وَإِنَّ لَكَ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ جَاهاً وَشَفَاعَةً
segments.transliteration: wa inna laka `inda allahi jahan wa shafa`atan

translation.en: and you have verily enjoyed a high status and intercession with Allah.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ قَالَ ٱللَّهُ تَعَالَىٰ: ”وَلاَ يَشْفَعُونَ إِلاَّ لِمَنِ ٱرْتَضَىٰ.“
segments.transliteration: wa qad qala allahu ta`ala wa la yashfa`una illa liman irtada

translation.en: Allah, the All-exalted, has said (in this respect), “And they do not intercede except for him whom He accepts.”

text.en: Sixth Ziyarah
text.ar: الزيارة السادسة

text.en: The following form of Ziyarah has been mentioned by a number of our scholars among whom is Shaykh Muhammad ibn al-Mashhadi who quotes that Muhammad ibn Khalid al-Tayalisi has reported Sayf ibn `Umayrah to have related the following:
text.ar: رواها جمع من العلماء منهم الشيخ محمد ابن المشهدي قال : روى محمد بن خالد الطيالسي عن سيف بن عميرة قال : خرجت مع صفوان الجمّال وجماعة من أصحابنا إلى الغري فزرنا أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام فلما فرغنا من الزيارة صرف صفوان وجهه إلى ناحية أبي عبد الله عليه‌السلام وقال : نزور الحسين بن علي عليه‌السلام من هذا المكان من عند رأس أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام وقال صفوان : وردت ها هنا مع سيدي الصادق عليه‌السلام ففعل مثل هذا ودعا بهذا الدعاء ثم قال لي : يا صفوان تعاهد هذه الزيارة وادع بهذا الدعاء وزر علياً والحسين عليه‌السلام بهذه الزيارة فإني ضامن على الله لكل من زارهما بهذه الزيارة ودعاء بهذا الدعاء من قرب أو بعد أن زيارته مقبولة وأنّ سعيه مشكورٌ وسلامه واصلٌ غير محجوب وحاجته مقضية من الله بالغاً ما بلغت.

text.en: A group of our acquaintances and I accompanied Safwan al-Jammal to al-Ghari for the purpose of visiting the tomb of Amir al-Mu'minin (‘a). When we accomplished ziyarah, Safwan turned his face toward the tomb of Imam al-Husayn (‘a) and instructed that we should visit Imam al-Husayn ibn `Ali (‘a) from this place at the head’s side of Imam `Ali’s tomb. He then told us that he, once, accompanied Imam al-Sadiq (‘a) to this very place where the Imam (‘a) did the same thing that Safwan had just done and said the same supplication. Safwan added, “The Imam (‘a) then advised me to persist in this method and form of Ziyarah and to visit Imam `Ali and Imam al-Husayn (‘a) with this form, for he would guarantee, on behalf of Almighty Allah, that any one who visits them with this form of ziyarah and says this supplication, be it from close or far distance, will have his ziyarah accepted, his efforts rewarded, his greetings conveyed (to the Imams) without any barrier, and his requests granted by Almighty Allah whatever they are.”The entire text of this narration about the merits of saying this form of ziyarah, along with all of its etiquettes, and saying this supplication will be cited after the famous form known as Ziyarah of `ªshura' and the famous supplicatory prayer known as Du`a' `Alqamah (also called Du`a' Safwan).Hereinafter, the form of this ziyarah is cited:You may face the tomb of Imam `Ali (‘a) and say the following words:
text.ar: أقول : سيأتي تمام الخبر في فضل هذا العمل بعد دعاء صفوان في زيارة عاشوراء ، وزيارة الأمير عليه‌السلام هي هذه الزيارة ، استقبل قبره وقل :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah’s Messenger.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s select.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s trustee.
Peace be upon him whom Allah chose,
selected, and preferred from amongst His creatures.
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s friend
whenever night darkens and becomes dusk
and whenever daylight shines and gleams.
Peace be upon you whenever one keeps silent,

segments.transliteration: wa nataqa natiqun wa dharra shariqun

translation.en: whenever one utters something, and whenever a new day begins.
So also be Allah’s mercy and blessings upon you.
Peace be upon our master: the Commander of the Faithful,
`Ali the son of Abu-Talib,
the owner of unprecedented virtues, merits, and relief,
the terminator of the phalanxes of the infidels,
the all-courageous,
the all-powerful,
the deep-rooted,
who will serve the believers with water in a cup
from the Pond of the Messenger—the honorable, the honest.
Peace be upon the owner of perspicacity, favors,
bestowals, honors, and incentives.
Peace be upon the knight of the believers,
the lion of the monotheists,
the slayer of the polytheists,
and the successor of the Messenger of the Lord of the words.
May Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon him, too.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مَنْ أَيَّدَهُ ٱللَّهُ بَجِبْرَئِيلَ

translation.en: Peace be upon him whom Allah supported with (Archangel) Gabriel,
backed with (Archangel) Michael,
whom Allah has bestowed a close degree in both this abode and the abode to come,

segments.arabic: وَحَبَاهُ بِكُلِّ مَا تَقَرُّ بِهِ ٱلْعَيْنُ
segments.transliteration: wa habahu bikulli ma taqarru bihi al`aynu

translation.en: and whom Allah has granted all things that act as delight for an eye.
May Allah send blessings upon him
upon his Household the immaculate,
upon his descendants the choicest ones,
and upon the right-directing Imams,
who enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,
explained to us the duty of prayers,
ordered us to give alms,
made clear for us the observance of fasting during the month of Ramadan,
and taught us the true recitation of the Qur'an.
Peace be upon you, O Commander of the Faithful,
chief of the religion,
and leader of the white-forehead, marked believers.
Peace be upon you, O door to Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَيْنَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلنَّاظِرَةَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O sighting Eye of Allah,
extending Hand of Him,
listening Ear of Him,
Allah’s conclusive argument,
His flowing boon,
and His forceful punishment.
Peace be upon the decider between people of Paradise and people of Hellfire.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ نِعْمَةِ ٱللَّهِ عَلَىٰ ٱلأَبْرَارِ

translation.en: Peace be upon Allah’s benefaction for the righteous ones
and Allah’s wrath on the wicked ones.
Peace be upon the leader of the pious good-doers.
Peace be upon the brother of Allah’s Messenger,
the cousin of him, the husband of his daughter,
and the one created from the same clay of him.
Peace be upon the eternal origin
and the noble branch.
Peace be upon the prolific fruit.
Peace be upon Abu’l-Hasan, `Ali.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ طُوبَىٰ وَسِدْرَةِ ٱلْمُنْتَهَىٰ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala shajarati tuba wa sidrati almuntaha

translation.en: Peace be upon the Tree of Tuba (bliss) and the lote-tree of the utmost boundary.
Peace be upon Adam the choice of Allah,
upon Noah the Prophet of Allah,
upon Abraham the friend of Allah,
upon Moses the spoken by Allah,
upon Jesus the Spirit of Allah,
upon Muhammad the most beloved by Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa man baynahum min alnnabiyyina walssiddiqina

translation.en: and upon the Prophets, the veracious ones,
the martyrs, and the upright ones who came among them.
How excellent is the company of these!
Peace be upon the light of lights,
the descendant of the pure ones,
and the originally righteous ones.
Peace be upon the father of the virtuous Imams.
Peace be upon the firm cord of Allah
and the strong side of Him.
May Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon him, too.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ أَمِينِ ٱللَّهِ فِي أَرْضِهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon Allah’s trustee on His land,
Allah’s viceroy and the judge with His laws,
the custodian over His religion,
the spokesman of His wisdom,
the actor upon His Book,
the brother of the Messenger,
the husband of the Chaste Lady,
and the unsheathed sword of Allah.
Peace be upon the owner of the indications,
the magnificent signs,
and the overcoming miracles,
the redeemer from perdition,

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذِي ذَكَرَهُ ٱللَّهُ فِي مُحْكَمِ ٱلآيَاتِ
segments.transliteration: alladhi dhakarahu allahu fi muhkami al-ayati

translation.en: and whom Allah has mentioned in the decisive verses,

segments.arabic: فَقَالَ تَعَالَىٰ ”وَإِنَّهُ فِي أُمِّ ٱلْكِتَابِ لَدَيْنَا لَعَلِيُّ حَكيمٌ.“
segments.transliteration: faqala ta`ala wa innahu fi ummi alkitabi ladayna la`aliyyun hakimun

translation.en: saying, “And surely, in the original of the Book with Us, it is written that `Ali is wise.”
Peace be upon Allah’s pleased Name,
His Brilliant Face,
and His most elevated side.
May Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon him, too.
Peace be upon Allah’s Arguments, successors,
prominent people, and choices,
selects, and trustees.
May Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon him, too.
I have come to you, O master,
O Allah’s trustee and argument,
visiting (your tomb), acknowledging your right,
acceding to your adherents,
incurring the hostility of your enemies,
and seeking Allah’s nearness through my visit to you.

segments.arabic: فَٱشْفَعْ لِي عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ رَبّي وَرَبِّكَ
segments.transliteration: fashfa` li `inda allahi rabbi wa rabbika

translation.en: So, (please) intercede for me before Allah—your and my Lord—
so that He may save me from Hellfire

segments.transliteration: wa qada'i hawa'iji hawa'iji alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: and respond to my requests of this world and the Next World.

text.en: You may then throw yourself on the tomb, kiss it, and say the following:
text.ar: ثم انكب على القبر وقبله وقل :

segments.transliteration: salamu allahi wa salamu mala'ikatihi almuqarrabina

translation.en: Salutations of Allah and salutations of His Archangels,
and those who heartily yield to you,
O Commander of the Faithful,
and those who speak of your virtue

segments.arabic: وَٱلشَّاهِدِينَ عَلَىٰ أَنَّكَ صَادِقٌ أَمِينٌ صِدِّيقٌ

translation.en: and those who bear witness that you are surely honest, faithful, and veracious;
salutations as well as Allah’s mercy and blessings of all those be upon you.
I bear witness that you are verily pure, immaculate, and purified
and you are the descendant of the pure, immaculate, and purified ones.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ لَكَ يَا وَلِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَوَلِيَّ رَسُولِهِ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu laka ya waliyya allahi wa waliyya rasulihi

translation.en: I bear witness for you, O Intimate servant of Allah and loyal to Allah’s Messenger,
that you did convey and carry out (your mission).

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka janbu allahi wa babuhu

translation.en: I also bear witness that you are the duty that Allah has imposed (upon us) and the door to Him,
you are the beloved of Allah
and the direction from which Allah is reached,
you are the path to Allah,
and you are the servant of Allah

segments.arabic: وَأَخُو رَسُولِهِ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa akhu rasulihi salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi

translation.en: and the brother of His Messenger—may Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household.

segments.arabic: أَتَيْتُكَ مُتَقَرِّباً إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ بِزِيَارَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ataytuka mutaqarriban ila allahi `azza wa jalla biziyaratika

translation.en: I have come to you seeking nearness to Allah, to Whom belong all might and majesty, through my visit to you,
seeking your intercession for me,

segments.arabic: أَبْتَغِي بِشَفَاعَتِكَ خَلاَصَ رَقَبَتِي مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
segments.transliteration: abtaghi bishafa`atika khalasa raqabati min alnnari

translation.en: through which I hope for saving of myself from Hellfire,
seeking your protecting of myself from the Fire,

segments.arabic: هَارِباً مِنْ ذُنوُبِيَ ٱلَّتِي ٱحْتَطَبْتُهَا عَلَىٰ ظَهْرِي
segments.transliteration: hariban min dhunubiya allati ihtatabtuha `ala zahri

translation.en: escaping my sins with which I have burdened my back,
and having recourse to you in the hope for my Lord’s mercy.
O my master, I have come to you seeking your intercession for me
and I seek nearness to Allah through you
so that He may grant me all of my requests.

segments.arabic: فَٱشْفَعْ لِي يَا أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: fashfa` li ya amira almu'minina ila allahi

translation.en: So, O Commander of the Faithful, (please) intercede for me before Allah,

segments.transliteration: fa'inni `abdu allahi wa mawlaka wa za'iruka

translation.en: for I am the servant of Allah, and I am your associate and visitor,
and you enjoy with Allah a praiseworthy standing,
as well as a great esteem,
a high superiority,
and an acceptable right of intercession.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
and send blessings upon the Commander of the Faithful—
your well-pleased servant,
your most faithful trustee,
your firmest handle,
your highest hand,
your uppermost side,
your most excellent word,
your claim on the creatures,
your prime all-veracious,
the master of the Prophets’ successors,
the pillar of the saints,
the support of the elite ones,
the commander of the faithful,
the leader of the religion,
the example of the righteous ones,
the chief of the choice ones,
the protected against defects,
the precluded against flaws,
the purified from fault,
the saved from doubt,
the brother of Your Prophet,
the successor of Your Messenger,
the one who sacrificed himself for Your Prophet [when he took his place on his bed],
the one who gave up his soul for Your Prophet,
the one who removed agonies from Your Prophet,
the one whom You chose to be the sword of Your Prophet’s prophethood,
the sign of his Messengership,
the witness over his people,
the indication of his evidences,
the bearer of his pennon,
the shield against his heart,
the guide of his people,
the powerful hand of his might,
the crown of his head,
the door to his secrets,
and the key to his victory,
until he defeated the armies of polytheism by Your permission,
annihilated the forces of infidelity by Your order,

segments.transliteration: wa badhala nafsahu fi mardati rasulika

translation.en: devoted himself to the pleasure of Your Messenger,
and dedicated it to the obedience to him.

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ ٱللَّهُمَّ عَلَيْهِ صَلاَةً دَائِمَةً بَاقِيَةً

translation.en: So, O Allah, (please do) send upon him with endless, nonstop blessings.

text.en: You may then add the following:
text.ar: ثم قل :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O intimate servant of Allah,
the shining brightness,
and the endless light.
O descendant of the pure ones!
O secret of Allah!

segments.arabic: إِنَّ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ ٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ ذُنُوباً
segments.transliteration: inna bayni wa bayna allahi ta`ala dhunuban

translation.en: Verily, there are between Allah and me sins
that have burdened my back
and nothing can ease them except His pleasure;
so, (I beg you) in the Name of Him Who has entrusted you with His secret
and assigned you to manage the affairs of His creatures
to (please) be the interceder for me before Allah,
to be my savoir from the Fire,
and to be my supporter against the vicissitudes of my time,

segments.transliteration: fa'inni `abdu allahi wa waliyyuka wa za'iruka

translation.en: for I am the servant of Allah and I am your loyalist and visitor.
May Allah send blessings upon you.

text.en: You may then offer a six-unit prayer, which is the Ziyarah Prayer, and supplicate for whatever you want. Then, you may say the following:
text.ar: ثم صل ست ركعات صلاة الزيارة وادع بما شئت وقل :

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Commander of the Faithful!
Peace of Allah be upon you forever

segments.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu

translation.en: as long as I am alive and as long as days and nights come after each other.

text.en: You may then turn your face towards the tomb of Imam al-Husayn (‘a), point to it, and say the following:
text.ar: ثم توجه إلى جانب قبر الحسين عليه‌السلام وأشر إليه وقل :

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.
I have come to both of you visiting and begging you to be mediators

segments.transliteration: ila allahi ta`ala rabbi wa rabbikuma

translation.en: between me and Allah, the All-exalted, your and my Lord,
and I am turning my face to Allah in your names,

segments.arabic: وَمُسْتَشْفِعاً بِكُمَا إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ فِي حَاجَتِي هٰذِهِ…
segments.transliteration: wa mustashfi`an bikuma ila allahi fi hajati hadhihi…

translation.en: and seeking your intercession for me before Allah to grant me this request of mine, which is…

text.en: You may then say the famous supplicatory prayer known as <ref=3:1252>Dua Alqamah</ref> , which will be cited after the famous Ziyarah of ‘Ashura’, up to its end; i.e. up to this paragraph:
text.ar: وادع إلى آخر <ref=3:1252>الدعاء علقمة</ref>

text.en: He is verily All-nigh, All-responding
text.ar: إِنَّهُ قَرِيبٌ مُجِيبٌ

text.en: You may then face the kiblah direction and say the same Du`a’ Safwan from its beginning:
text.ar: ثم استقبل القبلةوادع من أول دعاء :

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya allahu ya allahu

translation.en: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!
O He who gives answer to the cries of the persecuted!
O He who pulls out the grief-stricken from agony

text.en: and up to the following statements:
text.ar: إِلى

segments.arabic: وَاصْرِفْنِي بِقَضاء حاجَتِي وَكِفايَةِ ماأَهَمَّنِي هَمُّهُ مِنْ أَمْرِ دُنْيايَ وَآخِرَتِي يا أرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

translation.en: …and make me leave having my requests granted and having all my agonies relieved, including those of this world and those of the world to come. O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: ثم التفت إلى جانب قبر أمير المؤمنين عليه‌السلام وقل :

translation.en: You may then turn your face toward the tomb of Amir al-Mu'minin (‘a) and say the following words:
Peace be upon you, O Commander of the Faithful!

segments.arabic: وَٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ أَبِي عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ

translation.en: And peace be upon Abu-`Abdullah al-Husayn,

segments.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu

translation.en: as long as I am alive and as long as day and night endure.

segments.arabic: لاََ جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ آخِرَ ٱلْعَهْدِ مِنِّي لِزِيَارَتِكُمَا
segments.transliteration: la ja`alahu allahu akhira al`ahdi minni liziyaratikuma

translation.en: May Allah not make this visit of mine to be the last of my visit to both of you!

segments.transliteration: wa la farraqa allahu bayni wa baynakuma

translation.en: And may Allah never separate me from you!

text.en: Seventh Ziyarah
text.ar: الزيارة السابعة

text.en: This form of Ziyarah has been reported by Sayyid Ibn Tawus, in his book entitled Misbah al-Za'ir, who, instructing the method of this ziyarah, says:
text.ar: رواها السيد ابن طاووس في كتاب (مصباح الزائر)

text.en: When you stop at the Door of Peace (bab al-salam: the gate of Imam `Ali’s holy shrine) where you can see the holy tomb, you may repeat the following phrase forty-three times:
text.ar: فقال : اقصد باب السلام أي باب الروضة المقدسة للأمير عليه‌السلام حيث يرى الضريح المقدس فقل أربعاً وثلاثين مرة :

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great.

text.en: You may then say the following words:
text.ar: وقل :

segments.transliteration: salamu allahi wa salamu mala'ikatihi almuqarrabina

translation.en: Peace of Allah and peace of His Archangels,
His missioned Prophets, and His righteous saints,
and [peace of] all the martyrs and the veracious
be upon you, O Commander of the Faithful.
Peace be upon Adam the choice of Allah.
Peace be upon Noah the prophet of Allah.
Peace be upon Abraham the intimate friend of Allah.
Peace be upon Moses the spoken to by Allah.
Peace be upon Jesus the Spirit of Allah.
Peace be upon Muhammad the beloved by Allah.
Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon them, too.
Peace be upon the pleased name of Allah,
His most elevated Face,
and His straight path.
Peace be upon the refined, purified one.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ أَبِي ٱلْحَسَنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala abi alhasani `aliyyi bni abi talibin

translation.en: Peace be upon Abu’l-Hasan, `Ali the son of Abu-Talib.
Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon him, too.
Peace be upon the choicest friend.
Peace be upon the one particularly married to the doyenne of the women [of the world].
Peace be upon the one born in the Ka`bah
and married in the heavens.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ أَسَدِ ٱللَّهِ فِي ٱلْوَغَىٰ

translation.en: Peace be upon the lion of Allah in battlefields.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مَنْ شُرِّفَتْ بِهِ مَكَّةُ وَمِنَىٰ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala man shurrifat bihi makkatu wa mina

translation.en: Peace be upon the one by whom Makkah and Mina have been honored.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ صَاحِبِ ٱلْحَوْضِ وَحَامِلِ ٱللِّوَاءِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala sahibi alhawdi wa hamili alliwa'i

translation.en: Peace be upon the one in charge of the Divine Pond and the bearer of the pennon [on the Resurrection Day].
Peace be upon the fifth of the Cloak Members.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْبَائِتِ عَلَىٰ فِرَاشِ ٱلنَّبِيِّ

translation.en: Peace be upon the one who replaced the Prophet in his bed
and thus sacrificed himself for the Prophet against the enemies.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ قَالِعِ بَابِ خَيْبَرَ وَٱلدَّاحِي بِهِ فِي ٱلْفَضَاءِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala qali`i babi khaybara walddahi bihi fi alfada'i

translation.en: Peace be upon the one who plucked up the gate of Khaybar city and threw it far away in the air.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُكَلِّمِ ٱلْفِتْيَةِ فِي كَهْفِهِمْ بِلِسَانِ ٱلأَنْبِيَاءِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala mukallimi alfityati fi kahfihim bilisani al-anbiya'i

translation.en: Peace be upon the one who spoke to the Seven Sleepers of Ephesus in their cave with the language of the Prophets.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُنْبِعِ ٱلْقَلِيبِ فِي ٱلْفَلاَ
